name: Binkley for Congress
subject: This is our moment,
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ryan Binkley for Congress
body:
| | | | | |
---
| |
Friend ,We’re coming up on a critical end-of-month deadline, and I want to speak to you from the heart.When I stepped into this race for Congress, it wasn’t for a title or a career change. I’m a pastor and a business owner who loves this country, and I believe God is not done with America yet. But I also believe our future depends on leaders who will tell the truth, balance a budget, secure the border, defend life and liberty, and bring people together instead of tearing them apart.To do that, we have to win this race. And to win this race, we have to hit our fundraising goals, especially on nights like this.Our campaign is working to meet a key **end-of-month deadline** that will show national observers and the Democrat incumbent that we are serious, organized, and ready to flip this seat. Every report we file sends a message about the strength of our movement.I don’t have a machine behind me. I have something better: people like you: families, small business owners, church members, and neighbors who are tired of politics-as-usual and ready for a new kind of leadership.Tonight, I’m asking you to stand with me.Can I count on you to chip in **$15, $25, $50, or even $100** before the deadline?
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [Contribute $25](https://binkleyforcongress.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a7930d2727540612917fd641e&id=3947bb6756&e=a4fe331f26)
---
| [Contribute $50](https://binkleyforcongress.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a7930d2727540612917fd641e&id=84c36d283a&e=a4fe331f26)
---
| [Contribute $100](https://binkleyforcongress.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a7930d2727540612917fd641e&id=564019444d&e=a4fe331f26)
---
| [Give Another Amount](https://binkleyforcongress.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a7930d2727540612917fd641e&id=fb7325625f&e=a4fe331f26)
---
| | Every gift—no matter the size—helps us keep our ads running, knock more doors, send more mail, and reach more voters who are ready for change in Texas’ 32nd District.Thank you for believing in this mission. Together, we can renew our district, restore common sense in Washington, and leave a stronger America for the next generation.With gratitude,**Ryan Binkley
** Candidate for Congress, TX-32
---
| [Donate Today](https://binkleyforcongress.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a7930d2727540612917fd641e&id=3685491452&e=a4fe331f26)
---
| |
_P.S. These end-of-month numbers will be closely watched. If you’ve been thinking about giving, tonight is the most important time to do it._
---

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I wanted to inform you of some news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter - I wanted to inform you sooner rather than later.
I've come to truly appreciate your consistent record.
With everything you've given to our movement, there was no question in my mind that I needed to send you this message ASAP.
I'd hate to see this opportunity pass you by.
That's why as soon as the House GOP Platinum committee flagged your profile, I knew I had to extend both a message of gratitude and of urgency!

1. **THANK YOU! I am so proud of everything we have accomplished and how far you 've come in your support for the House GOP, Peter. We would not be able to deliver on our America First agenda without you!**
2. **You 're now eligible for PLATINUM STATUS! Will you please accept this status and add this critical accomplishment to your GOP legacy?**

I'm not at all worried about your continued commitment. The last thing I would ever do is question your loyalty. But I'd hate for you to miss out on your chance to upgrade today with this limited time offer!

name: New Dems
subject: We’re running out of time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund

subject: Dinner table talking points
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119994920/584895236/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251126Dinner_N_TB_90DO_8_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmVjZDlkZS01YWNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SluuQg4xGTsZAZOrCQDB_XFFt_rqCRiiR_nq3m20WKw=) We are days away from Thanksgiving, which, under the Trump regime, has become a more and more contentious time if you have to share a meal with a MAGA-supporting family member.

**If politics can’t be forgone, we wanted to share some talking points to keep the conversation focused on the _truth_ of what is happening in our country:**

**On political violence:** Last week, Trump accused Democratic lawmakers of “seditious behavior,” calling for their arrest and, ultimately, their death for stating that active service members can refuse illegal orders. This isn’t hyperbole, as reported by the Washington Post, he posted on Truth Social: “HANG THEM GEORGE WASHINGTON WOULD !!”

**On healthcare:** Republicans are running out of time to ensure that healthcare premiums don’t skyrocket for millions of people. If ACA Enhanced Premium tax credits expire, ACA marketplace premiums will increase by an average of $705 per year for individuals, with some families seeing costs in the thousands. This also comes after Republicans earlier in the summer passed a Budget Bill that included over $1 trillion in health care cuts, including the largest-ever cut to Medicaid.

**On cost of living:** Thanks to Trump’s tariffs, prices are rising across the board. According to Reuters, U.S. consumer prices were up 3% in the 12 months through September, while the job market continues to weaken. Between blocking food assistance and feverishly prioritizing corporate interests over the well-being of hardworking Americans, Trump is pushing our economy towards a recession.

**On Trump’s Ballroom:** While the lives of people across the nation continue to get more difficult, Trump is focusing his efforts on throwing temper tantrums over the Epstein files and building a $300 million ballroom. Trump is paying for these renovations through “donations” from crypto billionaires, sports teams, media companies, and other special interest groups – aka the very people he is prioritizing over the People.

**Peter, Trump and his cronies in Congress have clearly been too busy serving their wealthy friends instead of tackling our growing health care crisis, making sure everyone has food on the table, or lowering the cost of living. It’s time to hold them accountable:[Before you log off for Thanksgiving, will you chip in $5 today to help Democrats take back the House?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119994921/584895264/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251126Dinner_N_TB_90DO_8_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmVjZDlkZS01YWNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SluuQg4xGTsZAZOrCQDB_XFFt_rqCRiiR_nq3m20WKw=)**

Together,

Team Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

name: NDRC
subject: This map disenfranchises Black voters. Point blank period.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We need all hands on deck to protect the voting power of Black voters in North Carolina
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119995127/584896344/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI1ZWNkOWRlLTVhY2EtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=37Gdp1u6CmKzEi-wl4wWkpthycmZvxGZys0QESiwPJs=&emci=381839ff-39ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=25ecd9de-5aca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
---

North Carolina already had one of the most gerrymandered maps in the country, Peter. Now, the state’s new, even more extreme gerrymander will silence the voices of millions of North Carolinians, particularly Black voters in Representative Don Davis’s district. **We must call this what it is: Disenfranchising Black voters by depriving them of the ability to be represented by a leader of their choosing.** Republicans have a long record of passing unfair maps that discriminate against Black voters. They did it in Texas. They did it in Missouri. And now they’ve done it in North Carolina. We’ve got to make sure these cynical power grabs backfire on Republicans. The NDRC is building power across the country to help voters hold these lawmakers accountable and ensure the will of the people is heard in the midterm elections. We’re working around the clock to defend the voting rights of Black and other minority communities, but we’re facing an unprecedented series of attacks on democracy and we need your help. [**Will you donate now to power this work defending our democracy from those who would tear it down?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119995129/584896347/-1263916904?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NCMap_email_20251125-NDRC-Tier1-NCMap_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251125-NDRC-Tier1-NCMap_&utm_campaign=NCMap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI1ZWNkOWRlLTVhY2EtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=37Gdp1u6CmKzEi-wl4wWkpthycmZvxGZys0QESiwPJs=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: We need all hands on deck to protect the voting power of Black voters in North Carolina | North Carolina already had one of the most gerrymandered maps in the country, Peter. Now, the state’s new, even more extreme gerrymander will silence the voices of millions of North Carolinians, particularly Black voters in Representative Don Davis’s district. We must call this what it is: Disenfranchising Black voters by depriving them of the ability to be represented by a leader of their choosing. Republicans have a long record of passing unfair maps that discriminate against Black voters. They did it in Texas. They did it in Missouri. And now they’ve done it in North Carolina. We’ve got to make sure these cynical power grabs backfire on Republicans. The NDRC is building power across the country to help voters hold these lawmakers accountable and ensure the will of the people is heard in the midterm elections. We’re working around the clock to defend the voting rights of Black and other minority communities, but we’re facing an unprecedented series of attacks on democracy and we need your help. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, The NDRC Team = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. Text MAPS to 36787, STOP to end. Msg and Data rates may apply

name: Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: Share what you’re grateful for here:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
We’re grateful for hard-fought progress in a tough year. |
#
---
Team, We’ve been thinking a lot about what we’re grateful for. It’s been a tough year, and progress hasn’t always come easily. **But it came because people showed up, they stood up for what they believed in, and kept pushing forward.** A few weeks ago, voters in Virginia and New Jersey made their voices heard loud and clear. Abigail Spanberger will be Virginia’s next Governor, and Mikie Sherrill will soon be leading New Jersey. These were huge wins, thanks in no small part to the efforts of this team. In Michigan, Governor Gretchen Whitmer passed a budget that reminds us what good government can look like. It protects Medicaid, fixes the damn roads with permanent, long-term investment, and ensures that every child can count on free breakfast and lunch at school. That’s the kind of leadership we’ve been fighting like hell for. So this week, we’re thankful for the progress we’ve made and the people who made it possible. _(Hint: that’s you!)_ **Now, we want to hear from you.[As we gather with family, friends, and neighbors, what are you thankful for this year? What keeps you going? What reminds you that the fight is worth it? We’re collecting responses from supporters across the country, and we’d love to include yours:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119995712/584904792/-751793834?contactdata=6lO7vVf9gfZNewkCRtpkx7BjfQQZatLwLUQEgEon00cjywk93FjTo1yZ1+2ax/AiCEKQQFEj67O34Kl2FeUw8sMgZlOOUIKGusTMtAFvCy+Jyhg8J6I7MoGL7L1BbYN4pyc7VxqrwelJwYgufFlLsA==&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20251125_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWM1MjlmMmYtNWRjYS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qk4CjbPxeWgIT00e5wsq--GIghbyzoS-pR6i1EYlBiE=&emci=71cf5029-5dca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ec529f2f-5dca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1028753)** | | [TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119995713/584904793/-751793834?contactdata=6lO7vVf9gfZNewkCRtpkx7BjfQQZatLwLUQEgEon00cjywk93FjTo1yZ1+2ax/AiCEKQQFEj67O34Kl2FeUw8sMgZlOOUIKGusTMtAFvCy+Jyhg8J6I7MoGL7L1BbYN4pyc7VxqrwelJwYgufFlLsA==&refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20251125_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWM1MjlmMmYtNWRjYS1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qk4CjbPxeWgIT00e5wsq--GIghbyzoS-pR6i1EYlBiE=&emci=71cf5029-5dca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ec529f2f-5dca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1028753)

name: Maggie @ Team Cooper for North Carolina
subject: I don’t want to worry Roy… but we are NOT on track.
body:
Need you to give this email a few minutes of your attention.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=67%2E124072%2Ejt2C-L)
Hi Peter, I’m Maggie, Roy Cooper’s finance director. Nice to meet you! I know Roy reached out today about our November online goal. It’s high — $825,000 — and looking at the numbers, we won’t reach it at our current pace. That’s not where we want to be with just 5 days left in the month. _But Roy says that this team always comes through._ **[I do have to ask you to pitch in (it’s my job!), but Roy also wanted me to share some info about what our biggest expenses are and why our campaign needs your support.👇](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2048?t=6&akid=67%2E124072%2Ejt2C-L)** | **Top Expenses — Roy Cooper for U.S. Senate:** 🚗 _Travel_ — we have to build out a budget for getting Roy out to every corner of North Carolina to meet face to face with as many voters as possible. We know from experience: That’s the key to winning this swing state. 👥 _Staff_ — hiring and paying our staff is one of our TOP campaign expenditures. We knew we’d need to hire the best in the business, and we’re still growing. This is a statewide campaign, and we need a statewide presence. 💻 _TV & Online ads_ — they help us get the word out, but they aren’t free. | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2048?t=7&akid=67%2E124072%2Ejt2C-L)
---
We plan carefully for these expenses and more — really down to the last cent. If we don’t raise the funds we plan on, we have to curtail our planned efforts.
**Meanwhile, we’re facing hundreds of millions in investment from the GOP, who see Roy as the top threat to their Senate majority.**
_Experts say this could even become the very first billion-dollar Senate race._
Here’s what that means financially speaking: We don’t just have to plan around our _own_ budget. We have to account for our opponent’s, too. We have to be able to keep up with Republicans dollar for dollar — and if we miss this goal, we won’t have the funds we need.
**[Please give what you can so I can let Roy know we’re getting back on track to hit our target by the end of the month (this Sunday!) Click here to give whatever’s right for you.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2048?t=8&akid=67%2E124072%2Ejt2C-L)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2049?t=9&akid=67%2E124072%2Ejt2C-L)
---
[DONATE $10](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2050?t=10&akid=67%2E124072%2Ejt2C-L)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2051?t=11&akid=67%2E124072%2Ejt2C-L)
---
[DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2052?t=12&akid=67%2E124072%2Ejt2C-L)
---
[DONATE $100](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2053?t=13&akid=67%2E124072%2Ejt2C-L)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2054?t=14&akid=67%2E124072%2Ejt2C-L)
---
Thank you!
Maggie
Finance Director
Roy Cooper for North Carolina
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=67%2E124072%2Ejt2C-L)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=67%2E124072%2Ejt2C-L)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=4&akid=67%2E124072%2Ejt2C-L)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=67%2E124072%2Ejt2C-L)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=67%2E124072%2Ejt2C-L)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=15&akid=67%2E124072%2Ejt2C-L)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119995999/584915090/1615527010?&refcode=E16336-20251121-AdamGray-Image-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NzM2ZGE2LTVmY2EtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CZQ1RQRBdFzh-FvYatzcZuhP9BQorVz7FKdSk0F-ozw=) Hey Peter - it’s Adam Gray, and I’m proud to represent California’s 13th Congressional District in Congress. In 2024, we flipped this seat by just 187 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. That margin tells you everything you need to know about how competitive this district is. We can’t take anything for granted heading into 2026. National Republicans have already made CA-13 a top target—and they’re pouring resources into flipping it back. [_**That’s why I’m reaching out today: Can you split a donation between our campaign and the Blue Dogs today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119996000/584915091/1615527010?&refcode=E16336-20251121-AdamGray-SL-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NzM2ZGE2LTVmY2EtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CZQ1RQRBdFzh-FvYatzcZuhP9BQorVz7FKdSk0F-ozw=) [DONATE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119996001/584915092/1615527010?&refcode=E16336-20251121-AdamGray-SB-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NzM2ZGE2LTVmY2EtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CZQ1RQRBdFzh-FvYatzcZuhP9BQorVz7FKdSk0F-ozw=) I came to Washington ready to work with anyone, no matter what side of the aisle they sit on, to get the job done for the people we were elected to serve. But the current Republican majority in Congress has only brought chaos and dysfunction. They’ve cut healthcare, slashed food programs for children and seniors, and made it clear their loyalty lies with Donald Trump, not the American people. My race here in California is a must-win if we’re going to take back the House to get Congress back to work for the American people, and your support can help power us forward. [_**Grassroots supporters like you made the ultimate difference in our race last time around, and we need that same support if we’re going to keep these districts blue and flip the House majority. clean_body: | | = Hey Peter - it’s Adam Gray, and I’m proud to represent California’s 13th Congressional District in Congress. In 2024, we flipped this seat by just 187 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. That margin tells you everything you need to know about how competitive this district is. We can’t take anything for granted heading into 2026. National Republicans have already made CA-13 a top target—and they’re pouring resources into flipping it back. = = I came to Washington ready to work with anyone, no matter what side of the aisle they sit on, to get the job done for the people we were elected to serve. But the current Republican majority in Congress has only brought chaos and dysfunction. They’ve cut healthcare, slashed food programs for children and seniors, and made it clear their loyalty lies with Donald Trump, not the American people. My race here in California is a must-win if we’re going to take back the House to get Congress back to work for the American people, and your support can help power us forward. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thanks for the support, Adam Gray Blue Dogs are normal people in Congress who want to get sht done. While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. It’s Raul. **Too many Californians are struggling to pay rent and buy groceries.** Many are even picking up holiday shifts just to make ends meet. That’s the reality we’re living in under Donald Trump’s corrupt administration, and people are fed up. Now, the cracks in their coalition are starting to show. But instead of taking responsibility, **Republicans are deflecting — and directing their attacks straight at me.** **That’s because the NRCC knows I represent one of the most vulnerable seats in California.** **Here’s why:** In 2024, Republicans gained significant ground in CA-25, especially among Latino men. In fact, _three of our counties flipped red._ And while Democrats won some incredible victories earlier this month, turnout in our district for Prop 50 was alarmingly low. **I’m fighting to lower the cost of goods, bring good-paying jobs to Coachella Valley, and ensure you get the support you deserve.** But this fight isn’t won overnight, and I need your help to keep pushing forward. **I've told my team we need to _increase_ our fundraising goal ahead of our public FEC report at the end of the year, which means we need to raise $10,000 before midnight this Sunday.** If we don't act now, we'll miss our opportunity to flip the House blue and take back the majority. We can't afford to let this advantage slip away. The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: They have their eyes on CA-25. While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It’s Raul. Too many Californians are struggling to pay rent and buy groceries. Many are even picking up holiday shifts just to make ends meet. That’s the reality we’re living in under Donald Trump’s corrupt administration, and people are fed up. Now, the cracks in their coalition are starting to show. But instead of taking responsibility, Republicans are deflecting — and directing their attacks straight at me. That’s because the NRCC knows I represent one of the most vulnerable seats in California. Here’s why: In 2024, Republicans gained significant ground in CA-25, especially among Latino men. In fact, three of our counties flipped red. And while Democrats won some incredible victories earlier this month, turnout in our district for Prop 50 was alarmingly low. I’m fighting to lower the cost of goods, bring good-paying jobs to Coachella Valley, and ensure you get the support you deserve. But this fight isn’t won overnight, and I need your help to keep pushing forward. I've told my team we need to increase our fundraising goal ahead of our public FEC report at the end of the year, which means we need to raise $10,000 before midnight this Sunday. If we don't act now, we'll miss our opportunity to flip the House blue and take back the majority. We can't afford to let this advantage slip away. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Raul Ruiz | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: President Trump is using the FBI to target me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
But these kinds of tactics won’t work on me. And neither will the total wave of death threats, bomb threats, and general harassment he has unleashed.

| Friends -

Last night, the FBI's Counterterrorism Division appeared to open an inquiry into me in response to a video the President did not like.

In that video, I directly quoted the Uniform Code of Military Justice alongside five other Members of Congress with service and veteran backgrounds. Officers and enlisted in our military are trained to follow lawful orders, and refuse to follow illegal orders. It’s part of the training. This has been the case since World War II.

Since then, the President has misquoted me, and then called for my arrest, trial, and death by hanging. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth has threatened my friend, Senator Mark Kelly, with court martial. And now, it appears the president has directed the FBI to target the rest of us.

**This is exactly why we made that video in the first place.**

President Trump believes in weaponizing the federal government against his perceived enemies and does not believe laws apply to him or his Cabinet. He uses legal harassment as an intimidation tactic, to scare people out of speaking up. He’s done it to law firms, universities, private sector companies and private individuals.

But these kinds of tactics won’t work on me. And neither will the total wave of death threats, bomb threats, and general harassment he has unleashed.

I have always worked to be upfront and honest in these emails. This latest news from the FBI means that I have had to start thinking through a legal defense strategy – and we do not know exactly where President Trump and his Department of Justice will take this inquiry. And for the time being, all of that planning is being paid for through campaign dollars.

[_**So, your split contribution to Hillary Scholten and me will be put to work immediately to ensure I have the resources to fight back.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119996219/584920717/-1084207651?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-11-25_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjU4MjUyYi02MWNhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5FtWs1qp4DGJgYCpJMGl5MlG8SqjnrMSAfmpWCux_nc=)

clean_body: But these kinds of tactics won’t work on me. And neither will the total wave of death threats, bomb threats, and general harassment he has unleashed. | Friends - Last night, the FBI's Counterterrorism Division appeared to open an inquiry into me in response to a video the President did not like. In that video, I directly quoted the Uniform Code of Military Justice alongside five other Members of Congress with service and veteran backgrounds. Officers and enlisted in our military are trained to follow lawful orders, and refuse to follow illegal orders. It’s part of the training. This has been the case since World War II. Since then, the President has misquoted me, and then called for my arrest, trial, and death by hanging. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth has threatened my friend, Senator Mark Kelly, with court martial. And now, it appears the president has directed the FBI to target the rest of us. This is exactly why we made that video in the first place. President Trump believes in weaponizing the federal government against his perceived enemies and does not believe laws apply to him or his Cabinet. He uses legal harassment as an intimidation tactic, to scare people out of speaking up. He’s done it to law firms, universities, private sector companies and private individuals. But these kinds of tactics won’t work on me. And neither will the total wave of death threats, bomb threats, and general harassment he has unleashed. I have always worked to be upfront and honest in these emails. This latest news from the FBI means that I have had to start thinking through a legal defense strategy – and we do not know exactly where President Trump and his Department of Justice will take this inquiry. And for the time being, all of that planning is being paid for through campaign dollars. = | | | = | = | = | = | = To be frank, the whole thing isn’t about one line from one video. The events of the last week do not represent the country we know and love. I refuse to believe that this is the new normal — where the President of the United States uses fear and intimidation against people with whom he disagrees. But Hillary Scholten and I can’t do this alone. Thank you for reading — and thank you in advance for your help. name: Team AOC
subject: Trump called for Mark Kelly to be hanged
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
No one should comply with illegal orders — even if the illegal orders are coming from the President of the United States.
#
**First:** Mark Kelly and other veterans in Congress posted a video reminding members of the military they do not have to comply with illegal orders. They called on service members to uphold their oath to protect and defend the U.S. Constitution.
**Then:** Donald Trump accused them of sedition and _called for Mark Kelly to be hanged_. These remarks are not just shocking or just offensive — they are bizarre, erratic, and volatile. It is not normal to invoke these kinds of threats of violence.
**Now:** The Department of Defense is coming after Mark Kelly and threatening to court-martial him in a blatant act of political persecution.
This is a classic Trump move: attempt to rule with total disregard for the law, and attack anyone who dares to speak out.
We’ll only get through these times if each of us does everything we can to hold the administration accountable. _We need to stand with people like Mark Kelly_ who are taking on personal risk to stop Trump’s abuse of power.
[ Can you split a $5 donation between Mark Kelly and Alexandria today so they can both continue to fight back against Trump’s rising authoritarianism?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251125-kelly.E6Qbjs&refcode=em20251125-10281-P_FND_ANO_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10281%2E2526796%2EW0DCRg)

In solidarity,
Team AOC

clean_body: | = = I’m so excited to share that our grassroots campaign is endorsed by Dolores Huerta. It means the world to me to have her endorsement. I grew up organizing here in Kern County around education, immigration, and many other issues. When my classmates were needlessly expelled for not taking off a hat or chewing gum in class, it was Dolores Huerta and her foundation who stood up and fought for them. For decades, Dolores has been on the front lines of the fight for justice in the Central Valley -- as co-founder of the United Farm Workers and a lifelong advocate for working families. She’s someone I’ve admired my entire life. To have her support in this campaign means more to me than just an endorsement: it’s a reminder of why I do this work, and who I’m doing it for. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = In gratitude, Randy Villegas | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. To support Randy's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress PO Box 1346 Visalia, CA 93279 United States

name: Team Marie
subject: Our grassroots strength matters
body:
| | Peter – Since day one in Congress, Marie has remained independent, honest, and laser-focused on elevating the voices of our communities here in Southwest Washington.

She’s taken on both parties when they’ve lost the plot. She’s pushed for transparency when others wanted to look the other way. And she’s fought tirelessly for issues that actually matter to everyday people, from childcare to healthcare costs, veterans’ services, rural transportation, forestry, and the right to repair.

**That’s exactly why national Republicans are already circling WA-03. This district is one of the most competitive in the entire country, and what we do now will shape whether Marie has the resources to withstand the onslaught on the road ahead.**

[Grassroots strength is our best proof point. Will you help us hit our $45,000 November goal by pitching in $10 or whatever you can spare?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119996888/584930184/-1425100085?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_251125_1_2&refcode2=a2f79a95-63ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmY3OWE5NS02M2NhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n4GHMzKW71ghhW6jNOsowAUswmnVro-X53a48N_8T70=) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._ | | **[DONATE $10 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119996889/584930185/-1425100085?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_251125_1_2&refcode2=a2f79a95-63ca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmY3OWE5NS02M2NhLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n4GHMzKW71ghhW6jNOsowAUswmnVro-X53a48N_8T70=)**

subject: Voting Rights on the CHOPPING BLOCK. >>>

body:
We need to take immediate action, folks.
| _Folks, this is a _total_ nightmare:_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/voting-rights-act-2025/?source=VPP_20251125_EMPET_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=22011%2E878179%2EQFa1zz) _If Republicans get away with this, Democrats might NEVER have a House majority ever again!_ **That’s why we’re taking IMMEDIATE action:**

[**We’re urgently rounding up the top 100 Democrats in your state to sign on: Will you add your name to our time-sensitive petition to SAVE the Voting Rights Act and STOP the Supreme Court from destroying future elections? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/voting-rights-act-2025/?source=VPP_20251125_EMPET_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=22011%2E878179%2EQFa1zz) | [ADD MY NAME: SAVE THE VOTING RIGHTS ACT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/voting-rights-act-2025/?source=VPP_20251125_EMPET_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=22011%2E878179%2EQFa1zz)
---
We can’t overstate how dangerous this is.

**_Gutting the Voting Rights Act would lead to outright voter suppression and election rigging, and would practically _guarantee_ a Republican majority, indefinitely!_**

We can’t sit back and let them get away with this, folks — _but we need all hands on deck:_

[**Please: Sign on IMMEDIATELY to SAVE the Voting Rights Act and STOP the Supreme Court from DESTROYING future elections »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/voting-rights-act-2025/?source=VPP_20251125_EMPET_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=22011%2E878179%2EQFa1zz)

This is a five-alarm fire for our Democracy. We hope you’ll step up.

Thank you,
_The Voter Protection Project_

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22011%2E878179%2EQFa1zz). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22011%2E878179%2EQFa1zz).**

clean_body: | | | When you hold the Trump administration accountable, their only answer is to send death threats and try and send you to prison – even if you’re a United States Senator. Senator Mark Kelly and 5 other Democratic members of Congress made a perfectly legal video telling service members to resist illegal orders that go against the Constitution. Trump decided to send death threats to these public servants and direct the Department of Defense to investigate Sen. Mark Kelly. Congress needs to hold Trump accountable for his continuous overreach and shredding of the Constitution. Congress needs to impeach Trump. Cedar Key Progress has expanded our billboard program to places like Memphis, demanding Trump’s impeachment. Memphis and other cities need to know that impeachment is the only way Trump is going to be stopped, and let's ensure a Democratic majority in Congress to get that done. name: Matias, United We Dream
subject: Time for the final course! The Just Flavors! season finale just dropped 🧡
body:
Help yourself to one last serving 👉 | | | Hey Peter, the _Just Flavors!_ Season 2 finale just dropped! ⏰ **[Get one last taste of Season 2, and watch our final episode today to celebrate New Beginnings.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.Khhv6i-A6kGAx4x-ts_8mtFotdo2NS8VUcgsdggMW-T1ogWBUFDAoCM9-A3dIm_O1Ei239RfZJCMip65f8dqFv76tqs0ZTUa5t-nemozuanzQBxqGjE5ti3VN3D0KMsJH35mgC7F_kPf9q5gtEWDGeZf1PnvRunWYN0XKERuiev_2DWvJjGpUnUnZJZ08aRfrmzhkj7tuiZfRDBgFRJj_lcShkON_7UJTs_sHSSLI0Wg0OEwI2kRjH0d_wBxo88wYffz0QnB_Dhc_i_a7h_rwdjGI5YlwqAEWnak825iVyNIXmP7_IUf1SPmodkfR3rT8jOQ7HSkSSkejnoxYt3PVuJ6gQj-HQ56dZhdKFWJZ6_q6Zhb35DCZpBvZNuLXjy0/4lx/QnlwW34hQO2SQVKlEcrikQ/h0/h001.Bi29e2cid-CC27nPCXZjKdXRZyV1jx9gO-UpaNv555U) **Our contestants recreate the recipes made in their new homes after their families first moved to the U.S. 🏠🧡 Celebrity guest judge, podcast host and stand-up comedian Atheer Yacoub, makes a quick stop on her comedy tour to try out these delicious dishes! name: GOTV PAC
subject: These polls should terrify the GOP – if we can capitalize
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Poll after poll is telling the same story: Democrats are leading the generic congressional ballot.
Consistently by 5, 10, sometimes 14 points!
In a normal midterm cycle, the party out of power, in this instance the Democrats, always gains ground. This year, voters are turning away from Trump’s Republican Party in even higher numbers.
But here's the part the headlines don’t say out loud: Polls don't matter if there's no turnout.
If you’re able, can you chip in today to help translate these polling leads into real wins on the ground? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11252025]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11252025]
We’re seeing the opportunity, but the question now is whether we have the resources to seize it.
Thank you for fueling this work.
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

Washington, DC 20002

Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Okay… we never do this. But today we are
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Darren White for Mayor
body:
Albuquerque needs this very badly. Quick note for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=60cb3bb667&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | |
Hey friends — Mark & Krysty here.
We’ll cut right to it:
We _hate_ sending political fundraising emails. You hate receiving them. We all hate this. [So, if we’re doing it, it’s because it actually matters](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=96f705d9a2&e=567664f14c).
**Albuquerque is in a mayoral runoff on December 9th, and Darren White has a real shot to win.** He came out of the November 4th election just four points behind Keller — shocking pretty much everyone and now the other side is unloading attack ads like confetti.

Meanwhile, the city is drowning in crime, homelessness has doubled, tent cities are everywhere, and **we’ve got a mayor whose big strategy seems to be: “handle the crime yourself loser! It’s not my job!”**
Darren is the opposite of that. Army veteran. Former Bernalillo County Sheriff. Actual grownup. It’s time to move on from the “Metal Mayor” who’s had 8 years and only made Albuquerque more dangerous and a magnet for the homeless.

**Albuquerque needs Darren very badly.**
So here comes the part we never thought we’d say:
[**👉 If you can, please chip in to Darren’s campaign here**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=184ab08e35&e=567664f14c)
Every dollar helps him fight back against the wall of negative ads.
If giving isn’t for you, seriously no problem at all. We meant it when we promised not to spam your inbox, and this is the rare exception because we love this city and we desperately want the place our kids are growing up in to turn around.
Thanks for sticking with us, for supporting the podcast, and for forgiving this one “okay fine we’ll break our own rule” moment.
Mark & Krysty
_The No Doubt About It Podcast
_
_P.S. If you’re tired of the tent encampments, the crime, and the chaos**Darren gives Albuquerque a real chance to change course**. Here’s the link again:_
---
| [DONATE TO DARREN WHITE NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3d3c939d4e&e=567664f14c)

We meant it when we promised not to spam your inbox, and this is the rare exception because we love this city and we desperately want the place our kids are growing up in to turn around. Thanks for sticking with us, for supporting the podcast, and for forgiving this one “okay fine we’ll break our own rule” moment. Mark & Krysty The No Doubt About It Podcast P.S. If you’re tired of the tent encampments, the crime, and the chaosDarren gives Albuquerque a real chance to change course. Here’s the link again: | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Darren White for Mayor. | | Peter, Donald Trump just called for my death and arrest.

He not only called for my arrest—he went even further, calling for violence against me and several of my colleagues who also served the country before our time in Congress.

Why? Because we spoke a simple truth: no service member is forced to follow an illegal order. The oath to the Constitution is sacred, one that I first swore as a 17-year old at the Naval Academy, and binds us all to the rule of law.

I will not be intimidated by Donald Trump and his calls for violence against me.
---

name: Congressman Al Green, TX-09
subject: AIPAC and Trump agree on one thing.
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/111773/images/AL%20Green/green%20take%20it%20back.jpg]
Friends,
It is rare that the Special Interest Lobby and the MAGA movement agree on anything. But right now, they have found a common target: Me.
We have confirmed that AIPAC (through its dark-money Super PAC) has just dropped a massive ad buy attacking me.
Why? Because I refused to stay silent about the humanitarian crisis in Gaza. Because I demanded justice for all people, not just the ones they approve of.
At the exact same time, President Trump is on social media threatening political opponents with "death" and "execution," and his allies are attacking me for filing impeachment articles.
They are united by a single fear: A Congressman they cannot buy, boss, or bully.
They want to replace a voice for justice with a voice for compliance.
I have a message for AIPAC and for the President: I answer to the people.
We need to raise $50,000 in the next 48 hours [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251101em] to fight this two-front war. We have to counter the AIPAC smears on your timeline and the airwaves and the MAGA threats on the ground.
Please, stand with me as I fight for you.
DONATE $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251101em]
Unbought and Unbossed,
Congressman Al Green
FIGHT BACK [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251101em]
Keep Al Green in Congress Campaign
Checks can be Mailed to:
Keep Al Green in Congress Campaign
PO Box 56761
Houston, TX 77256
United States
To Keep Al Green in Congress, click here to make a donation online [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251101em]

Null, with Thanksgiving just days away, Team Haley has a lot to be grateful for:
📈 Polls show Haley is the Democrat with the strongest chance to defeat Republican Mike Rogers and keep Michigan blue.
🗳️ After this month’s elections, **political experts say the Senate majority is _officially_ in play** – and the path runs straight through our battleground state.
💙 This grassroots team SHOWED UP today. **After Haley reached out this morning, hundreds of supporters chipped in** – and we’re so thankful.
**[But to stay on track for our $100,000 pre-Thanksgiving goal, we still need another 50 donations from 18326 before midnight tonight. Can you chip in $5 now to help us close the gap and win this race?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9280?t=3&akid=1468%2E49239%2EYIKngD)**

**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. My dad gave _**everything**_ for this country. He ran for president because he believed America was worth saving.

clean_body: I’ll be honest. It hurts to watch this play out again. It 's Don Jr. They're talking about impeaching my father...again. I wish I were kidding. After the beating Republicans just took in this year's elections, the Left smells weakness and a chance to steal the House in 2026. The same radical freaks who spent years trying to destroy my dad and our family are already plotting another impeachment to get rid of him once and for all. I'll be honest. It hurts to watch this play out again. My dad gave everything for this country. He ran for president because he believed America was worth saving. So I 'm fighting back for my dad the same way he's always fought for this country. Every dollar we raise goes straight toward defending MAGA candidates and stopping the Left from taking the majority they need to launch Impeachment 3.0. Don 't forget: every time they go after him, they're really attacking you Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Deb Haaland
subject: a tribute to the Native women who raised me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
From my great-grandmother, mother, and many before them, I’ve been blessed to come from generations of resilient and fierce Pueblo women.

| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1147?t=1&akid=5892%2E400544%2EOuGYjF)
---
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1148?t=2&akid=5892%2E400544%2EOuGYjF)
Before Native American Heritage Month ends, friend, I want to take a moment to honor some of the fierce Native women who made me who I am.
**_[But first, I’m running to represent all New Mexicans and give a voice to those who don’t have one. Will you donate $5 to our grassroots campaign for governor to help make history in New Mexico?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1169?t=3&akid=5892%2E400544%2EOuGYjF)_**
From my great-grandmother, mother and many before them, I’ve been blessed to come from generations of resilient and fierce Pueblo women.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1148?t=4&akid=5892%2E400544%2EOuGYjF)
The fierce women who raised me – plus me in my Garth Brooks tee!
My mother, Mary Toya, was born and raised in a boxcar, where the Laguna people created a community far from their home. She proudly served in the U.S. Navy, raised four kids as a military wife, and devoted 25 years to Indian education at the Bureau of Indian Affairs.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1148?t=5&akid=5892%2E400544%2EOuGYjF) [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1148?t=6&akid=5892%2E400544%2EOuGYjF)
Mom served in the Navy and played the snare drum in the Santa Fe Railroad Indian Band.
Standing on the shoulders of the Native women who came before me, I summoned the courage to run for office. When I became one of the first Native American women elected to Congress, I swore to leave the ladder down behind me so our youth would know they can be _anything_ they want to be.
But here’s what I’m reminded of this Native American Heritage Month: **History doesn’t just happen. We have to make it _together_.**
**No state in America has ever elected a Native American woman as governor. With your support, friend, we can change that.
**
But the governor's office in New Mexico has changed parties every eight years for decades, which means that the GOP and their billionaire donors will do anything to flip this seat in 2026.
**_[I'm counting on your grassroots support to help us fight back. So please, would you consider making a contribution of $5 to my campaign for governor today? I'd be so grateful to have you on our team.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1169?t=7&akid=5892%2E400544%2EOuGYjF)_**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1149?t=8&akid=5892%2E400544%2EOuGYjF)
---
| | [Donate $35 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1150?t=9&akid=5892%2E400544%2EOuGYjF)
---
| | [Donate $50 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1151?t=10&akid=5892%2E400544%2EOuGYjF)
---
| | [Other Amount >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1148?t=11&akid=5892%2E400544%2EOuGYjF)
---
Be fierce,

Deb

|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1152?t=12&akid=5892%2E400544%2EOuGYjF)
---
| | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1102?t=13&akid=5892%2E400544%2EOuGYjF)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?&t=14&akid=5892%2E400544%2EOuGYjF)
[**Update Your Information**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/?&t=15&akid=5892%2E400544%2EOuGYjF)
[**Unsubscribe**](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?&t=16&akid=5892%2E400544%2EOuGYjF)
Email us: info@debhaaland.com
**PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: The Department of War is coming after me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.
| The Department of War is coming after me because they don’t like what I have to say. [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97440?t=6&akid=22085%2E878179%2EZf5JZ8) When I was 22 years old, I swore an oath to the Constitution. I've upheld that oath every day since.

If Trump is trying to intimidate me from doing my job, it won’t work.

I’ve given too much to this country to be silenced by bullies who care more about their own power than about protecting the Constitution.

Call this what it is: **Political persecution.**

You can bet this was ordered by Donald Trump and carried out by Pete Hegseth. But right now, that's besides the point.

[**The point is that I need you to chip in whatever you can afford to the Voter Protection Project and me so we have the resources necessary to fight back against what comes next.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97440?t=7&akid=22085%2E878179%2EZf5JZ8) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mark Kelly and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97441?t=8&akid=22085%2E878179%2EZf5JZ8)

Mark Kelly

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. We defied expectations by building a campaign powered by working people – not party bosses, not corporate PACs.

And over these past three years, I’ve tried to honor that trust every single day by showing up and listening, and fighting for our shared values: lowering costs, supporting our veterans, protecting our forests, and keeping government honest and transparent.

But national groups think they can buy this seat out from under us. They’re pouring in money early because they know this will be one of the toughest, most closely watched races in the country.

[Let’s prove once again that they’re counting us out too soon. name: Mark Kelly
subject: I won’t give up on our country
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.
#

Folks, as you read this, I’m getting ready to go on Jimmy Kimmel’s show.
This has been quite a week for our country. I’m grateful Jimmy’s giving me the opportunity to speak about what’s been happening over the past several days.
If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. Because now, the FBI has asked to question me and other members of Congress.
All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear.
If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it.
I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.
There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None.
If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming.
And if you’d be willing to help support me as we gear up to fight back against the attacks coming our way from Donald Trump and his Administration, please:
[**Make a donation. It would mean a lot to me.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov25-dod/.t5EZ4X&refcode=em251125-3-1mil&t=1&akid=6261%2E6688874%2EZL14P_)

Thank you,
Mark

name: AMAC Action
subject: American elections should be decided by American citizens
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztd80t20uoqaau5kqrqulvcitetemat3l4dmoid0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1chim2o76cjh2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3okmvq42760s3rgilcub5749pqcrlta6fbeaasg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1chim2o76cjh2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z19j743rmi24vv537ep0ga2rmsdisgq8lbcl8vkg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1chim2o76cjh2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj2eqs69349bpk18q16pkd9ek3b2d7mj1njm2ldg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1chim2o76cjh2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrchdel49g36kt6c1sdacsfmilhvjiov4b7j4a40_rp22sh2s8i6eor1chim2o76cjh2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsbmnsm2841895b199lnledlm44noqmevu1f6u58_rp22sh2s8i6eor1chim2o76cjh2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. body:
Would you trade $5 for kicking out Lauren Boebert from Congress? With MTG gone, now is our chance to scare away another one of the absolute worst people to ever serve in the U.S. Congress.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WYs_TBBY2OXJK_V0jhITDpSzvYzR6HOqB_KnOYSkssnndbBulHJMBY6dapJ08CiBwo1Ui6Y1gMuVakOXFa9kiS0PsozBgS1HVDL3QkefUeGUbBY5_kf14cmMZBjSoccVcqKZAE5zTI8ToQWVciy3PzkHsxyxd1Cv8unwdc5v6M1gvYouVw3eEBU5hwQOB6FYsdFiOGBXeUIoC2sVWO6YPqML7Z_14VRG&c=MQ9PuoP483bX9T5rIwXP5oAK0yiYKp-IsUVdCA1ELXPzs4UY7pY1Pw==&ch=yt9-Dx_FpvY1H0LqvbOVOCqU-NWMaWtmymNizcZV7-0RWCqWf9vOwA==)
---
|

Peter,
The ultra MAGA extremist caucus just lost one of its loudest members: Marjorie Taylor Greene announced that she is resigning from Congress in January.
With MTG gone, now is our moment to fire another one of the absolute worst people to ever serve in the U.S. Congress: Lauren Boebert.
MTG's resignation shows that when the odds are stacked against them, the loudest MAGA voices in the room get real quiet real fast. These people are cowards, and cowards run away from a fair fight when they see that they might lose.

With MTG gone, now is our chance to scare away another one of the absolute worst people to ever serve in the U.S. Congress. | | | | | == | Peter, The ultra MAGA extremist caucus just lost one of its loudest members: Marjorie Taylor Greene announced that she is resigning from Congress in January. With MTG gone, now is our moment to fire another one of the absolute worst people to ever serve in the U.S. Congress: Lauren Boebert. MTG's resignation shows that when the odds are stacked against them, the loudest MAGA voices in the room get real quiet real fast. These people are cowards, and cowards run away from a fair fight when they see that they might lose. And now, it's Lauren Boebert's turn. | == is only in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024 when labor leader Trisha Calvarese and Lauren Boebert faced off, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts whereas Boebert massively underperformed Trump in every county. Trisha outraised Boebert 5:1 in the most recent FEC report. Boebert's campaign is practically broke and she is ready to throw in the towel--but it's on us to turn up the heat to show her that if she insists on running again, Trisha will beat her next November. If we work hard enough and post massive fundraising numbers, there's a good chance that Boebert will see the writing on the wall and do like MTG: resign early or retire before the election. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Thank you, Team Trisha | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

body:
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C6MZ1OXnFRzfPquZ4zydRw2SohRQ4WFYoEm8ThfHpp3Gse9sfzZAPYLEd7iIQCB7-9uFrJZvZMR8YdvQ3ePbGIhmfCtNw1GOcISm5l3sELgGmMSkEzqop27JSKiTi1Y4kDmis6qiGR7-sxWDdTwLS3a7NPGpsNjdBdeHWA3elvb9KCwyR-0An-dWyJPetw8ZOyQlJge6JcEyyQKaLDz2u0sK-3TrLunu&c=kuYb-r61mJrlG3BjU1ygc2fhWdYBY8kwJHvjeGhO8BInJqrbThGicw==&ch=xmebmrAPjncuGcm_yOz4utEdLLkJiReyFvD9g3f-H-Y9O-d0DqYFkA==)

|
Peter,
A defining moment is unfolding in Illinois' 9th District -- and I need your help. I'm running to succeed Rep. Jan Schakowsky in one of the bluest and most diverse districts in the country.
I'm 27, an elected official, an activist, and a community organizer. I was the first woman of my generation elected to public office. With over 7 years of service, I'm ready to bring a rare combination of youth and experience to Congress.

---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C6MZ1OXnFRzfPquZ4zydRw2SohRQ4WFYoEm8ThfHpp3Gse9sfzZAPYLEd7iIQCB7-9uFrJZvZMR8YdvQ3ePbGIhmfCtNw1GOcISm5l3sELgGmMSkEzqop27JSKiTi1Y4kDmis6qiGR7-sxWDdTwLS3a7NPGpsNjdBdeHWA3elvb9KCwyR-0An-dWyJPetw8ZOyQlJge6JcGGOaeizIzGzshU63aDa6CB&c=kuYb-r61mJrlG3BjU1ygc2fhWdYBY8kwJHvjeGhO8BInJqrbThGicw==&ch=xmebmrAPjncuGcm_yOz4utEdLLkJiReyFvD9g3f-H-Y9O-d0DqYFkA==)
---
|
But powerful forces are trying to stop me.
MAGA billionaires and AIPAC have poured hundreds of thousands of dollars into this race to handpick their preferred candidate and buy a seat in a district they don't live in. I'm now one of the top-funded candidates and a frontrunner -- but I cannot match that kind of money without people like you standing with me.
If you believe IL-09 deserves someone homegrown, someone who knows this community, someone who will fight for everyone who calls it home -- I'm asking you to step up.
[Will you rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever is meaningful to you to help me defeat the MAGA billionaires and AIPAC donors trying to buy this seat?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C6MZ1OXnFRzfPquZ4zydRw2SohRQ4WFYoEm8ThfHpp3Gse9sfzZAPYLEd7iIQCB7ekQLXb-66WPE2OC9PeLB8VE_BNgmpomeVyn5o6e-aLTVkza_vxJzhLiOohhGfY5Do476a3b0n9LZ33XWkU1Yb6t04iQFIkpzPwE_OnsFO91e0SqXorn1ZCrnMtc8_9I4TIs3v3tSKmYP_v6tDeXfPjfLXxk8Dey6ZGugdUFy3Fk=&c=kuYb-r61mJrlG3BjU1ygc2fhWdYBY8kwJHvjeGhO8BInJqrbThGicw==&ch=xmebmrAPjncuGcm_yOz4utEdLLkJiReyFvD9g3f-H-Y9O-d0DqYFkA==)

name: Troy Downing
subject: ALERT: Democrat Senators Face Court-Martial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
This is a dangerous line they should have never crossed

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-yurfFtmsIEo1iL__w)Peter,

Democrat Senators did something that should absolutely ENRAGE every patriot: They released a video openly urging our men and women in uniform to IGNORE orders from their Commander-in-Chief.[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-_1iIbCqRS5Q)Let that sink in.

The same liberal elites who spent years screaming about “insurrection” and “threats to democracy” are now encouraging our troops to undermine the military’s chain of command. This is reckless and irresponsible.
These senators aren’t clueless freshmen; they’re long-time members of the Senate Armed Services and Intelligence Committees.
They know what happens when you sow doubt and disobedience inside our military. And they’re doing it on purpose.
[Peter, should these Democrat Senators be tried for TREASON?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[YES — LOCK THEM UP
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._hpeUrgrjqQVtfAw_DPXw)[NO — LET THEM GET AWAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)America cannot afford leaders who undermine our national security. These Senators are counting on your silence, but patriots must make their voices heard NOW.
Stand up, speak out, and show that Americans will never tolerate an attack on our military or our Commander-in-Chief. [Take our 5-second poll today.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

Thank you for your patriotic support,

Team Downing| |

name: Unite4Freedom
subject: 🎯 11.26.25 Happy Thanksgiving!
body:
This Thanksgiving, let’s give thanks for
|
---
Dear Peter, **This Thanksgiving, let’s give thanks for those we cherish and for the values that keep our nation strong.** All of us at Unite4Freedom express our gratitude for the volunteers who have tirelessly dedicated their time, talents, and treasures to the effort of restoring valid elections and legitimate representation to our country. Your unwavering dedication to sharing truth strengthens our resolve and fuels our mission. We are making significant progress, and it is because of your work and support. Thank you!
##
Reminder: There will be no U4F Tactical Training Thursday, November 27. **_Our Next Tactical Training—_**** _Planning and Preparing a Unite4Freedom Presentation—_** _will be held Thursday, December 4, 2025_ _at_ 8pm EST/7pm CST/5pm PST This session is a basic bootcamp for explaining the Unite4Freedom story to your audience. We’ll go through the Unite4Freedom PowerPoint template that helps you plan your own presentation. We’ll cover how to present key information about our organization, select impactful data from our resources, and complete your presentation with a clear call to action. Together we win. Unite4Freedom—join us to keep building our momentum!
## Wishing you a beautiful and blessed Thanksgiving.
With Gratitude,
---
## Harry Haury, Chairman of the Board, [Unite4Freedom](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VVHMW07bV7ZNW2wbwQN7fm92mW8cYYgJ5GlflYN72QT-63m2nnW6N1vHY6lZ3pgW2j1H9S5P5c0gW2P2J6l8pj0SRW7XYsX0170kx-W7ZRXLc3KYR61W4PQVss1wvBlmW1k-4FL6l3YRPW2fmkP44ZNN9BW1wF-C83nh3XXW5vHZHt38mZ0BW97nBNL9dX4nsW1Fjcwy7r6bbWW6pDJGY1HyM6QW4DtYyt1h_DfjW8hb8ZK5V-YbdW596nFt76Dn34W26P6G-8RK5Z6W66YGc42Rpw8nVjq7yz1mt0flW3FXZGX7ShmXZTbjZV8h5xYLW40Q6z67NKGkNW8y4s365khPg3f1G0BhP04)

Hey Friend,

As you might have seen, Trump appointed the first-ever "Crypto Czar" to his cabinet.

And his first move?

Creating a strategic Bitcoin reserve for America.

But here's what the media missed:

The executive order specifically mentions "
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=848ef018cb9a7ddf398dfa713aaf9f21abe4d9a08d4e90a9b40c8e8256e9dca29c63d77843d9b234d449f1bc28b8932dfc84c840047757f1b48e9b4d69ed309c
native digital asset markets " as critical infrastructure.

Translation: The government knows about the hidden market where crypto trades 80% cheaper.

And they're positioning NOW.

Three things are happening behind closed doors:

1. The treasury is exploring Native Market access for the strategic reserve
2. Wall Street was given "unofficial approval" to access these markets
3. Regulatory framework is coming that could lock out retail forever
The window for regular investors?

Maybe 60 days. Maybe less.

Once the government and institutions control native market access, the 100x opportunities disappear.

Forever.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=848ef018cb9a7ddf398dfa713aaf9f21abe4d9a08d4e90a9b40c8e8256e9dca29c63d77843d9b234d449f1bc28b8932dfc84c840047757f1b48e9b4d69ed309c
Watch this video to see how to access the Native Markets (before the door closes) →

Tan Gera, CFA

P.S. When JD Vance said "crypto will make America rich again"...

He wasn't talking about buying Bitcoin on Coinbase. He was talking about THIS.
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=848ef018cb9a7ddf398dfa713aaf9f21abe4d9a08d4e90a9b40c8e8256e9dca29c63d77843d9b234d449f1bc28b8932dfc84c840047757f1b48e9b4d69ed309c
