name: Chair Carnevale
subject: Like a broken record, Beacon Hill is helping Gov. Healey dodge responsibility 😣
body:
$2,300,000,000 in additional spending...
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jjZw9jykPbVzo_8LbBxZm7WGhbKma81GmqW-NjGS7bjAtBZDEvjMP_yhH8RZ8leGOmQKOsrDiP0LLx5OenYD9-90hl966tf817lRci35uzdK7r9FdW6UIcoauIxR_kqd2Blmy0Pa28tQmZZOu_DpRg==&c=KKKg7LFwIHMuFWFwlRtSePBwElHIiSqFjq8h2A4M8Kcj9_xAovxsIA==&ch=FIDXG3x5IKRze7DXXC5ZRxMubpWCcfZY_e_GEi7HTrKwkOyqt3i9pA==)
---
| Dear Peter,
This Thanksgiving, families are making heartbreaking choices: turning down the heat, cutting back on groceries, and sacrificing to put turkey on the table.
And while you struggle, Beacon Hill Democrats are busy doing what they do best: Protecting Gov. Maura Healey. Dodging responsibility. And sticking you with the bill.
Instead of standing up for the taxpayers, Beacon Hill Democrats are serving Gov. Healey a heaping plate of political excuses [costing another ](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jjZw9jykPbVzo_8LbBxZm7WGhbKma81GmqW-NjGS7bjAtBZDEvjMP0n13rGvOwnF-3BlSaaa8Q9kwXb7ptG_lOeJNcpwd9IHJSRyUJeXdZFg0A5xsDAwidXBn0rDch8HWgqTv-Ea17ED4mFisr9-kLBl63bmYqVnPW30kjgrNoLSULG4ispjHwG6L8n4Ih4VvXhs-w3e_AzP2zXrUImRG4jPyFITGkhDRteDkeId4UUoMdraKScIog==&c=KKKg7LFwIHMuFWFwlRtSePBwElHIiSqFjq8h2A4M8Kcj9_xAovxsIA==&ch=FIDXG3x5IKRze7DXXC5ZRxMubpWCcfZY_e_GEi7HTrKwkOyqt3i9pA==)[$2.3 ](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jjZw9jykPbVzo_8LbBxZm7WGhbKma81GmqW-NjGS7bjAtBZDEvjMP0n13rGvOwnF-3BlSaaa8Q9kwXb7ptG_lOeJNcpwd9IHJSRyUJeXdZFg0A5xsDAwidXBn0rDch8HWgqTv-Ea17ED4mFisr9-kLBl63bmYqVnPW30kjgrNoLSULG4ispjHwG6L8n4Ih4VvXhs-w3e_AzP2zXrUImRG4jPyFITGkhDRteDkeId4UV8p6u1fj7SXQ==&c=KKKg7LFwIHMuFWFwlRtSePBwElHIiSqFjq8h2A4M8Kcj9_xAovxsIA==&ch=FIDXG3x5IKRze7DXXC5ZRxMubpWCcfZY_e_GEi7HTrKwkOyqt3i9pA==)[BILLION](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jjZw9jykPbVzo_8LbBxZm7WGhbKma81GmqW-NjGS7bjAtBZDEvjMP0n13rGvOwnF-3BlSaaa8Q9kwXb7ptG_lOeJNcpwd9IHJSRyUJeXdZFg0A5xsDAwidXBn0rDch8HWgqTv-Ea17ED4mFisr9-kLBl63bmYqVnPW30kjgrNoLSULG4ispjHwG6L8n4Ih4VvXhs-w3e_AzP2zXrUImRG4jPyFITGkhDRteDkeId4UWNvjQgmFLJsw==&c=KKKg7LFwIHMuFWFwlRtSePBwElHIiSqFjq8h2A4M8Kcj9_xAovxsIA==&ch=FIDXG3x5IKRze7DXXC5ZRxMubpWCcfZY_e_GEi7HTrKwkOyqt3i9pA==).
While you're scraping together dollars for heating oil, Beacon Hill is scraping the bottom of the barrel for ways to cover for Gov. Healey's failed leadership.
Massachusetts cannot spend our way out of every crisis.
If Republicans don't push back now, the insiders will keep coasting while families like yours and mine pay the price.
Leadership on Beacon Hill counts on people staying quiet. They count on frustration turning into resignation.
But we can prove them wrong.
By chipping in today, right now, whether $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can spare, you send a clear message: This isn't how government should work. This isn't leadership. No one gets off the hook.
---
| | [STAND UP TO THE DEMOCRAT'S EXCUSES: DONATE NOW](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jjZw9jykPbVzo_8LbBxZm7WGhbKma81GmqW-NjGS7bjAtBZDEvjMP04HA5dVL4KsUNNh_sd0FjWZy5_Zg7jFCAckz8HZ-Gb5AyjrIgszg7FDeIEyL5SwayitGJyD5hKJdpiwsnfE4B8zrzYL9iTsdhrQ-4JYJEQKRs3i9CQuso_4q9K8KRmnH2TXqha9NbXNrV4JV-r0HIY=&c=KKKg7LFwIHMuFWFwlRtSePBwElHIiSqFjq8h2A4M8Kcj9_xAovxsIA==&ch=FIDXG3x5IKRze7DXXC5ZRxMubpWCcfZY_e_GEi7HTrKwkOyqt3i9pA==)
---
| Beacon Hill may hope no one notices. But the voters do.
---
| [STAND UP TO THE DEMOCRAT'S EXCUSES: DONATE NOW](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jjZw9jykPbVzo_8LbBxZm7WGhbKma81GmqW-NjGS7bjAtBZDEvjMP04HA5dVL4KsUNNh_sd0FjWZy5_Zg7jFCAckz8HZ-Gb5AyjrIgszg7FDeIEyL5SwayitGJyD5hKJdpiwsnfE4B8zrzYL9iTsdhrQ-4JYJEQKRs3i9CQuso_4q9K8KRmnH3-45t0mYAxKTmhdHJ_d-wc=&c=KKKg7LFwIHMuFWFwlRtSePBwElHIiSqFjq8h2A4M8Kcj9_xAovxsIA==&ch=FIDXG3x5IKRze7DXXC5ZRxMubpWCcfZY_e_GEi7HTrKwkOyqt3i9pA==)

name: info
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (FEC COMMITTEE ID C00153031)
body:
| | | | Thankful for faith, family, and the traditions that keep us grounded
---
---
---
Dear Friends,
Thanksgiving is one of my favorite times of the year.
It’s a day to slow down, gather close, and thank God for the blessings in our lives — the people we love, the freedoms we cherish, and the traditions that remind us who we are.
I’m thankful for families around kitchen tables, for conversations that stretch into the evening, for laughter that fills a home, and for prayers spoken quietly over a shared meal. Those simple moments are the heartbeat of this holiday — and they are the foundation of the communities we build together.
This year, I am especially grateful for the [_spirit of determination and hope rising across Oregon_](https://u56485850.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.5zzgRGClB3Mh9j4Ybq0Xmn6kFRT6CDD4LQIEVCj3cnJJ7hptWLdF6-2FkfVYMWUR4HuBh4-2FHN1SB9WQqyiOydphu3f8Qo51JIyr0rMkbefBH4-3DLbHf_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVCKy-2B-2B58EQo9OBZ1DFkEmwuM7vQygzizVvxKmA-2F9J-2FE19DrCJBiChnWEt1YTcce0486aCCtakNmtIV2Bwhjynf9Hi6ChikaWGsW2E-2FoTBQUw4FaVNuhIOYcdQZxIy4z769j5dQCoT75cq-2FZuG-2FnRexuSX5nvjb0061mbAS94WJlJtVmyi2b5XfHq8KB0ZTbSRZ-2B8tJIUbCdmWmINPRDe8pJbJch57oXaHq6dddyNe92cL0D3QAhO-2F5xaKigJ9yMAvpwgEGLLEakl1hqsZ8T4mzR403y9wIxwtSLhZ1GMy4PMo6TKLFoget6OZGJLArkA6TlnMFXpkd-2BoFXVbbi8aW8uQFantOSs1ZwCvUAGPaext92yFKxJUidA3kQZ10C471NMeV6hJEEUskLJsT2TY2Cwoq82uSQ1i-2B6bg-2B4sdfyOdbL64RdRczDztqakoRP3mrhY2yz5nTMT6JBmpjcOMn6ZkcQDNaA7lXgCL0v7RFuOoRyHFWif2bSqzPoucXMsTsrtQK5h1fLx-2FfJfM07Y5ARsHhaRm-2BOgT4YzfjHtyhZass-2B3w5RJjD5j8lff7apgjAhxDd-2B-2FBu-2Fgc74RkqaJYGFS3Hqn2PyaMR8IkzJVTRI8aDEzMeHTMbf-2B8py-2BwRh4bR3EIbKzmA1SCbQmgj6QIN8fCvDjjSdeE7b4mGOKfjaPD8jaaO6txvm2oAj6sqAs21msPKdRQqfIa2CCx2IIzeLDLBIla3lFuB-2BcuJy9D3sdsLZcTHQfNfjo4U-2FvUBbh9ATHW1FSXSVNL-2FF8h4O1NULEXR3EBvvHtwaX6Xs-2BhXbGYgbfgMz0U62rBIuc5oZj7Cjf1-2F0dIoUSlfnZMjTyFELwkGoUupx9oDAsQF18u2OLmjRldvDSSVrzyMd55a6cev4-2Bf5B92S1f121HA5CoepRQ). We are seeing extraordinary energy, unity, and momentum as Oregonians stand up for fiscal responsibility and common-sense leadership. Volunteers across all 36 counties are working tirelessly, gathering signatures at an incredible pace, and proving that when we come together, we can make a difference.
I am inspired by every one of you who believes Oregon’s best days are ahead — and I look forward to continuing this work shoulder-to-shoulder with you as we fight for victories in 2026 and restore balance and accountability to our state.
No matter where you are or who you’re with this Thanksgiving, I hope your day is full of warmth, good food, and the kind of gratitude that stays with you long after the dishes are done.
May the Lord bless you and your family today and always.
Happy Thanksgiving,
Connie Whelchel
Chair, Oregon Republican Party

clean_body: | | | | Thankful for faith, family, and the traditions that keep us grounded Dear Friends, Thanksgiving is one of my favorite times of the year. It’s a day to slow down, gather close, and thank God for the blessings in our lives — the people we love, the freedoms we cherish, and the traditions that remind us who we are. I’m thankful for families around kitchen tables, for conversations that stretch into the evening, for laughter that fills a home, and for prayers spoken quietly over a shared meal. Those simple moments are the heartbeat of this holiday — and they are the foundation of the communities we build together. This year, I am especially grateful for the . We are seeing extraordinary energy, unity, and momentum as Oregonians stand up for fiscal responsibility and common-sense leadership. Volunteers across all 36 counties are working tirelessly, gathering signatures at an incredible pace, and proving that when we come together, we can make a difference. I am inspired by every one of you who believes Oregon’s best days are ahead — and I look forward to continuing this work shoulder-to-shoulder with you as we fight for victories in 2026 and restore balance and accountability to our state. No matter where you are or who you’re with this Thanksgiving, I hope your day is full of warmth, good food, and the kind of gratitude that stays with you long after the dishes are done. May the Lord bless you and your family today and always. Happy Thanksgiving, Connie Whelchel Chair, Oregon Republican Party | | PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (FEC COMMITTEE ID C00153031) 732 HAWTHORNE AVE. NE, SALEM, OR 97301. # Wednesday, November 26, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1789, the [first Thanksgiving was celebrated ](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFyhCAUgOHTYLcOPAFNQZHGbtOmdAg89EVWd-Cps7fPJFfIBf5_5vu8T3dPmbb5wz_QcdqnDa-akRnLdKzF04ZfPqz1iT5gRJ_5KOsEEsxNqRvYKXrKr0k30SVEwK5Bp3qrlTEShmZxfbBKmRQh2CHYZJSJ8CZVDGZIEnXfkPutKQVWKdlp25qAEjszdNogmgRCS4zEe2m_d9p4wZRf-4mlDfujyW5hflbRvQsYBYzXdbW-hIVOrO28nwLGjDPV7JlOFDAm9HwUrAJGXvy21plO2uamuPi8KGeqthdazg9P-e_A_2I5HfwEAAD__1Lsd70)by proclamation of President George Washington. The date of the holiday varied each year until 1863, when President Abraham Lincoln proclaimed that Thanksgiving would always fall on the last Thursday of November. In 1941, Congress anchored it to the 4th Thursday of November—which is tomorrow. This week’s _Wisdom Wednesday_ features a study that found [positive romantic connections](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdI7wYJOkcLENXbbdEk3sIXhjbGQPQfz9E_mF1x1pRkf33n-P8YEhhvT6iwtZnvKYaK-RmKmM27tgSPRE964roSNPGHkr7xFaMFIpCf3oMcRj1I23ExFQ15BV114rY1q4NbNF5Vs0pJ27Q--fztxAOY-k8Q54vWMT7GlTCnql2k73F-Oopc7cOm2IzARCt-QD53L5n0PimaZ45A-Vi8tLE-3MvFbR_REwCBjSsebK50nAcIoFDEp9WcAwnwXmE_IuUcbAHEmWvGByJB0miY43jPGQ56s88lbknrfkq5ywMhUBQ1OsX_cQY6j9Vej2tWCI3zD8qwU_Fn4CAAD__6s6hPw) can actually help physical wounds heal more quickly. As we head into Thanksgiving, it’s a good reminder that the relationships around us have real, tangible power. If you’ve been feeling drained for reasons you can’t explain, this Flyover-endorsed deep dive into the “superfood mistake”—and how today's sponsor, [Vital Reds](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykVN2OszYQfRrnLpF_MIELLtLSfIratNX-tOoVGvDAemMMsU3YvH0F2k0226266sflzDlz5hxG_nNf7EEbbZtfocUs1F1hcfQGQ0BXDAcH2mIJ1cH3CBUqBBMGdyg45XLJ2JLHhQJtzkW0UFmNyFEsMGPrOGJSUp4snrKySup0ncg0SSNZ8YqLpCyrVAohkqhK-UJn0zTGeMwYFVG8khVSFDIRkUSUNScRRaVD51bPnbbhCWtz7k7oVlXXLkz2FELvidgQviV8O46jWKFF15whgD1DgxOO8O1JK-y4pCmLoejLAnoitp3TDb706HSLNoD5zemGiDy4AQmPoe2J-MEH7InI2b8X6sFaNPcPv-8UETnQ4x8dnT6Q5x_z3eavC3CS873R4QF90LbZzsSdepUFOr4y5SF5_OUjc9BvwJMOYBwqX5y88QFcKCZnXHxQ0l-crPw75OkVed88y7vd5u4G2YK2_9j66vfb48-7Db9h_PQS0NnPo33f3-X_Pa-Z_qyuHp2ZQ_j4Q5dfy8VCi5cg_-eM0oF9C-DbYJU7Ey453ecXVDl4bdH7YrA6zLZoHc221CEJFqC8QC0RuSpD5S6VIbRFBW0PupmaTauWqryutlQltmYJxiyPx-OnrEJPt7imTIyzKG92-3zzLssJ3KLSQ0tEXvVw0_Dd4CokIscWtLle_lBqxabbp5WqSwbxuhYRljQpZVRTJSkowDXDWwYnIo9SeVsU83oiva3KSfOErjbdeO2g97qzsyPJ1kymcSIjmS5cpvpRG6N9vCYRna7TzM9C-K637JTxvwMAAP__yJ-o-g), helps boost energy and support gut health—is worth a look.

## Ukraine Signs on to U.S. Peace Plan
Ukraine and the United States announced that [they’ve reached a “common understanding”](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O6yAUxfHVQEcElw_bBcVr3OW1U1rYXMdMsEFAEnn3o0Szg6mP9Jd-5-s6XV2I4bj9dzvatqbpwFeN2BqW6XEvLhw4u-VeM7oFPbrYHuU-AQfNhGBgJu9CPCdFvV0RASVFKzqjhNYcerrZDlbpZjkM3vN57r3vvelgMHIYxCyFp8G-a0KAEYJLZS56QY5S91JpRL0CURx9aKlcvlM42oZrPNMTy2VJO412ay1XIv8RGAmMbcMtxPjeCIw5xbCcBEaPKx4VCYzagFCDYL849oGxXFJO1UXWymPP7IYHPh2BkRbr8yvEGKrpiOK33YVPnLY_vfW08BMAAP__q6l-RA) on a draft peace agreement aimed at ending the war with Russia, following intensive talks in Geneva over the weekend. The initial proposal consisted of 28 points, but the draft was substantially revised to include 19 points and adjusted to align more closely with Ukrainian interests—particularly in rejecting an acceptance of land seized by Russia. Russia says it hasn't seen the updated draft and warns it [may not accept any changes](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-SozAMBvCngU4ZLP4ECopr6PbaKxnFFok2xmZssVne_obcvcF2n0Yzn-anPx_zB4mXcP9NK4-6xDnwK3tW5TTvz0QS-Eb2mTcmy47J656eM1bYgjGA3exI_DE3pRsXZuS65NFcu8a0bYV9-RiXphvQuWa4ur5F6mm44q2vsRp62w-mK2U824zBzpiqbrpLa7niuu3rpmVuFyyaip1oTJfPKEEfvPgjfnG62LiWfnyobrmofxU4FTiFY4tZz1WB01lc4GTMmc_0isk7OIkFTv958KbB5ikAf29slR1ohBtD4s9_4-2AtOcsBF6e7A_gb-XgJNzhRQn2oOKBFuUE9pEk60oZSGGVIOu-Qo57snweLdPotpd4L7m7Fk11X0n8W6I_ev_XiH8DAAD__zQ_mzg)—a stance that, according to U.S. and European sources, makes rejection likely and could extend the war through the holidays.

President Trump said he would [meet with the leaders](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OozAUxfGnMR0RvmADhYtt6LLtlsjB1-Eu_kDmkoh5-lHmFaY-0k86_3_3-W4pUHr-tREN-zwnfB8BmbHM51YsJXzYZTt2tAs6tIHPss3QgKqlrEHPzlK45q5yxiMCthUa2etOKtXAUK2m196rcRh6uyyL7x9jr5VVfnRjAx7HoSLz0aQELWXTdvqmFmywVUPbKUTlQXQNOuJcbv8zJV7Rhyu_sNyWHKtgVub9EO0fAZOAiVdcKYTPJmBac8TPIQGTdZESHVwsU04CJqUBWpA1lzPu9RcGTMd2XfV-MqU6IjKlp4CpKsbtbwqBDt2LrnlGSz9-xb8K9jLwHQAA___znYB4) of Russia and Ukraine once the deal was finalized.
## Holiday Gas Prices Hit Five-Year Low
Gas prices are expected to [average $3.02 per gallon](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHSmzAQBp8GOnmQQIALijTu_rQpmUN84IvPEqOTTfz2mT-vkH5nZ2d_fc1fxMJx_0lPTGVLc8SpglKQ59cjE0csFB56gAJWkJRXfsyucd5Ya1w_r8Tymbt6nTbAoa0x2aHvrPeNG-v7dL0OHY00Lt664YpuwTIOW-NaPwZrA9U8fdusdb21Tdv1Fx_QoPVj23nAb67qGqxcUr78ThzLHZt80hv5EtKzluleyqFV-6Nyt8rdzvO8bOnP8lKOUP1mKncT3qDlI6jcrdwpPnTnN8fd7KTmyBygZiMRI-mEFiN4Q9QoxwBzUFzx5GAiKMvHtI3RQgVqFkg6TWt2EkmxztN6nCzC2g9V1-xPYvkXWf7r7HtyfwMAAP__gg-Qww) on Thanksgiving, matching last year and marking the lowest holiday prices since the pandemic in 2020, according to forecasts. Nearly 30 states now boast [average prices below $3](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLturDAURb_GdEZ-YB6Fi3sV0U3alOiMfYATPBjZHkb8fTT5hdRb2lprfd2mG1CgffmEB9oyx2nHVw5YCqbpuSWgHe_gtnwgOPQIoTzTNimhDJeSq3byQOGamsrbGVGhrtDKrm2kMUL11WrRiQ4GgH7oZq-9n40QWhvh3d3MsvMV2feblKqVUuimrY1Dgdr0ujGIZlasEeipxFR_R9rLinO44ompdvFRBbuWcmSm_zE1MjXC3b0N6iW-Z6bG_89MO-bM1LhA5kcih5mH-MJceMATA2_4hZAyhxXB87LCvuWFTtoXpsZcYrqYHskz_SFV18tBDF2VrD9eFALltmONWB5A4Reo_KniadVPAAAA__-aYoba) per gallon, with Oklahoma leading the nation at $2.50 while California tops out at $4.63. The decline comes as nearly 82 million Americans are expected to travel at least 50 miles from home over the holiday weekend, setting a record high for Thanksgiving travel. Analysts expect prices to drop even further below $3 nationally by Christmas as refineries complete maintenance and winter demand softens. See [current gas prices in your state here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHSmzAQBp8GOnmQQIALijTu_rQpmUN84IvPEqOTTfz2mT-vkH5nZ2d_fc1fxMJx_0lPTGVLc8SpglKQ59cjE0csFB56gAJWkJRXfsyucd5Ya1w_r8Tymbt6nTbAoa0x2aHvrPeNG-v7dL0OHY00Lt664YpuwTIOW-NaPwZrA9U8fdusdb21Tdv1Fx_QoPVj23nAb67qGqxcUr78ThzLHZt80hv5EtKzluleyqFV-6Nyt8rdzvO8bOnP8lKOUP1mKncT3qDlI6jcrdwpPnTnN8fd7KTmyBygZiMRI-mEFiN4Q9QoxwBzUFzx5GAiKMvHtI3RQgVqFkg6TWt2EkmxztN6nCzC2g9V1-xPYvkXWf7r7HtyfwMAAP__gg-Qww).
## Thanksgiving Weekend Football Fest
Thanksgiving weekend will be jam-packed with major NFL and college football matchups, including one of college football’s biggest rivalries—The Game—[pitting No. 1 Ohio State against Michigan](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQhZ8GOiJ77DFQuLhNutx2SzSxB5iN-ZFxEuXtV-wrbHl0pHP0fV-34UaSZJ3-08K-jNuw8vtIXArn4fnIJCvfKTyOnSlwZErlmR8DKMBG6wbcEEnSZ7B19CMzsKnZ69ZZjaigq2eP3X00vWaFNoLujeuNs0pR2zprlDa1-HNNa3BaK2PdBQMrNtgZi8w4QmUVRylbvnxvspaZx_TZXpwvYVvq5OdS9qMy_yq4VnCl_QQ4qzPkIiFxBddtlq05ChVuFgmzTLQ2Ey3cRPo0iKh4BAeRA3Vt6CkitsbckceW-77OPu5vSUkO11ZWTQtJ-n0vf1L28vATAAD__0Q7fUA) on Saturday, a matchup Ohio hasn’t won since 2019. On Thanksgiving Day itself, the NFL kicks off a triple-header with the Detroit Lions playing the Green Bay Packers, followed by the Dallas Cowboys taking on the Kansas City Chiefs. The evening ends with the Cincinnati Bengals facing off against the Baltimore Ravens in an AFC North showdown. [See the schedule here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL0O3SAMhZ-GbLkCB_IzMHTJdrt2jNxgEnoJREBulLev6Ct08ifZ-nx0fr2XNzrvwvYTD9LFxiXQnT2VQmm5PgldoN-4fvJJuJIh9OVKnwU4qFaIFvrFoPPPIhujLRFQ15AWQy-FUhzGZtdophEmA0irITtZbmHoJoXrNBrCXjZOV5sQ0AvBO9m_1EqcOjV2UhEpC0xyMq7E9PoTXSg7Wf_EL6XXGo_G672UM7PuB4OZwXzf9-vKWKLBpx4wmHOJ6anzjKlkBnOwnsFcvzKYhahcqewYPnlzXxe2NljfbnhQbu89tqfHJ7d53clcntri6qIQHlU3Dl0vOxCcDwzmJmlz3s57l_uBSb4d6Py_qOW_-v1q-BsAAP__v7uN-Q). On Friday, college football’s [big rivalry week](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGvpCAURn8Ndhi4gI4FxTZ2s-2W5gpXZWXEIDNk_v3LvPp1r_6-nJycf_fpjiGGY_2LD7JlSdNB9YpUCuXpuWcMB83o9uskdOQJY3nmfQIBhkvJoZs8hviedOPtQgSkGrKy77Q0RsCt2axS5N2sUSENbvZ6xhlF7wfoxSCNdE2wH5qU0EkplO5a40iQMjelDZFZgGlBPpSU2_8pHGWjJb7Ti3Lr0qOJdivlvJj6w2BkMNZaW7rO4zMyGF2KkVbiS0plxhgZjFdJ-c1gnBiMwTMYdS96pfvhhzuvRDuXimdyePK6USbuNkwXj8-8h2NtsvVnDTGGq-uZFusDQ_w2K7_K-bLwFQAA___5AInT) ramps up with Ole Miss facing Mississippi State amid uncertainty about the future of Ole Miss head coach Lane Kiffin. Other highlights include Georgia taking on Georgia Tech, and Texas A&M locking horns with rival Texas. On Saturday, Ohio State travels north to Michigan as it tries to beat the Wolverines for the first time in nearly six years. The last time the Buckeyes lost to Michigan while being top-ranked was Nov. 22, 1969. [See the full college schedule](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1ugzAUhZ8GNiP_kmTw0CVbunZExr6GWy44sg0ob1-lc7eu5xwdffq-HsPDIeE2fboVbI1p2OAsBLVCHvYlO9xgdH4pT3AeAjiqe14GyaVhQjDZD8EhvQbdBhsBJKgWrLj0WhjD5bWdrQpy1H7015vsnbpx2WuvzHvJ1WhupkX7fhNC9kJwpfvOeOCgzFVpA2CibDSHgDXl7jvhVmeI9EoH5M6ntSU71_osjfpo5L2R9_M8u4LvqpF3n4hgAhZTqqMj-iNiGQ9H-cVOgAW2wIqfIewELO5EjLBUliKb3AqFVVyB1YPhFlObbXieSISlvzSaT6tD-kWq__J4WPkTAAD__-aGiZ8).

clean_body: Ukraine and the United States announced that on a draft peace agreement aimed at ending the war with Russia, following intensive talks in Geneva over the weekend. | | | | - | | Wednesday, November 26, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1789, the proclamation of President George Washington. The date of the holiday varied each year until 1863, when President Abraham Lincoln proclaimed that Thanksgiving would always fall on the last Thursday of November. In 1941, Congress anchored it to the 4th Thursday of November—which is tomorrow. This week’s Wisdom Wednesday features a study that found can actually help physical wounds heal more quickly. As we head into Thanksgiving, it’s a good reminder that the relationships around us have real, tangible power. If you’ve been feeling drained for reasons you can’t explain, this Flyover-endorsed deep dive into the “superfood mistake”—and how today's sponsor, , helps boost energy and support gut health—is worth a look. | Ukraine Signs on to U.S. Peace Plan Ukraine and the United States announced that on a draft peace agreement aimed at ending the war with Russia, following intensive talks in Geneva over the weekend. The initial proposal consisted of 28 points, but the draft was substantially revised to include 19 points and adjusted to align more closely with Ukrainian interests—particularly in rejecting an acceptance of land seized by Russia. Russia says it hasn't seen the updated draft and warns it —a stance that, according to U.S. and European sources, makes rejection likely and could extend the war through the holidays. President Trump said he would of Russia and Ukraine once the deal was finalized. Holiday Gas Prices Hit Five-Year Low Gas prices are expected to on Thanksgiving, matching last year and marking the lowest holiday prices since the pandemic in 2020, according to forecasts. Nearly 30 states now boast per gallon, with Oklahoma leading the nation at $2.50 while California tops out at $4.63. The decline comes as nearly 82 million Americans are expected to travel at least 50 miles from home over the holiday weekend, setting a record high for Thanksgiving travel. Analysts expect prices to drop even further below $3 nationally by Christmas as refineries complete maintenance and winter demand softens. See . Thanksgiving Weekend Football Fest Thanksgiving weekend will be jam-packed with major NFL and college football matchups, including one of college football’s biggest rivalries—The Game— on Saturday, a matchup Ohio hasn’t won since 2019. On Thanksgiving Day itself, the NFL kicks off a triple-header with the Detroit Lions playing the Green Bay Packers, followed by the Dallas Cowboys taking on the Kansas City Chiefs. The evening ends with the Cincinnati Bengals facing off against the Baltimore Ravens in an AFC North showdown. . On Friday, college football’s ramps up with Ole Miss facing Mississippi State amid uncertainty about the future of Ole Miss head coach Lane Kiffin. Other highlights include Georgia taking on Georgia Tech, and Texas A&M locking horns with rival Texas. On Saturday, Ohio State travels north to Michigan as it tries to beat the Wolverines for the first time in nearly six years. The last time the Buckeyes lost to Michigan while being top-ranked was Nov. 22, 1969. . | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Tornado Hits Harris County, Stuck in a Mexican Prison, and Congested Roadways
body:
A tornado with winds over 110 mph touched down in northwest Harris County Monday, damaging more than 100 homes and [knocking out power](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGS2yAURb9G6vDAEwi5oEjjbtOm1DzBwzDBYgeeV-u_zyjOH6Q-c-_cc399rB-YS97vP_FBjr9jXXc6eiFmaivXtmOoKXNP2Fruvj53fnVeQYIRSgmY14C5vFY9BrfJcFUjOWVnrcxipBmT02hknDcgq6K0xmxo7RW9X6yeLEYaszvLlIJZgVQaLoAGo7mijxOQWqZBSwqZa7twIqZv7LG86he1i6-PsbjE_NmH6ccAtwFux3Fcfqf6POEAN2ycfaETEHKiNsDt7SLeMiLVZ-e6i3-yIuAD72cAFiM28DNMchNa6SD0tIBYFhtFmLYFbJjJ-jg2Fz6PXErusx20vD8wl7_b-P8e_XLwJwAA__8J5IoU) to more than 27,000 customers. No injuries have been reported.

| | |

| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykz72O6yAQxfGnsbtYzAAmLihuky633RLNwjhGIiaCydfbr7KvsMXpjn7S_-sczpRL3i__6cpeXmsNOz97YRFuQWrbKdUtS9-otdxjve_y7hJQoT0AHHAOiXJ5BzMm_63SAiN7cLMBe7TKjptXFnSa4-IiH5kXJoqaHMSVwKHVccz-gwHgDKjA4IRkabULxVUjw1EPRnHKUtskGwu_qK_lXR_cplivY_GbyK0P-t-ApwFPt1anS2OSeG_cP5cBT5-hWZzWbmw-3Z65lNxnNxh1uVIuv5L8rf_h8ScAAP__vf1vSQ) | |
# Wednesday, November 26, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1930, H.L. Hunt [purchased](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOgzAQRU8DHcgebBMKF9vQZdst0QSPgyXHjuzZEG6_IlfY6lX_6ev9XJcrhhjS_RsfZPnt85Jor5GYqSycS0KXt8B1w1JCXfNv4qPyAgJ0J2UHZnEY4rGo1tmbcJNsycrRKKkvWuh2s57EKoxXfkQaLmTQT-s4TVoIPd20UW2wp0xKMBKEVNADavR6wtUPQPIyNEqQC5xLzxsxvbH6eOQXlX7NjzbajflZm-GrgbmBed_3_rybUwyJ-lzuDcyfVefw6G7HiQZmSlxOAqi2WPfcQ4yhmrFR4v7AED9y_l-Sl4W_AAAA__9QRnZ5) Columbus Marion "Dad" Joiner's leases in the East Texas oilfield—including the Daisy Bradford No. 3—for $1 million. By 1932, he owned 900 oil wells in East Texas, and in 1948, he was the richest man in the United States. San Antonio Spurs legend Manu Ginobili faced off with a robot in a basketball shooting contest. ## Tornado Hits Harris County
A tornado with winds over 110 mph touched down in northwest Harris County Monday, damaging more than 100 homes and [knocking out power](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGS2yAURb9G6vDAEwi5oEjjbtOm1DzBwzDBYgeeV-u_zyjOH6Q-c-_cc399rB-YS97vP_FBjr9jXXc6eiFmaivXtmOoKXNP2Fruvj53fnVeQYIRSgmY14C5vFY9BrfJcFUjOWVnrcxipBmT02hknDcgq6K0xmxo7RW9X6yeLEYaszvLlIJZgVQaLoAGo7mijxOQWqZBSwqZa7twIqZv7LG86he1i6-PsbjE_NmH6ccAtwFux3Fcfqf6POEAN2ycfaETEHKiNsDt7SLeMiLVZ-e6i3-yIuAD72cAFiM28DNMchNa6SD0tIBYFhtFmLYFbJjJ-jg2Fz6PXErusx20vD8wl7_b-P8e_XLwJwAA__8J5IoU) to more than 27,000 customers. No injuries have been reported. A [funnel cloud](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO2zAQBNCvkToa2hVJSQWLNOoubUphRa6ORGjxQK6t898HDvIHqR8wmJlfH9sHpZzOz590ZyffR9lOvlpmEa6blHpSKDFJi1Rrar48Tnk12XBAowAU2i1Qyq9N98HtQ1igZweT1WBmM5g-Os-awJjDj5MdwWvyk6HF2mXRgTVAn9w7DAAt4AAab0iGDrOQP0ZkmMdODxySlHqTyMLf1I78Kk-uN1_ufXZR5Kt1448O1w7X67puv2N5vLHDlaokn_kNTBK5drj-m6XSqWJ5NCmneqbApcMVZ6NmRuTF7gqC3pXeaVfkZ1Tog-aBB7uD6asLX1fKOTU7dXr4vFPKf_vI_734dPgnAAD__x3uhZA) was spotted around 1:30 p.m. and touched down about 10 minutes later, [inflicting significant damage](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OgzAQhU8DnZE9gIHCxTbpsu2WaAzj2JLBkT0Jye1XrHKDbT89vb-f63zFEMN--8aNDL9cmnc6SiRmyjOnvOOafODiMedQlvTY-V14Bgm9UEqAnlcM8T139WqsXCdVk1GD7lQ_9rKvvQFy4EZLU6u0tVpLmAipVcMwLsrapQ7mNFMKtAKpOmgAe3T9hItrgdTYVp2kNXDKDXtiemFx8Z2elJslbXU0nvleqvargksFl-M4GpdeoH16FE77KToxIXvKFVw-XGAmFJ-FYk9P2ixlAZ0469TZrPcjxBiKHqpO3jYM8S-P__fS08BvAAAA___JoH3f) in the Spring and Klein areas. A building at the county's 44-acre [ESD 11 campus](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO8yAUhE-DO1vwACcuKP7GXf52Swub54AWgwUvcXL7Vay9wbYzmtF883WbbjbEkO7_7YaGXmueEh41IhGWiXJJ1mUfqHpbSqhLfiR6V5qAg26FaKGfnA3xPanGmZm7QTRoxKVXQl811403bp6VWBfVS-7koOb1glZLLa-zc2KWrgnmUyYE9AK4UNCB1XbVg11WCSiukimOLlAuHXkkfNm6xnd-YumWvDXReKK9MvmPwchgPI6jW3zJ6eMyGD84DEafH5Vyas88g9EWCktEBuOptL-o7XfEkNqUn7jNWNqTEwTwXgzQ7X5vinH7EWIMtb8wxe-bDfEcQn-772ngJwAA__80dYXd) "folded like tissue paper" and was "completely demolished.” Cy-Fair Fire Department firefighters took shelter [in a resident's garage](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGy4yAMRb8Gd2RAMU5SUGzj7m27pUcBYWsegQwo8cvf73h_YbtTaHTuvX--li_kzGX9jQ_y8pPqUmjvmUSoLVJbwVg3lr5ha9xDfRX5dFnAgNPWapiWiJw_yzhEfzfxZgfy9jKN1l2dccPm6XJ3iNHdzNnGqwvubgJFN95TRCSaBvbHM2thsmDsCCdAh8ndMKQzkL2e1WgostR2ko2EfrCn_KlvaqdQH0P2m8izq_MvBbOCed_3U8gcvmGrry61HFcK5qOWgjnXgFnBfDgVzNYefNCbI1UdPjohN524kY70xCYPKqIFv6nrRum1kuaiG3WOVKTrFRuupOOrcVl1l9oO29B8fO6cM_fpokazPpDzv7zyfyu_PfwNAAD__8EHlEc), and a Cypress teen at home alone rode out the storm in a closet with the family dog. "_The house just started shaking, and I heard a bunch of things falling, and the wind was insane_ ," [Tyce Beck said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGS2zAMRU9DdfCQsCRbhYo06jZtSg0sQiYTivCQ8Gp1-4ySI2z3CszDvP_rY_6gmGJ-_qSNR_1aZc6818SqXGaVkslLiFoDlRLrIu-sR9UZLXbgHGA_e4rpmNvGjw_rB9fw6G5967p7Z7smjMO9fRB2Dzs4tF3n1ra93X3vbz0T28E2cTxlzmHv0LoWL0gdrd1Ay3pFdveraS37qFIuGlj5i-qaDvnkcllka9IYVF_VXH8YnAxO-75flhSXPxjkXVXyeWVwOrMMTkkWSgan86fBybmTT1ppi-mASkcFZc5QJcMeBHaqEGRjoCSZIUQPMcOSpLICVagqZYOF3pU9bPRbCnja6MmgAsvxKlz_CwxOTRn9a48pxdrfTGufG8X0L0O_N_7niH8DAAD__x3mmrs). Meteorologists with the National Weather Service say tornadoes [aren't uncommon](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8GOpC92IYULv6GLn97JdrgJbZkbGRvQvL2p5zuDa4cjTSj7_u6LlcMMaT7f9zJ8mvLS6KzRmKmsnAuCV32gavHUkJd8yPxu_ICAnQnZQdmcRjie1GtszfhLrIlK0ejpJ600K23Bp2DAafNabjpaVRqEIMWwhix6hFNG-xnTEowEoRU0ANq3PQF120AktPQKEEucC49e2J6Yd3iOz-p9Gve22g981Gb4V8DcwPzeZ796ktOn_aTCdlTaWDGwmGN1MDs86NyTl3KT9pvVLpf0A4kiFGJoT_80RbrjjPEGKoZGyXuO4b4c8l_E_W08B0AAP__H1t9ow) for Southeast Texas in November, a "secondary severe season heading into the winter" when cold fronts collide with coastal humidity. The state has asked residents whose homes were damaged to [fill out a survey](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHO4yAQBOCnwR2RWYPtFBTXuPuvvdJaYInRYRPBJv7z9qdcHuFvZ6SRvvnztX5hyum4_cadLH_Hsh50tkzMVFcu9cBQtsRtw1pT8-Vx8KvxCj0YqZSEcQ2Y8mvVXbCuD1fVkVXTqJWZTW-6zUIc_TCbyeFodByuMGOPziEZH2EO0CX7HlMKRgW90nABNBjNFX0cgNQ8CN1TSFzqhTdi-sYW86s8qV582btsN-Z7E8MvAYuA5TzPy9-tPN6lgAUrJ59JwPJ2CVhy8ZgFLK3kB6dyvLMPTjYudZeV7qWyDLjjjWRjZJLtUZ_0kh--PMqTdkdVghawwGykd8M0T8rJHkBLHY2XqDFIck6NoGbQV9VVG-5nyjm1cRK6v-2Y8n8C_-z4p4V_AQAA___3Opg3) to facilitate recovery efforts.
## Family Pleads for Son's Release from Mexican Prison
A 23-year-old from Hallsville has been detained in a Mexican prison since March after he got turned around in New Mexico and accidentally [crossed the border](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdEZ4gw0ULq6hy7VXosVeghVjR_ZeSN7-xL3C333SSJ9m5s99uWOIIT1-40GWP1teEp01EjOVhXNJ6PMeuO5YSqgu_038rbxAB1oqJcEsHkP8Ln3j7dr5STVk1WB6pUfd6Wa3o3dmnIZu816D6_VqpsmvevWDmTa1QhPsJVMKjIJO9dACatz0hG67AanxJvqOfOBcWt6J6YN1i9_8ptK6fDTR7syvKm6_BMwC5vM822fk9xUKmC-3gFmpiy-qjEwyEnoqVTqM13pZKBJWkg49Jbnj-QypyoM-wWGSrxJqTgLmplj_OkOMoZpB9N3jwBD_1-Cfnfe28C8AAP__KbCElQ). After months of working with Mexican authorities, his family is reaching out to the media and lawmakers to bring him home. Caden Hawkins was [returning from a job site](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGypCAQQE-DGRa0oBIQbGL2N93QaqH9UoUyBb3jzO23Zq_wL_Dqvffna_3ClNP1_RtP8vzay3rR3TIxU1251AtjORK3A2tNLZS_F78br6DASq0ljGvElN-r6aLfVHS6I6-n0Wg7W2W7wztrMe6zdso6HPYhTjhhVKg2Nzmwrkv-A9MaRg1KG-gBLe7WYdgHID0PwiiKiUvt-SCmF7Y9v8uTah_K2WV_MD-aGH4JWAQs9333YWva9fwUsGDlFDIJWD5dApZcAmYBy4mXjMSYLoryIqzypFcKRW6lRqoCFqu0xDCpOTgnjdGDNMPgJI6K5KxJbaMioLh31cfHnXJObZyEUd8npvzfjX929OnhXwAAAP__qWuIRg) in Tempe, Arizona, when his GPS routed him off I-10 west of El Paso. He was arrested after police found three loaded guns and 400 rounds of ammunition in his truck. The Mexican government doesn't allow foreigners to carry firearms. Caden's family paid Mexican lawyers $25,000 to get him released, but the lawyers failed to show up for a hearing in April. The family is [paying $1,000 a week](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHSqyAUhJ8GOxxA0VhQ3MYut72lQ-AQzwTBgXNjfPt_zCv87e7szu73777cLUZMz792A0OfkJcER41ABGWhXJL1eUWqqy0Fq8v_E52VFiWU5lJyNSzeYjyXvvHmIfwkGzByHHqpb1roZjXO6mnQ2o8iBDeOY-dCcNJLreRjEsE2aK4yKdUglZC9apXVNujJutApkLeO9QI8Ui4trUDwsTXEM7-htC5vTTQr0V5Z94epman5OI72BfS6TKbm6w1TM9hK_JvlwW4YT14BXpiefIW4c0y8QARbL6XmxEPJG9_ggy7zvWDNiam5KcbvB8aIdRhZL56bxfgdQb9D9zbqJwAA___a1YaD) for Caden's necessities, protection from other inmates, and brief calls home. State Rep. Jay Dean (R-Longview) said Caden is "being held as a cash asset for a corrupt federal judge" and is calling on President Trump and others to demand his release. "_I want this kid home by Christmastime to be home with his family_ ," [he said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOgzAQBNCvgQ5kLwZM4eIaulx7JVrsdbBkcM7ehOTvT8kvXP9mRpqfy3LBEMNx_cadDD99Wg46SyRmygunfKBLW-CyYc6h2HQ_-FV4AQF9I2UDw-IwxNeiamdW4SZZk5HjoGSve9HXm7Ggu9HRsFqtp9WNndSr9A5xEFpb1dXBvMukhEGCkApawB59P6H1HZDUXaUEucApt7wR0xOLj6_0oNzatNfRbMy3UnVfFcwVzOd5vp2lgymX3ztmersK5k-0ghkzBxtpUb0bvJbYTMJRoyyqRq84Nm5VauyEFlb4duM91tm42xliDGUYKyWuO4b4Gef_XfYw8BcAAP__Lr-ANA). "_Please give me my baby back, he does not deserve this_ ," [said Caden's mother](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D3O3CAQxvHT4A4Lxt8FRRp3mzalNWuGNQoGCybr9e0j7xXe7i-N9NPo-fNYHuiDj6_fuJPhj0tLpLMEYqa8cMoRbdo8lw1z9mVN_yJfhRdQ0EmtJfSLRR-upa2seSo76YqMHvpWd2OnumoznXLDgMNksYW-f1p07Tg9bQ9jM1qFtvLmxrSGXoPSLdSAHbpuwtU1QHpsRKvIek655o2YPlhcuNKbcr2mvQpmYz6KaH4JmAXM53nWfwO_76OA-bYFzFrffRdhYflVpMPdh0segdAWWVIsMlMgLCR3-vgVozyyLykKmKts7HH6EHzpB9Gq144-fB_gn832NvA_AAD___3Bgk0), April Thomas. "_This has gone long enough_."
## Polls Show Tight Race for U.S. Senate
Recent polling shows U.S. Sen. John Cornyn, Attorney General Ken Paxton, and U.S. Rep. Wesley Hunt are locked in a tight [three-way race](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGuszAQhE9jOiN7MQ4ULv6GLn_7SrSBJVgyNrI3Idz-iVzhtTP6ZjTzcx_v6IOPz_-4kePPksZIRwnETHnklCPOafVcVszZlym9Ip-FR1DQSq0l2HFGH87RVLN7qLnXFTl9s0a3XavaanWmgwYQTW-smfuOul5Zo6ymFqBR2lbeXWFag9WgtIEasMWl7XFaGiDdNcIomj2nXPNKTB8sSzjTm3I9pa0KbmXei2j-CRgEDMdx1NOjXCsuX8DwRQQMlyRgmFKOZ5Q7fjhFub4iywcyB5LPtMs9-w3zKb-QLBSRScBQZTfvhw_BF3sTRj039OHbz3977e3gNwAA__-D5YMX) for the Republican nomination for U.S. Senate. A [poll](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LtywyAQheGnQZ09ywokUVAkhTqnTalZcbHIYOGB9e3tM84rpDtziq_4v0_LiVJO-_mLLsHyM5ZlD4-WA3OoC5e6ky9b4rZRram5ctv51XhBQH2Q8oDD4inl16I6b1fwRnbBynFQUk8adLdZE7yJq3OT970aIvarWmHtzUQTRRihS_aNSYmDRJAKj0iaojbkYo9BTr1QEHziUo-8BQ5PajG_yj3UoyuXLtuN-dpE_yFwFjg_36_A-TPs7odcWZvAuTHx7T2kMWgMDKAljFIbBdBV66-PlHNqwygUnC-U8h_N_wtyt_gbAAD__4EZcz0) conducted last week by a pro-Hunt super PAC shows Paxton leading with 36%, followed by Hunt with 26% and Cornyn with 25%. Earlier this month, a poll commissioned by the Senate Leadership Fund—which has endorsed Cornyn—showed the incumbent leading with 32%, followed by Paxton at 31% and Hunt with 21%. A building at the county's 44-acre "folded like tissue paper" and was "completely demolished.” Cy-Fair Fire Department firefighters took shelter , and a Cypress teen at home alone rode out the storm in a closet with the family dog. "The house just started shaking, and I heard a bunch of things falling, and the wind was insane ," . Meteorologists with the National Weather Service say tornadoes for Southeast Texas in November, a "secondary severe season heading into the winter" when cold fronts collide with coastal humidity. The state has asked residents whose homes were damaged to to facilitate recovery efforts. Family Pleads for Son's Release from Mexican Prison A 23-year-old from Hallsville has been detained in a Mexican prison since March after he got turned around in New Mexico and accidentally . After months of working with Mexican authorities, his family is reaching out to the media and lawmakers to bring him home. Caden Hawkins was in Tempe, Arizona, when his GPS routed him off I-10 west of El Paso. He was arrested after police found three loaded guns and 400 rounds of ammunition in his truck. The Mexican government doesn't allow foreigners to carry firearms. Caden's family paid Mexican lawyers $25,000 to get him released, but the lawyers failed to show up for a hearing in April. The family is for Caden's necessities, protection from other inmates, and brief calls home. State Rep. Jay Dean (R-Longview) said Caden is "being held as a cash asset for a corrupt federal judge" and is calling on President Trump and others to demand his release. "I want this kid home by Christmastime to be home with his family ," . "Please give me my baby back, he does not deserve this ," , April Thomas. "This has gone long enough." Wesley Hunt are locked in a tight for the Republican nomination for U.S. Senate. Earlier this month, a poll commissioned by the Senate Leadership Fund—which has endorsed Cornyn—showed the incumbent leading with 32%, followed by Paxton at 31% and Hunt with 21%. President Trump has not decided on the race, according to a White House official. Polling suggests the race is headed for a runoff, and some Republicans are worried a prolonged primary campaign would benefit Democrats. James Talarico and former Congressman Beto O’Rourke both garnered 25%, while 13% said they support U.S. Rep. name: John Nagel
subject: Ilhan Omar’s radical agenda ends here
body:
It’s time to take our country back

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRf/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot, I never planned to run for Congress.
For three decades, I proudly served Minnesota as a Lieutenant with the State Patrol, protecting our communities and upholding the law.
But now, I’m watching everything I fought for being dismantled by radical anti-American socialists like Ilhan Omar.
Omar and her far-left allies attack our police, divide our communities, and push a socialist agenda that leaves hardworking Minnesotans behind. They are turning our state into a testing ground for their Marxist experiment - and I refuse to let that happen.********
**[That’s why I’m running for Congress in Minnesota’s 5th Congressional District to Fire Ilhan Omar.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRf/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)******
**I’m John Nagel - a husband, father, man of faith, and proud Minnesotan who has spent his life serving others.**
Over 30 years in the State Patrol, I earned the Meritorious Service Award, Employee of the Year, and several community service honors - not for politics, but for service.
Now, I’m stepping up again - this time to protect our state and our country from Ilhan Omar’s dangerous vision for America.
But I can’t do it alone. Omar’s allies in Washington and the media are already mobilizing against me, and they’ll stop at nothing to keep their grip on power.
**It’s time to replace Ilhan Omar with a true America First warrior who will actually fight for Minnesota**** _[and I need your help to make it happen](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRf/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
| | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRf/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
| | [HELP DEFEAT ILHAN OMAR](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRf/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, Chuck Schumer and the old Democrat moderates are being replaced by the literally nuts Ilhan Omar and her radical socialist cohorts.
**These aren’t Democrats anymore - they’re socialist thugs, a ball of snakes determined to rip apart the very fabric of our nation.**
But Minnesota is better than this. _America is better than this._
It’s time to get behind honest American values - faith, family, and freedom - and remind Ilhan Omar that Minnesota belongs to the people, not to the radicals in Washington.
**_[If you’re ready to take our state back from Ilhan Omar and her socialist machine, I need you in this fight with me today](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRf/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
Together, we can send a message that will echo from Minneapolis to Washington: Minnesota stands with America - not socialism.
_For Minnesota and America,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRf/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**John Nagel**
Candidate for U.S. Congress - Minnesota’s 5th District
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRf/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
|
---
**_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRe/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQyOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=335642&trkid=1119032188&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Dark Nightmares
body:
I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed. In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was some demon, the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "I'm in your basement."

| | [****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9mhbaq1fm1qihhqugkaa3fcl7o5kvqmujh9t07o_rp22sh2s8i6eor1chjm6ob1c1h2bs) [****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf877kt9922n9rcbrov13jp7qh1ccqb0di8d68a8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1chjm6ob1c1h2bs) Dear Patriot,

I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed.

In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was **some demon** , the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "**I'm in your basement.** "

I sat up immediately, not knowing if it was real or a dream. My hands ran alongside my bed to feel the fabric in the darkness. It took some time to recognize that I was awake. I looked at my nightstand, and there was no phone.

Those who know much more about God and the Devil than I do say that this is an example of spiritual warfare. They tell me that it's meant to terrify me, to make me question myself and my own sanity. **These nightmares, this evil, come just before a story OMG will be breaking that I believe will expose evil in a way we've never seen before**.

The story was placed on hold due to the shock and grief we've all felt for Charlie Kirk. I used to run stories by Charlie to get his feedback. I relayed our next release to Charlie before he was shot. It was the last text Charlie Kirk ever sent me. I prefer to keep the message private, but he understood the significance of the story and that **it strikes at the heart of evil in our nation.**

I'm reluctant to "hype" stories anymore. That's not my intent. But I am asking for your help.

First, I'm humbly asking for your prayers for me and OMG's staff. If you're a believer, I don't need to say anything else, other than "thank you."

Secondly, [**your support is needed**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1nv6meb5tetgdgfetrk26747nglhl8115q9mdq0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1chjm6ob1c1h2bs). [**Any amount that you can contribute is appreciated**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7ljovkbud0q4q16nm3kp63muj41afd381rlfbj0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1chjm6ob1c1h2bs).

This story was one of our least expensive to produce, and you'll see why when it comes out. But it will open the floodgates of truth, and we need to be prepared for that. This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. [**Please, donate whatever you can today**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zko7esr4fanlkrfk1btvrtqf1n8s12fip5j29voo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1chjm6ob1c1h2bs).

Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5ell1ik7ah9kbuh2b61j1ib5dns246vmhancvmg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1chjm6ob1c1h2bs)
---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential
---

name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Dark Nightmares
body:
I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed. In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was some demon, the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "I'm in your basement."

| | [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zntcstfbjp53nookrfaqb5j9ph77dm3olh9oaatg_rp22sh2s8i6eor1chjmepj6cjh2bs) [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdrgencnv40503pj59va1h5kqpegcjj7gllpqia0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1chjmepj6cjh2bs) Dear Patriot,

I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed.

In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was **some demon** , the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "**I'm in your basement.** "

I sat up immediately, not knowing if it was real or a dream. My hands ran alongside my bed to feel the fabric in the darkness. It took some time to recognize that I was awake. I looked at my nightstand, and there was no phone.

Those who know much more about God and the Devil than I do say that this is an example of spiritual warfare. They tell me that it's meant to terrify me, to make me question myself and my own sanity. **These nightmares, this evil, come just before a story OMG will be breaking that I believe will expose evil in a way we've never seen before**.

The story was placed on hold due to the shock and grief we've all felt for Charlie Kirk. I used to run stories by Charlie to get his feedback. I relayed our next release to Charlie before he was shot. It was the last text Charlie Kirk ever sent me. I prefer to keep the message private, but he understood the significance of the story and that **it strikes at the heart of evil in our nation.**

I'm reluctant to "hype" stories anymore. That's not my intent. But I am asking for your help.

First, I'm humbly asking for your prayers for me and OMG's staff. If you're a believer, I don't need to say anything else, other than "thank you."

Secondly, [**your support is needed**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlot9nk05su8055k0lpnecsh7051a9oll63q534g_rp22sh2s8i6eor1chjmepj6cjh2bs). [**Any amount that you can contribute is appreciated**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd4maaoblujl76kebhtr8veg8hajvu724esbl830_rp22sh2s8i6eor1chjmepj6cjh2bs).

This story was one of our least expensive to produce, and you'll see why when it comes out. But it will open the floodgates of truth, and we need to be prepared for that. This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. [**Please, donate whatever you can today**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9bdaa0dc5fk1uaoathf18557jcg9tjql2ccj7u0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1chjmepj6cjh2bs).

Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---

This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. . Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned. In Truth, James O'Keefe Founder and CEO O'Keefe Media Group Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

| Friend, Join us for my annual Christmas Concert, Snowfall & Steel Guitars with special guests, Angie Leedholm, Lee Craig Hauenstein and more to be announced!
Step into the holiday season with Snowfall and Steel Guitars -- a country Christmas experience that blends small-town warmth, heartfelt faith, and boot-stompin' cheer.
From Cody Johnson's soulful classics to Brett Eldredge's crooner charm and Lady A's harmonies, this playlist brings Nashville's spirit to Christmas night. Light the tree, grab a mug of cocoa, and let the sound of country Christmas fill the air.
Join us at Phil Long Ford of Denver on Sunday, December 14th at 5:00 PM. Doors open at 4:30 PM.

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdee2c702-9e03-493f-a187-bf6acb5e98f6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| Dr. Amy Acton here with some incredible news as this election year heats up: The latest polls show us neck-and-neck with Vivek Ramaswamy in Ohio's must-win Governor's race. That means this is a toss-up race, Peter. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T21b51ff2-836b-48f6-8b6b-47b819bd9d88/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [But with this razor-thin polling, I need your support to help me pull into a lead. That's why my team and I set a goal to raise $10,000 by midnight, and I'm counting on you to help us reach it. Will you chip in $10 now to help defeat Vivek Ramaswamy? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ba1204a-9081-412d-ad88-21620fe03c15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| Peter, we can't celebrate this ultra-tight poll for long – because we already have a problem: My far-right opponent is a billionaire himself, and he’s being funded by his out-of-state billionaire buddies who want to buy this election. That means we’re being out-fundraised – significantly. Vivek has already reserved $2 million worth of TV ad space – and the GOP will spend record-breaking amounts to stop our campaign. If we don't fight back ASAP, I'm worried we could be drowned out before Election Day. [Unlike my billionaire opponent, I can't write myself multi-million dollar checks. But you’ve proven over and over that I can count on this powerful grassroots movement to stand with me every step of the way. So please, will you make a $10 grassroots donation before midnight to help me win this toss-up race?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T859c33b0-74cd-445d-8cb6-303fc3eb8850/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdde5965f-9424-4596-b363-b4bddc00828b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: Washington Wants Control Over Your Money. Here's How to Opt Out
body:
https://view.parlermailer.com/?qs=1283cf1d06b696698a17c277491d5ddea39aaed31745d84ca81df2d6c0cab25228547f3059ded6da72c3516bc135dc89cfa04c2b60c9b15d7360b054fec27d98566c51837881d81f4c46a4bf2ce172e0
View in browser
A Special Message from our SponsorPlease note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of Parler and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by Parler.
DM Intelligence
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

The Federal Reserve just printed $4.8 trillion in three years. Your savings account pays 0.5% while inflation runs at 8%. The math doesn't work in your favor. Meanwhile, every dollar you deposit goes straight into their system. They lend it out at 20%. You get 0.5%. They control when you can access it. They track every transaction. They decide what's "suspicious activity."

And now they're rolling out Central Bank Digital Currencies - programmable money they can freeze, expire, or tax at will. But a small group of Americans has figured out how to
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=d6615308e71a8497cc4b57ad6f620de9db8c19240c1105597ece6f72a5f44380d4ca3e409f2a140e8965828186de61e53219c64bc2b12b03680f284fd25f0158
completely sidestep the traditional banking system .

They're using decentralized finance to become their own banks, collecting the same transaction fees that JPMorgan and Citigroup earn: 12-20% monthly returns, regardless of whether markets go up or down.

No permission needed. No middleman. No government oversight. Just complete financial autonomy.

While banks collapsed in 2023 and depositors scrambled to get their money out, these Americans had already moved their wealth outside the system. They weren't affected by bank failures, government freezes, or FDIC limits.

...They'd
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=d6615308e71a8497cc4b57ad6f620de9db8c19240c1105597ece6f72a5f44380d4ca3e409f2a140e8965828186de61e53219c64bc2b12b03680f284fd25f0158
become their own banks .

The infrastructure is already built. Over 4,000 Americans are already using this system to generate passive income while maintaining complete control of their assets.

The question isn't whether Washington will protect your money.

The question is: Will you opt out before they take control of it?

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=d6615308e71a8497cc4b57ad6f620de9db8c19240c1105597ece6f72a5f44380d4ca3e409f2a140e8965828186de61e53219c64bc2b12b03680f284fd25f0158

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Shapiro continues to stonewall record release in sexual harrassment case
body:
News + editorial | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning, and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Wednesday Weekly Reads!

As always, to stay up to date on late-breaking stories and analysis, [subscribe to our daily email list](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=66513fb7c7&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1. ****[Gov's office fights to block records related to sexual-harassment scandal](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=18d1077756&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Todd Shepherd_
Governor Josh Shapiro’s administration is fighting in two separate lawsuits to block the release of documents and other information that could shed more light on the sexual harassment allegations that forced the resignation of his top deputy, Mike Vereb, in September 2023. In both cases, the Pennsylvania Office of Open Records has ruled that many of the documents should be turned over in response to requests by Broad + Liberty. The legal fight already unearthed in February that the administration completely[ deleted the email account](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=070c98cf14&e=b7b3eddce2) of Vereb’s accuser after she suddenly quit in March 2023, and the governor’s office has refused to say when the account was deleted. **Why It Matters.** The evolution of the scandal suggests more of an unraveling than of anything to being put to rest. An email account deleted at an unknown time, a “get stuff done” executive who didn’t know about accusations against his most trusted deputy, legal exclusions to withhold documents that were easily dismissed by courts, and now court cases seeking to bar documents — all these cut against the brand of the politician who made his fame prosecuting the Catholic Church for its handling of sexual abuse in its ranks. The administration claims their policy required disclosure only to those with a ‘need to know’ — but[ has never explained](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=672bd2430c&e=b7b3eddce2) who decided the governor of Pennsylvania didn’t need to know about cabinet-level sexual harassment, or why his top deputies knew within a week but he didn’t know for months. The governor’s office did not respond to a request for comment.

[Continue Reading](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=08eabdc161&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2. ****[To run for office, City Council members should quit their day jobs.](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=902e9fba99&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_From the Editors_ ‘Resign to run’ is the only thing Philly does better than the rest of the country. Of course, the career politicians in City Council want to change it. For the fourth time in 20 years,[ City Council is trying to repeal the rule](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=db124ffb1b&e=b7b3eddce2) that requires city politicians to resign their jobs if they want to run for another public office. The voters are required to approve any change to Philadelphia’s charter, and in the past they have often — wisely — rejected attempts by city council to remove the reform-minded provisions that restrict their behavior in office. **Why It Matters.** Philadelphia’s City Charter was enacted at the high tide of civic reform in the city, following 70 years of unbroken and increasingly corrupt domination of city politics by the Republican Party machine. The corruption was so deep and so pervasive that reform-minded Republicans and independents joined with the much weaker Democratic Party apparatus to win elections and submit a good government charter to the voters in 1951. They were led by a wide collection of local notables, including the Committee of Seventy, which had long advocated honest government in Philadelphia. Since then, machine politicians have ceaselessly tried to repeal all of the good-government parts of the charter, to return Philadelphia to the old “corrupt and contended” city of pre-charter days. The only thing different is that the machine running things is now called “Democratic,” not “Republican.” **[Continue Reading](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3798f80f45&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* [_Howard Lurie: Independent voters are good people. That’s the problem._](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6f452d7e97&e=b7b3eddce2)
* [_David Thornburgh: Independent voters aren’t the problem_](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3331ac3bac&e=b7b3eddce2)
* [_Partisan split emerges as Chester County reviews 1,000+ provisional ballots_](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=72400f0101&e=b7b3eddce2)
* [_Ben Mannes: How a suspected foreign terrorist got a Pennsylvania Commercial Driver License_](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4b97404593&e=b7b3eddce2)
* [_Christine Flowers: The new profiles in courage_](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=035a3f4e5b&e=b7b3eddce2)
* [_Thom Nickels: Writing the book on music in Philly_](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7b44a225e3&e=b7b3eddce2)
* [_Houlahan, Democratic lawmakers under fire for telling troops to refuse certain orders_](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=df58f16661&e=b7b3eddce2)
* [_Philly Palestine Day event draws objections from Jewish organizations_](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=482f6b34c9&e=b7b3eddce2)

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading. **
Did you know there are some people who think the Covid pandemic is ongoing and as dangerous as ever? Like the last Japanese soldiers emerging from island jungles in the 1970s, they persist in their social isolation and N95 mask-wearing as though nothing has changed since that fateful two weeks (which turned into a year and a half) to flatten the curve. At _UnHerd_ this week, [Ryan Zickgraf writes](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7b0455cb61&e=b7b3eddce2) about the small but fanatical far-left group that wants to keep America locked in the failed public health mindset of 2020 — forever.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c3f3c87dfa&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded by readers like you.**

_Broad + Liberty_ is funded by — and thankful for — readers like you. Your generous support ensures that Broad + Liberty can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Fair coverage of the news and the publication of diverse opinions is more important than ever. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at editors@broadandliberty.com. As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100 percent tax deductible! Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you. Hoping that you and yours have a happy Thanksgiving, — The Editors at Broad + Liberty
---
|
---

| | | | Hey Peter,

While working families brace for steep health-insurance hikes, Republicans are refusing to extend critical ACA tax credits, and Democrats are calling them out.

**Here are the facts:** Around 24 million Americans could face premium spikes if the enhanced subsidies expire.

Read the story now. Staying updated is our power.

|

Peter,
Nurses are "not professionals."
That is the official declaration from the Department of Education this week. And it happened because of a bill Lauren Boebert backed.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u1C2eR89qptTwH4IFkpsoFg5lNOJJaDmuskwmKxIrJC9xAl9c_cZ0w2zBZYYTbgi6o_CzbJ2U2yc9s1lfBNZDcHdo_6knUpZm1fs8Fpo1vL9DuWcYd1LzibUMpEYAyMwWOW1XwlgZKue0qoieS_Kx3xzfIOEuNoaJ_zuiZcFIg1SSUMG-cVlRzveRpN3nO7BW2pSPrpGHvZ-nTg1kursbw35PvPhy3LK&c=EWCgZJG8VJ0WadEMdjRRo3En01EieFlk6Q-0TBxmLwlqGxNHHWaj3g==&ch=DeRkQJPYI1pX-IHCnBPr3wON1JyHksegCLxm6JVkaEtcVM7Tmn5_AA==)
---
This is a slap in the face.
This new rule cuts the student loans nurses need. It makes advanced degrees too expensive for regular people. If they can't pay for school, they can't become nurse practitioners or teachers.
The most professional people I've ever known were the hospice nurses who got my parents and me through their final days. They provided dignity and care that no machine can replicate.
Let's not forget that teaching and nursing are female-dominated fields that have been historically devalued and seen as "women's work."
So why make it harder for nurses and teachers? Because Boebert's donors are betting on robots replacing people.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u1C2eR89qptTwH4IFkpsoFg5lNOJJaDmuskwmKxIrJC9xAl9c_cZ0w2zBZYYTbgi6o_CzbJ2U2yc9s1lfBNZDcHdo_6knUpZm1fs8Fpo1vL9DuWcYd1LzibUMpEYAyMwWOW1XwlgZKue0qoieS_Kx3xzfIOEuNoaJ_zuiZcFIg1SSUMG-cVlRzveRpN3nO7BW2pSPrpGHvad6uhmq76Ph-p8MM6y0l5p&c=EWCgZJG8VJ0WadEMdjRRo3En01EieFlk6Q-0TBxmLwlqGxNHHWaj3g==&ch=DeRkQJPYI1pX-IHCnBPr3wON1JyHksegCLxm6JVkaEtcVM7Tmn5_AA==)
---
They are rewriting the rules to devalue human work, so they can automate it.
I'm Trisha Calvarese. I'm a former labor leader and public servant running to fire Lauren Boebert and fight for working people in Congress.
And Lauren Boebert is terrified of our campaign.
She is only in Congress because of just 546 votes. When I ran against her in 2024, our campaign had the best performance of any Democrat in this district's history--outperforming Kamala Harris by 6 points in a red wave election.
[We have the momentum. But we are up against the MAGA machine hellbent on erasing our dignity for a quick buck. We need to stand up and fight back right now before it's too late. That's why I am asking you today: Will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or whatever is meaningful to you, to fire Lauren Boebert and replace her with a champion for working people?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u1C2eR89qptTwH4IFkpsoFg5lNOJJaDmuskwmKxIrJC9xAl9c_cZ0w2zBZYYTbgiwkG3jOcWY3KGRnrDJfBZTT11D7DzaWUC-fL0i4B6zE-5JUQp6pQtl6ptj4TUR9nzU6Q5eVYT5suxOxet0RJtbRws2-y2aomtCYo50bYkQSOOuW-oFD9tKp4YHoA1-xLqmsMmPSHiJf0poUGIrV6u63DWkPzdjp6ouooQpO0RxY8=&c=EWCgZJG8VJ0WadEMdjRRo3En01EieFlk6Q-0TBxmLwlqGxNHHWaj3g==&ch=DeRkQJPYI1pX-IHCnBPr3wON1JyHksegCLxm6JVkaEtcVM7Tmn5_AA==)

Fellow American - I'll make this quick because I know you're busy...

We are just days away from the end of November, and we haven't hit our monthly digital goal.

[**HELP US CATCH UP →**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0903711e6ee14ed08b5381294b9246e3&_e=fFzsSl7mAxZJU6XufgMBDNhxpzEihgjt5o4lBPhmWtb-s6XA_FcLvyk3IaJIbX6hXYoQriKHnLVzvKT2d31xEGEw8GeXJTtOSe7xxuy7t7sl3yt6umfY2adLOGOMmUQPG17I1s9-38eBJq79KYGOiqgE7rTRUH7CK515nWeNg7kJlPqOaJyKzlCoYrw6NN7r1U2PG-VHu-un3oI8laWbMkRoL8-7sPXB7O5ZWqweP3vFBSMUOfdliXr3II7QKqUN-9TFfOR1WdZO6Pvm3bYYhpJ9yrU63WAE97EPd9ho4RW2_zJdRHBc94z_mYWqrbibLM6Kcek3QH0RFNss_faYerR2kRJ7DynPG9t5KR6l3jUZhFH-QpUgRY8J88Hfr-7Rq9Yjr-b9O52qNSeU4eX5W3f8g53VUQ5tRoyZrcaRfIcVqmlH1oFEUuJlJPVetscDQ0-vemu-4irKhjhl7HzUHkxXSmnwDl0y8No4i1bBHj0uniIyfTsVsF0OGT4mpaWJnBhmrSqGiJPXL8IBt-WBsiiolbMTOj2TZ--LGMNEsAqL771rOyCUq9e9Svo1-oBuMwQfihzkVeKtKZntT4_DldS2uR6__y8bTGO33rZUA6-qeZ__r1mMq1aPR37RiMT8LmLTM-ZdcPVDXQdz4dMHadd9pQ7vWFhJk88pXMCFuL1cnVyb8EPAJwgNfz_99LWw3J9EzN5SxrPm26LkejwKDD0TLDNAyDhBm3zF3yCdAK1evnAowtZd2la5zJvVxb7v0wHXVU0vRUyt2xsl19kQdw%3D%3D)
Here's the thing, Fellow American - with Thanksgiving falling so late this year, we only have three days after the holiday to close the books on the month. With travel, spending time with friends and family, I figured I would reach out early this month.

I don't want to bug you, so here it goes...

clean_body: I don't want to bug you, but I have to ask... | Fellow American - I'll make this quick because I know you're busy... We are just days away from the end of November, and we haven't hit our monthly digital goal. Here's the thing, Fellow American - with Thanksgiving falling so late this year, we only have three days after the holiday to close the books on the month. With travel, spending time with friends and family, I figured I would reach out early this month. I don't want to bug you, so here it goes... Thanks, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Laura Jones for Congress
subject: ▶️: When Essentials Become Unaffordable, Representation Matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Jones for Congress_ _P
body:
These challenges don’t care about political affiliation — they touch every one of us. And I want you to know that I see it, I hear it, and I share in your concerns.
| | [](https://1xz3r.mjt.lu/lnk/AWUAAIXNSZEAAc6oP4wAA-Neh6MAAYKKXNoAoUWGADIMFwBpJwoDHydfDWCBTCGdC3GKqZu0SQAtq28/1/SGDKOhZyQC70itjHTL2q4A/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xhdXJham9uZXNmb3Jjb25ncmVzcw)
---
# **▶️: When Essentials Become Unaffordable, Representation Matters**
**Our district is strong** ,**but right now, many of our families are carrying burdens they shouldn’t have to carry alone.** Everyday life has become harder — and I understand that most of us would rather focus on family, work, and the things that matter most, not politics. Honestly, I feel the same way.[**_But the truth is, the issues affecting our daily lives can’t be ignored. Families across our district are feeling the impact._**](https://1xz3r.mjt.lu/lnk/AWUAAIXNSZEAAc6oP4wAA-Neh6MAAYKKXNoAoUWGADIMFwBpJwoDHydfDWCBTCGdC3GKqZu0SQAtq28/2/ycAPkt8oQq3lxDv-OUKYZw/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2NvbW0tdW5pdHkx)
| | [](https://1xz3r.mjt.lu/lnk/AWUAAIXNSZEAAc6oP4wAA-Neh6MAAYKKXNoAoUWGADIMFwBpJwoDHydfDWCBTCGdC3GKqZu0SQAtq28/3/tjLx6mq408RFzGFrS3VSxQ/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2NvbW0tdW5pdHkx)
---
| With **reduced SNAP benefits** making it harder for families to put food on the table, **healthcare premiums climbing** higher every year, and the **cost of basics like groceries and gas continuing to rise** , people are being squeezed from every angle.**These challenges don’t care about political affiliation — they touch every one of us. And I want you to know that I see it, I hear it, and I share in your concerns.** In moments like this, our greatest strength is each other. I encourage you to stay connected with community organizations, local leaders, and churches who are working every day to support those in need. When we come together, we can address these hardships in practical, meaningful ways.But **community action must be matched by leadership that fights for us in Washington**. That’s why I’m running for Congress — to be a representative who listens, who understands the struggles we face, and who is willing to work tirelessly to bring real solutions home.I’m asking for your vote in the 2026 election because I believe in the power of our district and in the future we can build together. With your support, we can create a brighter, stronger, and more secure future for every family in TX-8.[**_Thank you for your time, your strength, and your trust._**](https://1xz3r.mjt.lu/lnk/AWUAAIXNSZEAAc6oP4wAA-Neh6MAAYKKXNoAoUWGADIMFwBpJwoDHydfDWCBTCGdC3GKqZu0SQAtq28/4/1XKu8dCgNirkYO2QbWP-dg/aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2NvbW0tdW5pdHkx)

name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: Boebert wants to replace nurses with robots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016EKTH4tnNYHJuO0XFyYXHhEhBeEqdQ0tgGdezlv6DTmxsntx41lRDG41UCmmJqNHlX14nm3mdGNtVUGq5sX-wDBJkz9pMY2Lzm2iAjLy6rSwIZnNZMy9WzZFilqIPiERhGZLbaJVQpKFHyH1_FZ0qgFjOSvd6VP8ThQMGSUvc579KrAK0HRbMTNh_6hybpSrSAY32wpF2L0nPXuuu_F0Bcs7CA3fAE5u&c=ecs5BBFxC6Eids3RDZnqV45y4DScmUi_DtLVq1Sk5OTmcn1X_cdsVA==&ch=yah0xnVQerGzPwxE-tOxA5l-ynpSRGFf-SvpfY69_2MX3U-FjUw5jQ==)
---
|

Peter,
Nurses are "not professionals."
That is the official declaration from the Department of Education this week. And it happened because of a bill Lauren Boebert backed.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016EKTH4tnNYHJuO0XFyYXHhEhBeEqdQ0tgGdezlv6DTmxsntx41lRDG41UCmmJqNHlX14nm3mdGNtVUGq5sX-wDBJkz9pMY2Lzm2iAjLy6rSwIZnNZMy9WzZFilqIPiERhGZLbaJVQpKFHyH1_FZ0qgFjOSvd6VP8ThQMGSUvc579KrAK0HRbMTNh_6hybpSrSAY32wpF2L0yHGnhpiraCRjHJVzF8uWl&c=ecs5BBFxC6Eids3RDZnqV45y4DScmUi_DtLVq1Sk5OTmcn1X_cdsVA==&ch=yah0xnVQerGzPwxE-tOxA5l-ynpSRGFf-SvpfY69_2MX3U-FjUw5jQ==)
---
This is a slap in the face.
This new rule cuts the student loans nurses need. It makes advanced degrees too expensive for regular people. If they can't pay for school, they can't become nurse practitioners or teachers.
The most professional people I've ever known were the hospice nurses who got my parents and me through their final days. They provided dignity and care that no machine can replicate.
Let's not forget that teaching and nursing are female-dominated fields that have been historically devalued and seen as "women's work."
So why make it harder for nurses and teachers? Because Boebert's donors are betting on robots replacing people.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016EKTH4tnNYHJuO0XFyYXHhEhBeEqdQ0tgGdezlv6DTmxsntx41lRDG41UCmmJqNHlX14nm3mdGNtVUGq5sX-wDBJkz9pMY2Lzm2iAjLy6rSwIZnNZMy9WzZFilqIPiERhGZLbaJVQpKFHyH1_FZ0qgFjOSvd6VP8ThQMGSUvc579KrAK0HRbMTNh_6hybpSrSAY32wpF2L1CoVHSkglD9bSpYX9X7gQ-&c=ecs5BBFxC6Eids3RDZnqV45y4DScmUi_DtLVq1Sk5OTmcn1X_cdsVA==&ch=yah0xnVQerGzPwxE-tOxA5l-ynpSRGFf-SvpfY69_2MX3U-FjUw5jQ==)
---
They are rewriting the rules to devalue human work, so they can automate it.
I'm Trisha Calvarese. I'm a former labor leader and public servant running to fire Lauren Boebert and fight for working people in Congress.
And Lauren Boebert is terrified of our campaign.
She is only in Congress because of just 546 votes. When I ran against her in 2024, our campaign had the best performance of any Democrat in this district's history--outperforming Kamala Harris by 6 points in a red wave election. [We have the momentum. But we are up against the MAGA machine hellbent on erasing our dignity for a quick buck. We need to stand up and fight back right now before it's too late. That's why I am asking you today: Will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or whatever is meaningful to you, to fire Lauren Boebert and replace her with a champion for working people?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016EKTH4tnNYHJuO0XFyYXHhEhBeEqdQ0tgGdezlv6DTmxsntx41lRDG41UCmmJqNH8zeDwk1ePG7wfEUbeQJJM4gxwsrPy_rnqZ4rg4Dgf5nG0riZIuA4FwI9oE6pRGwY0Rq9ubtAQUZoP1yq2UktLkK-Yt_QbP1gSeYHJruclffH47JcDn2qgCRyQA_fVaD4bB-ZOrCU5HxgIv6_dOTOXCdTPzIJAOIqo9KmbPVSCSw=&c=ecs5BBFxC6Eids3RDZnqV45y4DScmUi_DtLVq1Sk5OTmcn1X_cdsVA==&ch=yah0xnVQerGzPwxE-tOxA5l-ynpSRGFf-SvpfY69_2MX3U-FjUw5jQ==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, Nurses are "not professionals." That is the official declaration from the Department of Education this week. And it happened because of a bill Lauren Boebert backed. | == This is a slap in the face. This new rule cuts the student loans nurses need. It makes advanced degrees too expensive for regular people. If they can't pay for school, they can't become nurse practitioners or teachers. The most professional people I've ever known were the hospice nurses who got my parents and me through their final days. They provided dignity and care that no machine can replicate. Let's not forget that teaching and nursing are female-dominated fields that have been historically devalued and seen as "women's work." So why make it harder for nurses and teachers? Because Boebert's donors are betting on robots replacing people. | == They are rewriting the rules to devalue human work, so they can automate it. I'm Trisha Calvarese. I'm a former labor leader and public servant running to fire Lauren Boebert and fight for working people in Congress. And Lauren Boebert is terrified of our campaign. She is only in Congress because of just 546 votes. When I ran against her in 2024, our campaign had the best performance of any Democrat in this district's history--outperforming Kamala Harris by 6 points in a red wave election. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Don't let them degrade our nurses. Don't let them automate our compassion. Trisha Calvarese Democrat for CO-04 | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

body:
Peter,
I'm not here to beg for a dime. I need your opinion, and I need it now.
President Trump just announced that his administration is considering how to spend the close to $100 billion in tariff revenue collected this year.
That's right, Peter.
The U.S. government is about to collect BILLIONS on a massive tariff surplus, and we want to know what you think should be done with that money.
The top two options:
1. Paying down the TRILLIONS in National Debt
