name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: I’ll never back down
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1049%2E181023%2EvH5Yr1)
I’m not a career politician, and I don’t come from a political dynasty. I’m a mom, a military spouse, and an educator — and I’m proud to serve as Michigan’s secretary of state.
I ran for office because I wanted to serve the people of Michigan with integrity and grit. That’s what I’ve done as our secretary of state. And that’s exactly what I’ll do as governor.
**[So, can you help us take our campaign to the governor’s office by pitching in $10 now?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/269?c0=jmb-em-q42025.Xe0G0T&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1049%2E181023%2EvH5Yr1)**
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/2168?refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_AM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=1049%2E181023%2EvH5Yr1)
My opponents aren’t focused on making Michigan the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, or call home. But I am.
That’s why I’ll fight to ensure we tackle the affordability crisis in our state by ensuring everyone can access a home in the place they want to live, afford quality health care, and drink clean water.
**[These fights will determine our future. And I’ll never back down. Help power our campaign now by contributing $10 or whatever you can!](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/269?c0=jmb-em-q42025.Xe0G0T&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1049%2E181023%2EvH5Yr1)**

body:
. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c5223989c34945ee8c399636537361cd&_e=nlTBv_xs8vSxTAE9gsrVirY7gcUFJhO4M3F2SYtuKWcSlCCBVmh8P9j47G90_EPc0uBqrf_scsJZKuwSZF68DwhO-WBTwWqlO9GPOxpzZQ6K8D4_xptIYzc0nc0t9acUmLLY0XC314mob7OKM2BKTmK-CGWIJpybl9tfihPhnHAKwdCFDEa2IPpvWoa30Ro472GEKKgegYm880cUee5H4PXTJPx73ZSzxlom3JGOAOALePiZIHvjMdOUOb05zZ8Iq6_KFobNjc-KMEHv_Us8QqPam3_NltMDWrMOOpUMujb1yzEfxvT_9ufXrYGJCslFt8Sttl-eJtZa3_XxeNt19uBfHg8l4u9Nx5dOYFaBkkRVWvDaO8RIbdexyRiz_6XEqMRt2ImzV5cTxSinRLQZ03x0QQ83D7XQbzYdtFWGDat7zsrUfNDBFTrML8lWB5mfLnVjbHwtI07-1BvvSxxnfrY0S4ZqMlQE2HR8mUUwE8mBkrxurcVXciunE-aolgaNdOOfEfcoGNKnDzWAfFMZmGX0088ypkSmj6U1SXbA54yd6eJP6SHC8AdWXdceKvj-qx_u-qHLgUQs9eUlEnZu55tHwZM9LI6ULIiXBkFyQiADrJWYUvhAbz2Sw7D-tJKXuv0W0UMrgipzFk2MwwXfVA%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
On 11/21, the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona had the chance to do the right thing and DROP her wrongful prosecution against me – an _innocent_ 80-year-old man facing 20 years in prison.
---
_But at the _final_ _hour__ , she chose bloodthirsty **VENGEANCE** over **JUSTICE** , and decided to continue her prosecution against me and put me on _TRIAL_ right after the holidays are over.
---
**She is now rushing to the __State__ Supreme Court for emergency assistance.**
---
It’s all viciously calculated. She knows the President has no pardon authority for __state__ crimes.
---
But let me be clear: **I will never give up the fight for my freedom**.
---
When President Trump and I were arrested in the most violent jail in America, we proclaimed, “ _NEVER_ SURRENDER!”
---
Two years later, President Trump is back in the White House.
---
_**But I’m still fighting for my freedom!** And Democrats have RIGGED the case so that a federal pardon from President Trump is **_POWERLESS_** in _state_ court._
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c5223989c34945ee8c399636537361cd&_e=nlTBv_xs8vSxTAE9gsrVirY7gcUFJhO4M3F2SYtuKWcSlCCBVmh8P9j47G90_EPc0uBqrf_scsJZKuwSZF68DwhO-WBTwWqlO9GPOxpzZQ6K8D4_xptIYzc0nc0t9acUmLLY0XC314mob7OKM2BKTmK-CGWIJpybl9tfihPhnHAKwdCFDEa2IPpvWoa30Ro472GEKKgegYm880cUee5H4Afs_V__NWEghIpTI3xEeK2CbFjD-98ikjpkQAAPo-xZOVkJ9iygT7C6wivxAKuHE_71ic5jse_erKK7PQbH8tzpmfQVKKcs6bcj9XZR8ThksnPkyHLxv0U1_GlnhJiLiY4ryCunaGgCnv0xsBuEMxo8w_lwiFKMmos4vqoy8RDkynD1P0azZjNieTvYrB_d0pNTMECRR3MaZmyVqECaf58c6f6Sy1ThypANTA1lqebFsGziFG7sfs-EjZe_Cr9Y2qN3Yy-DcG1r25b1H3zwtuCbA-ai4qux6Bka--Zk7K_z6ZamvLJWaPLwfXyKD6Bhu3QgQDFIVdcoC3xyUbm9_Ko3DuYfm5Nok0LiHO3DAHjcHwCLpZ0rtRIEDxyyVZPDXDFqxSqTUyqF8mj_mv22o7YfWhi-MK-ufc_gL9B8L86NtOdvIljpXoZaseYNe4IuSA%3D%3D)
__
---

body:
This is despicable. **Millions of Americans could _permanently_ lose their food-stamp benefits in a matter of weeks because of the Republicans’ spending bill.** This is a nationwide catastrophe for families who rely on SNAP to put food on the table. We must act quickly. I refuse to let Trump gut food assistance, but I can’t stop this alone — I need your voices rising up with mine to stop this injustice. | **↓↓↓ SIGN NOW ↓↓↓** **[_That’s why I need you to sign my urgent SNAP petition before midnight. We must send a loud message that slashing SNAP and letting families go hungry is unacceptable. Will you be one of the 25,000 signatures I need?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120045290/585054588/-1529422692?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.11.26_SNAP-Rehash_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWFiNWI2Mi1lOWNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jRzFdnp5rPfVW_eacHhL6G8Lrt9Xj8-1qV5TQLQ8skA=&emci=95514714-5aca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=0eab5b62-e9ca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=7659029)** | | [ SIGN THE PETITION >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120045293/585054606/-1529422692?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.11.26_SNAP-Rehash_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWFiNWI2Mi1lOWNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jRzFdnp5rPfVW_eacHhL6G8Lrt9Xj8-1qV5TQLQ8skA=&emci=95514714-5aca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=0eab5b62-e9ca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=7659029)

This is beyond cruel.
SNAP is one of the most effective anti-hunger programs in the country. It keeps vulnerable Americans afloat in moments of hardship.
**And yet Trump and Republicans want to gut it — all to help fund more tax breaks for billionaires.**
The government has a responsibility to do everything possible to safeguard these essential, life-saving benefits.
**[_But it’s going to take all of us speaking out together to make a difference. Will you sign my petition right now to advocate for protecting SNAP from Republican cuts?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120045296/585054612/-1529422692?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.11.26_SNAP-Rehash_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWFiNWI2Mi1lOWNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jRzFdnp5rPfVW_eacHhL6G8Lrt9Xj8-1qV5TQLQ8skA=&emci=95514714-5aca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=0eab5b62-e9ca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=7659029)**

name: Justice Democrats
subject: “Justice Democrats re-emerge in New York”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Have you seen the headlines,
Peter?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251126-dac.b7igzD&refcode=em20251126-37230&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37230%2E1203867%2E75s929 ]The New York Times: Justice Democrats Re-Emerge in New York to Try to
Unseat Espaillat; Axios: Hispanic Caucus chair becomes latest House Dem to
draw a primary foe; The American Prospect: Justice Dems Pick Longtime
Organizer to Take Harlem; Punchbowl News: Espaillat faces Justice
Dems-backed challenger; Salon: “Always put the people first”: Progressives
get a new candidate in New York City

One week ago, we endorsed our fifth 2026 Democratic primary challenger:
Darializa Avila Chevalier, who’s taking on AIPAC-backed Rep. Adriano
Espaillat in New York’s 13th district.

Like Darializa told the New York Times, “He takes money from the very
institutions that are making life harder for New Yorkers here —
institutions like landlords, AIPAC and corporate PACs — and turns the
other way when our rents are being raised, when we’re being priced out of
our communities. And I think New Yorkers are hungry for something
different. I think this past mayoral election proves that.”

This is our chance to take the energy from Zohran Mamdani’s groundbreaking
victory and funnel it into our campaign to elect another progressive
leader who will put working people before corporate donors and the
pro-Israel lobby.

With your support, Justice Democrats has unseated powerful members of New
York City’s Democratic machine before: In 2018, we replaced 10-term
incumbent Rep. Joe Crowley with Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez in 2018. In 2020,
we took out 32-year incumbent Eliot Engel and elected Jamaal Bowman.

In 2026, we can defeat Adriano Espaillat and elect Darializa Avila
Chevalier. But only if we keep up this momentum.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251126-dac.b7igzD&refcode=em20251126-37230&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37230%2E1203867%2E75s929 ]Please, split a grassroots contribution of $5 or
whatever is within your means to support Darializa and Justice Democrats
today →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251126-dac.b7igzD&refcode=em20251126-37230&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=37230%2E1203867%2E75s929 ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251126-37230-footer&t=1023&refcode2=37230_1203867_75s929&akid=37230%2E1203867%2E75s929

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=37230%2E1203867%2E75s929

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: what sets Marie apart
body:
| | Peter – The numbers don’t lie. If you look at the list of Marie’s campaign donors, here’s what you’ll find: everyday people pitching in, mostly from right here in Washington.

That’s who Marie answers to. Not corporate PACs. Not dark money groups. Not wealthy family members.

Her opponent’s report tells a different story.

Since the very beginning, Marie’s campaign has been fueled by grassroots donations. She’s not a career politician who donates tens of thousands of dollars to her own campaign, she doesn’t accept money from corporate PACs, and she doesn’t have a network of wealthy family members on speed dial. Our GOP opponent can’t say the same.

That’s what sets Marie apart. They have deep-pocketed national donors – we have you.

Our grassroots team has defied the odds before, and we can’t slow down now. Every dollar helps us push back against the powerful forces trying to take away our agency. Your support means we can continue to stand up against those who think they can buy our vote.

[Will you donate today to ensure Southwest Washington remains strong and independent?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120046061/585056123/-1425100085?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_251126_1_4&refcode2=f061afa4-e9ca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDYxYWZhNC1lOWNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lg4v6KptOsGi16xxNqYm9zo2wcPglmxmxC7bjeQeNps=)

name: Maxine Dexter
subject: Thanksgiving may look different for families this year.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Dear Peter,
From our family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving.
I am grateful to celebrate with neighbors like you—people who care about our community, stand up for one another, and demand better for every generation.
Our joy and ability to gather are acts of resistance. Never forget that the celebration of togetherness strengthens our mission for progress and keeps us going.
I want to take a moment to acknowledge that for many families, this Thanksgiving might look different. There may be missing faces around the dinner table after loved ones were swept up in Trump’s immigration raids.
No matter what, know that your community and we here at Team Maxine are in your corner. We send our love, while continuing to take action in the streets and in the House.
I’m donating to the Oregon Food Bank to make sure no one has to go hungry this holiday. If you’d like, you can join me here → [https://secure.oregonfoodbank.org/a/xap?source=TeamMaxine&gad_source=1&gad_campaignid=22730944245&gbraid=0AAAAAB2XC5EDOkd-jDqz5C2ApjIt8JJ01&gclid=Cj0KCQjwvJHIBhCgARIsAEQnWlCv3V2brRcfkVfgXRYJUFg7gLU1SuGp-RUsyKEADsm897Gr2en3fMcaAoN_EALw_wcB&nvep=&hmac=&emci=9bac5b48-88b6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=]

If you are facing food insecurity, you can find groceries nearby using the Food Bank’s Food Finder. [https://foodfinder.oregonfoodbank.org/]
FOOD FINDER [https://foodfinder.oregonfoodbank.org/]
Love,
Maxine

name: Michael Bennet Colorado Senator
subject: CO-05 deserves a leader like Jessica Killin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
| | |
---
Colorado families are under pressure. Rising costs, economic uncertainty, and failed leadership in Washington that’s putting politics ahead of people are hitting our communities hard.
**That’s why I’m proud to endorse Jessica Killin for Congress.**
Jessica is a fourth-generation Coloradan and Army veteran who has spent her life serving others – from leading soldiers as a paratrooper to standing up for her community here at home. **She’s tough, disciplined, and not afraid to challenge the status quo. And she will fight tirelessly in Congress to deliver real results for CO-05.**
This race is about more than one seat – it’s about showing that Colorado families come first, _not partisan politics_. Jessica has the experience, the heart, and the grit to stand up to Donald Trump’s policies, lower costs, and protect working families.
Not only is she the best person to finally flip this seat blue, but I firmly believe _she’s the best person for the job._
**Together, Jessica and I are fighting for a better Colorado. I’m proud to stand with her, and I hope you will too.**
**[We’ve got a lot of work ahead, but with the support from folks like you, we can finally elect a leader in CO-05 that delivers for the people. Will you chip in today and split a donation between myself and Jessica Killin’s campaign to bring strong leadership to Colorado?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120047357/585059366/-1816602368?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1070-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTExNjYxMy1lYWNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WL7nq3gKyg-nVTD-d7gENAwozVY-x0kpxTxvSZPh1vY=)**

clean_body: | | | Colorado families are under pressure. Rising costs, economic uncertainty, and failed leadership in Washington that’s putting politics ahead of people are hitting our communities hard. That’s why I’m proud to endorse Jessica Killin for Congress. Jessica is a fourth-generation Coloradan and Army veteran who has spent her life serving others – from leading soldiers as a paratrooper to standing up for her community here at home. She’s tough, disciplined, and not afraid to challenge the status quo. And she will fight tirelessly in Congress to deliver real results for CO-05. This race is about more than one seat – it’s about showing that Colorado families come first, not partisan politics. Jessica has the experience, the heart, and the grit to stand up to Donald Trump’s policies, lower costs, and protect working families. Not only is she the best person to finally flip this seat blue, but I firmly believe she’s the best person for the job. Together, Jessica and I are fighting for a better Colorado. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

Buried in Section 5101 of the U.S. Code is a hidden income opportunity. No endless forms. No complicated hoops to jump through. And here’s the kicker:

clean_body: A major shift is approaching. A newly confirmed program from the Federal Reserve is gaining traction — with banks already aligning.| | | | | | "First Investment Update" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | A major shift is approaching. A newly confirmed program from the Federal Reserve is gaining traction — with banks already aligning. Some financial experts warn this could change how account access works, especially under digitally administered frameworks. Imagine attempting to make a routine payment — only to encounter unexpected delays, reviews, or freezes triggered by automated systems. These scenarios are raising questions: Who makes the rules? And can consumers challenge them? There’s still time to get ahead of this potential transformation. | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | First Invеstmеnt Updаtеs brоught tо уоu bу Іnception Media, LLC. body:
#
Peter,
As Tim told you yesterday, we’re rapidly approaching our November fundraising deadline this Sunday, and **we’re currently just 60 percent of the way to our $50,000 goal.**
[****](https://act.timwalz.com/go/153?t=1&akid=177%2E34582%2Esf1Irh)
We’ll be honest: with Thanksgiving tomorrow and the holiday season about to be in full swing, fundraising usually takes a dip around this time of year.
We can’t afford to let that happen, or we’ll have to pump the brakes on some of our big plans heading into 2026 to help reelect Tim.
**[There are just four days left to pick up the pace, so we have to ask: can you rush a contribution of $5 or more right now to get us over the finish line?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251126_1.c8_5Ad&amount=5&refcode=em20251126-177&t=2&akid=177%2E34582%2Esf1Irh)**

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4dc8d388-7648-42dc-92a1-d095086144da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

Hey Friend,

As you might have seen, Trump appointed the first-ever "Crypto Czar" to his cabinet.

And his first move?

Creating a strategic Bitcoin reserve for America.

But here's what the media missed:

The executive order specifically mentions "
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=e5abbf13049d624161d134ab6b3bf5fb7a8f9d7a87a22676cc2f0efce82a0920940bce919bb9b3d6000491372b10501dd0b95148e2ae495c5c973e3558ae178b
native digital asset markets " as critical infrastructure.

Translation: The government knows about the hidden market where crypto trades 80% cheaper.

And they're positioning NOW.

Three things are happening behind closed doors:

1. The treasury is exploring Native Market access for the strategic reserve
2. Wall Street was given "unofficial approval" to access these markets
3. Regulatory framework is coming that could lock out retail forever
The window for regular investors?

Maybe 60 days. Maybe less.

Once the government and institutions control native market access, the 100x opportunities disappear.

Forever.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=e5abbf13049d624161d134ab6b3bf5fb7a8f9d7a87a22676cc2f0efce82a0920940bce919bb9b3d6000491372b10501dd0b95148e2ae495c5c973e3558ae178b
Watch this video to see how to access the Native Markets (before the door closes) →

Tan Gera, CFA

P.S. When JD Vance said "crypto will make America rich again"...

He wasn't talking about buying Bitcoin on Coinbase. He was talking about THIS.
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=e5abbf13049d624161d134ab6b3bf5fb7a8f9d7a87a22676cc2f0efce82a0920940bce919bb9b3d6000491372b10501dd0b95148e2ae495c5c973e3558ae178b
Get instant access to the Native Markets training.

name: Roy Cooper for Senate HQ
subject: 4 days, 4 reasons, $4
body:
Time is running out...
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=69%2E124072%2EW9O3im)
| We’ll keep this quick, Peter: We’re at risk of missing our November online fundraising goal. **This could become the first-ever billion-dollar Senate race — _we can’t let that happen._** These are the 4 BIGGEST reasons to support this campaign TODAY:
---
**We only have 4 days left** to raise $825,000 online before this month ends.
---
**We will all have to deal with 4 straight years** of extreme Republican chaos unless we take back the Senate — _and to start, we’ve got to flip this seat blue._
---
**Roy’s held 4 different public offices** — he’s got the experience and the grit to _win_ tough races in North Carolina.
---
**Just $4** from every person who received this email would help us stand up to the GOP’s national fundraising machine.
---
**[Experts say this is on track to become _the most expensive Senate race ever._ But we’ve got something our opponent doesn’t have: YOU. Peter, will you show up for Roy before this deadline passes?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2055?t=6&akid=69%2E124072%2EW9O3im)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $4](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2056?t=7&akid=69%2E124072%2EW9O3im)
---
[DONATE $10](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2057?t=8&akid=69%2E124072%2EW9O3im)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2058?t=9&akid=69%2E124072%2EW9O3im)
---
[DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2059?t=10&akid=69%2E124072%2EW9O3im)
---
[DONATE $100](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2060?t=11&akid=69%2E124072%2EW9O3im)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2061?t=12&akid=69%2E124072%2EW9O3im)
---
**Thank you for everything you do — let’s get out there and win.**
---
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=69%2E124072%2EW9O3im)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=69%2E124072%2EW9O3im)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=4&akid=69%2E124072%2EW9O3im)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=69%2E124072%2EW9O3im)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=69%2E124072%2EW9O3im)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=13&akid=69%2E124072%2EW9O3im)

subject: Have a Happy Thanksgiving!

body:
_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120049267/585065663/-1616192732?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_261125_NA_Thanksgiving&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTI5ZDA1OTAtZWRjYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JxSGtAY9cR79AX0SpcXGtsgibf76njTmWOowouvcckY=)_
Hi folks, and happy Thanksgiving!

From the whole team here at IDCCA, I hope you get a chance to rest and relax with your family and loved ones – and get the chance to reflect on what you’re thankful for this year. I’ll start:
1. For our staff, candidates, and County Chairs here at IDCCA. They’re the ones who keep the trains running and our mission on track, and I’m so thankful for them and all their work.
2. For you, because without your support organizing your neighbors and going to the ballot box, none of our work would be possible.
3. For our health and sanity as we relentlessly pursue our values and try to build a better world.

It’s been a tough year and I know that it’s easy to feel defeated and apathetic. I appreciate that so many of you have stayed in this fight with us.

Thank you, and happy Thanksgiving!

– Mark Guethle
President, IDCCA

Thank you, and happy Thanksgiving! – Mark Guethle President, IDCCA **** | | | | **GET TEXT UPDATES FROM THE IDCCA! | | | | | | = = | | | | A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the board's official website, www.elections.il.gov, or for purchase from the Illinois State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL. All funds solicited in connection with this event are by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs’ Association, and not by Leader Jeffries. Contributions or gifts to the Illinois Democratic County Chairs’ Association are not tax-deductible. The Illinois Democratic County Chairs’ Association P.O. Box 3445 Springfield, IL 62708 United States ** ****

subject: my family’s flan

body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120049295/585065771/-1882479441?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.26_Flan_B1_F2_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTU5ZDA1OTAtZWRjYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jO6gTM7_-Sjapw1Nw6k_valiPhYcJGaU5IUeQwC5f-U=)
---
Folks, I want to tell you a story that begins long before my name was ever on a ballot. My parents were young and scared when they fled Cuba for the U.S. They left everything behind — their traditions, their language, their loved ones — because they believed in a simple, powerful dream: _That their children could grow up in a country where freedom was real, where opportunity wasn’t reserved for a lucky few, and where democracy belonged to the people._ Every holiday season, my mother and I made flan together — a recipe she carried with her. In our family, it’s more than a dessert. It’s a reminder of our roots. **Now, I’m in charge of making flan for my family every Thanksgiving.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120049296/585065778/-1265325846?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.26_Flan_B1_F2_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTU5ZDA1OTAtZWRjYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jO6gTM7_-Sjapw1Nw6k_valiPhYcJGaU5IUeQwC5f-U=) As I run for Congress to represent AZ-01, I’m fighting to ensure that the country my parents trusted with our future continues to live up to that promise. If you believe in this mission, I’m asking you to chip in whatever you can to my campaign today. [**_Donate any amount (even a dollar!), and I’ll share my family’s flan recipe with you:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120049297/585065780/-1265325846?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.26_Flan_B1_F2_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTU5ZDA1OTAtZWRjYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jO6gTM7_-Sjapw1Nw6k_valiPhYcJGaU5IUeQwC5f-U=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [ CHIP IN $5 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120049298/585065782/-1265325846?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.26_Flan_B1_F2_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTU5ZDA1OTAtZWRjYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jO6gTM7_-Sjapw1Nw6k_valiPhYcJGaU5IUeQwC5f-U=)

80 years after McCarthyism, Trump and his MAGA mob are using the same tactics to scare and SILENCE anyone who disagrees with them.

**Jane Fonda is a Democratic HERO — so she needs YOU in her corner to fight back._Trump will do anything to stop her!_**

[**Will you join Jane Fonda’s movement to defend free speech and stand up to Trump by adding your signature now? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251126_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=22019%2E878179%2ETkf6bw)

**_IF we sit idly by,_** Trump will ELIMINATE free speech and punish anyone who dares to speak out against his MAGA authoritarianism.

**_BUT IF we all band together,_** Trump doesn’t stand a CHANCE against our grassroots momentum — we can SAVE our democracy!

[**So please, SIGN NOW: Co-sign Jane Fonda’s Committee for the First Amendment »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251126_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=22019%2E878179%2ETkf6bw)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22019%2E878179%2ETkf6bw). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22019%2E878179%2ETkf6bw).**

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Friends,
This Thanksgiving week I’m reflecting on family, gratitude, and the small traditions that make this holiday meaningful. I’m so looking forward to spending time with my family, connecting in the kitchen and catching up.
And in the spirit of traditions, some of you may remember when my social media post sharing our Kaine Family Creamed Onions got some attention online a few years back. The internet had some thoughts. But that’s part of what I love about Thanksgiving: every family’s table looks a little different, their own unique traditions built up over years and generations. That’s part of what makes this holiday so meaningful.
So this year, I thought I’d share the recipe that caused all the commotion – a Kaine family favorite that actually dates back to the 17th century:
Kaine Family Creamed Onions Recipe
Ingredients:
* 2 bags pearl onions
* 3 Tbsp butter
* 3 Tbsp flour
* 1 1⁄2 cups half and half
* Grated cheese
Directions:
1. Add pearl onions to boiling water for 2–3 minutes until easy to peel.
2. Cool, peel, and boil again for 10–15 minutes in salted water.
3. Make a white sauce by melting butter, stirring in flour, and slowly adding half and half. Salt to taste.
4. Pour the sauce over the drained onions, top with grated cheese, and bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
5. Serve and enjoy – makes 8–10 small servings.

However you’re celebrating, I hope you’re able to take a little time to rest, laugh, and enjoy good company. And if you can, join me in taking a quiet moment to reflect and find ways to give back – whether it’s volunteering in your community, contributing to a worthy cause, or simply checking in on someone who could use a hand.
From my family to yours, wishing you a warm and joyful Thanksgiving.
All my best,
Tim Kaine
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Powered by People
subject: Not waiting around
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Did you see the news?

After a federal court blocked Greg Abbott’s gerrymandered congressional
maps, the Supreme Court put a temporary hold on the ruling. This means the
GOP’s rigged maps could be in place for the 2026 elections.

We’re not waiting around to see what happens; we’re digging in and
organizing on the ground to win these districts no matter what their lines
are. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251126.VTZyee&refcode=ema20251126-240490&t=1002&akid=240490%2E444211%2EqBCmAX ]Can you rush a donation to help us continue doing the work to win
key Congressional seats in 2026? Control over the House could come down to
what we do in Texas.

Here’s the truth: Democrats can win in Texas, even under gerrymandered
maps—especially in an election year like 2026.

Just look at Taylor Rehmet’s performance in the special election for
Senate District 9. He’s moving on to a runoff election after nearly
winning his race outright in a district Trump won by more than 17 points!

When we organize on the ground, register new voters, and campaign on the
issues that actually impact working Texans, we can be competitive across
the map.

We’re stepping up our work to stay in touch with even more voters to
ensure they turn out. We’re working hard to help recruit candidates, hire
organizing staff, and build up our voter registration program before 2026,
but we can only do that with help from grassroots donors like you.

money will be invested in efforts that can win key districts across Texas.

Thank you,

Powered by People

name: Team Pramila
subject: MAGA extremists don’t take holiday breaks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’ve got just days to hit our goal. Will you step up and fuel this people-powered movement?
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251126-5660-footer&t=1&akid=5660%2E420207%2EjyE5Xp)
Hi Peter,
Before you unplug for Thanksgiving, we’ve got a quick but urgent update: We still need to raise another **$12,000** to reach our $33,000 goal for the month, and our deadline is **this Sunday at midnight.**
With many folks (rightfully!) taking time to rest and be with loved ones, we’re expecting a big drop in donations over the next few days. That’s why we need every supporter who can to step up now.
**Because MAGA extremism and hate don’t take holiday breaks.** While families gather, they’re launching new attacks on our health care, our democracy, and our communities. This is the moment to stand up, _not_ to slow down.
[**So before you log off for the holiday, can you please chip in $3 to help us close the gap and power Pramila’s work for our progressive movement?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251126-1.Oq9-VU&refcode=em20251126-5660&amount=3&t=2&akid=5660%2E420207%2EjyE5Xp)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251126-1.Oq9-VU&amount=3&refcode=em20251126-5660&t=3&akid=5660%2E420207%2EjyE5Xp)**
Here’s what’s at stake right now:
* **ACA subsidies are set to expire in _just weeks._** When Congress returns Monday, Republicans will try to strip coverage from millions. Pramila will be leading the charge to stop them, but she needs your support.

* **Trump’s authoritarianism is _accelerating._** He’s sending troops into cities, silencing opposition, and weaponizing the DOJ.

* **Families are at a breaking point.** They’re facing skyrocketing costs, unaffordable housing and child care, and stagnant wages while corporate profits soar.

* **ICE is out of control.** Pramila is demanding justice and accountability — but she can’t do it alone.

**And this is our first major grassroots test since voters across the country rejected Trumpism at the ballot box earlier this month.** Progressive energy is surging, but we can’t afford to be complacent. If we let up even for a moment, the far-right will take it as a sign that we’re satisfied. That the fight is over. But that’s not how we win.
**Pramila doesn’t take a dime of corporate PAC money, Peter. This campaign runs on people power — and we need every bit of it right now.**
[**Will you pitch in $3 before Sunday to help us hit our $33,000 goal and power Pramila’s work into December and 2026?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251126-1.Oq9-VU&refcode=em20251126-5660&amount=3&t=4&akid=5660%2E420207%2EjyE5Xp)

Thanks for being part of this team. We’re so grateful to be in this fight with you.
— Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251126-5660-footer&t=24&refcode2=5660_420207_jyE5Xp&akid=5660%2E420207%2EjyE5Xp)**

subject: In a turbulent moment, I’m thankful for you

body:
I want to talk about what I’m thankful for.

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/R_JkEXy02aRRJbdHEjCf1Q~~/AAUS1hA~/CJXnundTB4EOmtKcQpjI55u4UDaudCJZjJvasszNOf9muVpGwNVp_QtkBJsmkg9qJcEIgAZYTGUgcpkRjERrqbsp-U37zwi9K0XhyjjH8YqO7bJpkS_gafia7iWDdbUd)
| | **Friend,** **Colorado’s 4th District is many things - rugged, proud, resilient - but above all, it is a place where people still believe in each other. And in a moment as turbulent as the one our nation is living through,**that belief truly matters**. ** We are living through chaotic times in American history. It can feel overwhelming - the political noise, the national division, the sense that the future grows more uncertain by the day. People are tired. They are frustrated. And many feel hopeless. So today, I don’t want to focus on what is broken. **I want to talk about what I’m thankful for.** I’m thankful that thousands of you have chosen to stand behind this campaign - not only to unseat Lauren Boebert, but to help steer this district away from extremism and toward leadership grounded in reality and service. I’m thankful that together, we are working to nullify the chaos of the last two years of a Trump presidency and build a future rooted in justice, dignity and stability for working people. I’m thankful that you open these emails, that you show up to events, that you donate what you can, and that you allow me the privilege of traveling this incredible state with Amber and our three amazing kids - listening to voters, learning their stories, and weaving those stories into a shared vision for what Colorado can be. I’m thankful that you believe our children and grandchildren deserve a future worth fighting for. I’m thankful that you still love this country - in all its imperfection - and that you believe in democracy enough to defend it, strengthen it and push it forward when so many in Washington have lost their way. Every conversation across Eastern Colorado - on ranches, in small businesses, in community centers and at kitchen tables - reminds me that this campaign is not just political. **It is deeply personal.** People share what inspires them, what worries them, where they struggle and what they dream of. And every time, I walk away humbled and determined to fight harder. The truth is simple:
**I couldn’t do this without you.** And I mean that with everything I have. If you are reading this, I hope you truly feel how much I appreciate you - your belief in this campaign, your hope, your courage, and your willingness to stand with me on this journey. I am genuinely grateful. Over the next few days, I am taking some time to breathe. Amber and I are taking the kids hiking in the mountains - unplugging, decompressing and taking in the beauty of the state we love so much. But once Thanksgiving wraps up, we are hitting the road again. More **town halls.**
More **forums.**
More **meetings with voters.**
More **community conversations in the places Washington forgets.** The work doesn’t slow down. And the momentum we are building is real. If you are able to continue supporting this movement - even a few dollars - it makes a real difference as we prepare for the next stretch across the district. Thank you for believing in this mission. Thank you for believing in each other. And from my family to yours, I hope you have a warm, safe and joyful Thanksgiving. **[Chip in here to help us keep traveling, organizing and building the future working families deserve.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/2KPqKIJikFUTV_EdYzYIgA~~/AAUS1hA~/tl56-iabgii-7Ij5L_nrBWgDlbJ0lE54SXRav4YTqjv28YJwIypIxbrYZ0F7M8XSj3qwisUBai0o1GkHuTL3Y-YKVXWJt9qL_BHVY2Uri9hBjFsS9deeL05jPMK37PFjQitQEoNT-t2IEU09YDfGOTahqfp1iph_8g9ocIYQbyE~)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | [Chip in $10 now >>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/UmbyAZMmVi-k51Ba_rgXuQ~~/AAUS1hA~/rrYIyj8DSE6nhGyCKB-2j--U9Z663wciVio8283tVz9DDOu79ifSdpzaYN66fJAz6dnLnS4PgTuLrQ3LvSjqsTIx_yqG1Tztx-EKCcE6OpkeuKjtaJL81wg6et1t_2Y1eKuBwZRhfUqjmzaPzC8p91Jmrw5n6YZW4MQ2yX3xtvarh1Klt7wLnS6GwHQw-TgW) | [Chip in $25 now >>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/1_eeItx6ji-7ZY72aNn3bg~~/AAUS1hA~/rrYIyj8DSE6nhGyCKB-2j--U9Z663wciVio8283tVz9DDOu79ifSdpzaYN66fJAz6dnLnS4PgTuLrQ3LvSjqsTIx_yqG1Tztx-EKCcE6Opl92onGVkbIrChWf9SpwsPR0HDLtlA2H-UPPGq7FfLOtzybmFDVeDQAmXvCNMdf0Wbt_ng-dRQO5tXWfNhEZNQP)

I am genuinely grateful. Over the next few days, I am taking some time to breathe. Amber and I are taking the kids hiking in the mountains - unplugging, decompressing and taking in the beauty of the state we love so much. But once Thanksgiving wraps up, we are hitting the road again. More town halls. More forums. More meetings with voters. More community conversations in the places Washington forgets. The work doesn’t slow down. And the momentum we are building is real. If you are able to continue supporting this movement - even a few dollars - it makes a real difference as we prepare for the next stretch across the district. Thank you for believing in this mission. Thank you for believing in each other. And from my family to yours, I hope you have a warm, safe and joyful Thanksgiving. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ~~ ---|--- Let us prove that a campaign built by families, neighbors and working people can defeat the politicians who hide from their own communities. John Padora Working dad, engineer, fighter - Candidate for US congress CO-04 | Paid for by Padora for Colorado Padora for ColoradoPO Box 116Severance, CO 80546United States "Website"•~~ "Privacy Policy"

body:
I want to take a moment to wish you and your loved ones a warm and joyful holiday.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120050355/585067592/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmYwN2RhYS1lZmNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LKdYzhrSnHod2pD1PJFJmo2Ssg2sCqL46A3GDatUGWY=&emci=74a0a71f-5dc9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=42f07daa-efca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=7731215)

| | As we head into Thanksgiving, I want to take a moment to wish you and your loved ones a warm and joyful holiday. This year, I'm reflecting on what I'm grateful for. I'm grateful for the resilience of our communities. Grateful for the countless acts of kindness we see every day. And grateful that, even in challenging times, we continue to stand up for one another and for the future of our democracy. I'm thankful that we live in a nation where most people still believe in justice, equality, and the power of coming together. I'm thankful for the organizers, volunteers, voters, and neighbors who keep pushing for progress — not because it's easy, but because they know it matters. And I'm thankful for you. Your commitment, your engagement, and your hope for a better tomorrow are what make all of this work possible. Wherever you are, and however you celebrate, I hope you find connection, comfort, and a moment of peace. The times ahead won't be easy. But the only way we can fight for a better tomorrow is by standing together. Wishing you a very Happy Thanksgiving. name: James Talarico
subject: Before the dumpster fire of Black Friday sales…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Hey Peter, I know most of us are counting down the hours until Thanksgiving. Whether you’re traveling or cooking a big feast for your family or just looking forward to a day off, you probably have better things to do than read my email. So I’ll make this quick.
Fundraising has been particularly difficult this month for a lot of campaigns, and this slump has hit us too.
I know that after Thanksgiving, the corporate holiday shopping frenzy is going to be even harder to break through. Our inboxes are going to be dumpster fires of Black Friday sales. So we need to make up some ground today before that drowns us out.
This is where the power of our movement comes in. If enough people give just what they can afford, it adds up quickly.
[**If you can spare $5 or a donation of any amount that makes sense for you today, it would go a long way. I’m counting on a surge of donations to make sure we have the resources to take back Texas.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251126-1-ak&t=1&akid=267%2E1347274%2EyzNnWG)
[DONATE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251126-1-ak&t=2&akid=267%2E1347274%2EyzNnWG)
Thank you, and I hope you have a happy Thanksgiving.
James

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=3&akid=267%2E1347274%2EyzNnWG) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=4&refcode2=267_1347274_yzNnWG&akid=267%2E1347274%2EyzNnWG)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=267%2E1347274%2EyzNnWG).

name: Mary Trump
subject: A middle finger to my uncle Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
And we're just getting started.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120050570/585068120/1328794144?refcode=ea.52f441e9-efca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.52f441e9-efca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUyZjQ0MWU5LWVmY2EtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yP2vD76m-Mx3TWQaOTj763CXqUcLf1QzsFIere3eo7s=&emci=c1cd18ea-edca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=52f441e9-efca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4823105)
---
Hey there, it's Mary Trump. There’s nothing I love more than showing bullies like my uncle, Donald Trump, exactly what’s what. Election Night, November 4, 2025, felt like the collective middle finger he desperately needed. After everything Donald has done — criminalizing dissent, attacking freedom of speech, threatening journalists, and poisoning our politics with fear — voters looked at his agenda and said:_absolutely not_. In ordinary times, we could count on our newly elected leaders and the president to work together for the good of everyone who calls this country home. But these aren’t ordinary times. **My uncle does _not_ accept defeat.** He’s already mobilizing his MAGA allies and fossil fuel donors to claw back power in the states. He’s plotting revenge, rigging maps, and doing everything in his power to erase the progress we just made. That’s why I couldn’t let more time pass before reaching out. **Jane Fonda and her team proved that grassroots organizing can beat Big Oil’s dirty money, but only if we keep the pressure on. There are runoffs still ahead and a pivotal special election in Tennessee in less than 6 days that could flip _another_ Republican seat in Congress before the year ends.** **[Can I count on you to join me in supporting the Jane Fonda Climate PAC by chipping in $5 before their end-of-month deadline on Sunday? Every bold, brave candidate we elect is another leader willing to stand up to Donald and the billionaires bankrolling his chaos in the states.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120050572/585068122/2105508926?amount=5&refcode=ea.52f441e9-efca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.52f441e9-efca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUyZjQ0MWU5LWVmY2EtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yP2vD76m-Mx3TWQaOTj763CXqUcLf1QzsFIere3eo7s=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120050573/585068123/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.52f441e9-efca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.52f441e9-efca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUyZjQ0MWU5LWVmY2EtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yP2vD76m-Mx3TWQaOTj763CXqUcLf1QzsFIere3eo7s=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120050574/585068124/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.52f441e9-efca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.52f441e9-efca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUyZjQ0MWU5LWVmY2EtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yP2vD76m-Mx3TWQaOTj763CXqUcLf1QzsFIere3eo7s=)

clean_body: And we're just getting started. | Hey there, it's Mary Trump. There’s nothing I love more than showing bullies like my uncle, Donald Trump, exactly what’s what. Election Night, November 4, 2025, felt like the collective middle finger he desperately needed. After everything Donald has done — criminalizing dissent, attacking freedom of speech, threatening journalists, and poisoning our politics with fear — voters looked at his agenda and said:absolutely not. In ordinary times, we could count on our newly elected leaders and the president to work together for the good of everyone who calls this country home. But these aren’t ordinary times. My uncle does not accept defeat. He’s already mobilizing his MAGA allies and fossil fuel donors to claw back power in the states. He’s plotting revenge, rigging maps, and doing everything in his power to erase the progress we just made. That’s why I couldn’t let more time pass before reaching out. Jane Fonda and her team proved that grassroots organizing can beat Big Oil’s dirty money, but only if we keep the pressure on. There are runoffs still ahead and a pivotal special election in Tennessee in less than 6 days that could flip another Republican seat in Congress before the year ends. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I’ve always admired Jane more than I can say because she doesn't just call out injustice; she acts. Her Climate PAC is taking on the two forces driving my uncle’s agenda: creeping authoritarianism and the fossil fuel industry that bankrolls it. So when I heard from Jane’s team that this movement helped to elect over 60 climate champions this year — in Pennsylvania, Virginia, Mississippi, Arizona, and beyond — I was blown away, but not surprised. This movement looks injustice and the status quo straight in the eye and refuses to settle for anything less than better. I’m truly grateful to be in this fight with you. You know as well as I do that the state and local candidates JanePAC supports may not make national headlines, but they're our firewall against Donald's attacks. They're the ones making daily decisions about drilling permits, clean energy investments, and whether my uncle’s most destructive plans ever see daylight. And while we won’t win every battle, we've seen what’s possible when we organize and refuse to be silenced. That’s how we delivered historic defeats to Trump’s agenda this year, and that’s how we build the power we need for the midterms next year. = Thank you for not giving up, Mary L. Trump = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. name: Rep. Mike Soboleski
subject: Thanksgiving 2025
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015IGi3TjFHmNPSqmwVvK9KrqS7LJcyDq0jpL55_o-d5TzDl76Ai55mKUj3xwMMcgaTNu56mA2DT0XfYehPnvs4o-Ar6-YdqtYeh8BqdwRQOev6bpdlcAmwfOtO5ndeWDYz2EejB2MKiJ-a9iN5LlOs_kKqIaGg6mW&c=3ymYg5NkKtPxoaVjaUGEOMDgyibKhjuPSzmk4Ymt_Mg3IT4PINVs9A==&ch=hJXeIn7rq4tAr7MnxNHHTu1sNSHFiPnRnVNHOd8U2YJxDUCRTamTFw==)
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
Peter,
Thanksgiving holds special meaning in Maine, where some of the earliest English settlers--such as those at the Popham Colony in 1607--relied on shared harvests and close cooperation with the local tribe to face the challenges of coastal life.
Early fishing and trading communities also marked the season by gathering to celebrate the fall's hard work and the provisions that would sustain them through winter. These traditions of gratitude, resilience, and neighborly support became cornerstones of Maine's earliest settlements. Today, that spirit continues to shape the strength and character of our communities.
This Thanksgiving, I'm especially grateful for all who have engaged in our political process, in ways big and small, to make a difference for everyone fortunate enough to call Maine "home."
Mike Soboleski Rep. Mike Soboleski Proudly Serving House District 73

# Hello Capitalists,
### **Here is everything you should be following today:**
* Taxpayers flee California at a rate of one per minute
* California Tax revenue losses are now more than $29 Billion
* JP Morgan's projections for the S&P 500 for 2026 are out and they are big
* Nvidia brags about its chips after being snubbed by Meta
* IRS releases the rules for "No Tax on Tips" and what the limits will be
* Gen Z plans to flip the script for Black Friday in a surprising twist
* Britain's socialist budget chaos rocks UK markets

### **Today 's markets + assets:**
* **✅ DOW: 47532.95 (⬆️ 0.89%)**
