# California Exodus, one taxpayer flees per minute
In a **[stark exodus signaling voter discontent,](https://substack.com/redirect/49b2a69d-f359-405e-b5e4-c268ac6a6b53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** California is hemorrhaging one taxpayer every 1 minute and 44 seconds, per new IRS data, as residents bolt for lower-tax havens like Florida amid soaring costs, crime, and regulations--costing the state billions in lost revenue.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/49b2a69d-f359-405e-b5e4-c268ac6a6b53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Taxpayer Losses Escalate Dramatically** : **[IRS figures reveal](https://substack.com/redirect/750132b0-8780-41a5-b1c4-1ad5624ec247?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** California's outflow surged from $9 billion in 2018 to $29 billion in 2020, dwarfed by Florida's $39 billion influx from new arrivals.
* **Florida 's Rapid Resident Boom**: The Sunshine State gains one taxpayer every two minutes, fueled by lighter regulations and functional governance, contrasting California's "slow-motion collapse."
* **Expert Praises Influx Benefits** : **[National Taxpayers Union Foundation's](https://substack.com/redirect/1229f8ec-bd86-4621-956f-962a63652874?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Andrew Wilford hails migrant taxpayers as "job creators and innovators," expanding economic activity and tax bases in welcoming states.
* **Broader Electoral Ramifications Loom** : Population shifts threaten California's congressional seats and Electoral College votes, delivering a relentless "vote of no confidence" in its blue-state leadership.

* * *

# JPMorgan sees the S&P going to 7500 by the end of 2026 and possibly 8000
JPMorgan **[strategists forecast the S&P 500 hitting 7,500](https://substack.com/redirect/d8e14741-bbe2-483b-b348-3e53cb8483db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by end-2026 amid robust earnings growth and Fed rate cuts, potentially blasting past 8,000 if easing continues--despite AI bubble fears.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d8e14741-bbe2-483b-b348-3e53cb8483db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Robust Earnings Surge Expected** : Analysts project 13-15% annual S&P 500 earnings growth through 2026, building on Q3's 13.4% rise, fueled by AI productivity and deregulation benefits.
* **Fed Cuts Catalyze Rally** : The baseline assumes two more rate reductions before a pause, with 85% odds of December cut. Sustained long term easing of rates could propel the index beyond 8,000 via better inflation control.
* **Market Multiples Justified Now** : Elevated valuations reflect AI' capital expenditure boom, higher shareholder payouts, and looser fiscal policies like the One Big Beautiful Bill Act, offsetting bubble risks.
* **K-Shaped Economy Poses Risks** : An uneven recovery could see low-income struggles versus high-income spending sprees, fostering volatile consumer sentiment amid broadening AI investments by firms and governments.

* * *
* * *
# Nvidia fights back after Meta's snub in favor of Google chips.
Nvidia boldly claimed Tuesday **[its GPUs outpace Google's AI chips](https://substack.com/redirect/9d740e42-0669-45a0-a801-bd69fc0cf7cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by a full generation, touting superior versatility amid reports of Meta eyeing Google's Tensor Processing Unit rentals, Nvidia shares dipped 3% on competition fears.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9d740e42-0669-45a0-a801-bd69fc0cf7cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Nvidia Dominates AI Market** : They control over 90% of the chip market via versatile graphics processors, supplying chips even to rivals like Google despite Google using their own chips for internal TPU use.
* **TPUs Face Versatility Limits** : Google's custom ASICs (Application-Specific Integrated Circuit) excel in specific tasks but lack Nvidia's fungibility, running fewer models across diverse computing environments.
* **Blackwell Ushers New Era** : Upcoming Nvidia chips promise enhanced power and flexibility, reinforcing their lead as AI demand surges.
* **Gemini Trained on TPUs** : Google's latest state-of-the-art model uses TPUs exclusively, yet Nvidia stresses its platform supports such advances universally.

* * *
* * *
# IRS releases the rules for "No Tax on Tips" \- here's what you need to know
The IRS unveiled **[long-awaited guidance](https://substack.com/redirect/50ea1573-4753-4480-96f1-fef1374cb21a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Tuesday on President Trump's promised tax deductions for tips and overtime pay, offering up to $25,000 in relief for millions of workers starting in 2025.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/50ea1573-4753-4480-96f1-fef1374cb21a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Qualified Tips Deducted** : Workers can exclude up to $25,000 in reported tips from taxable income for 2025-2028, but benefits phase out above $150,000 for singles.
* **Overtime Relief Capped** : Eligible employees deduct up to $12,500 in overtime earnings annually, mirroring tip limits and targeting 6% of U.S. workers who claimed it in 2024.
* **SSTB Waiver Temporary** : Healthcare, legal, and arts professionals gain 2025 transition relief for tip claims, but face exclusion in future years without new regs.
* **Reporting Hurdles Loom** : Employers urged--but not required--to track via W-2s for 2025, sparking expert fears of "hodgepodge" confusion during 2026 tax season.

* * *
* * *
# Gen Z ditches AI and plans to flood brick and mortar stores for "tactile retail vibes" on Black Friday
In a stark generational twist amid an economic pinch, Gen Z shoppers are **[bucking tech trends](https://substack.com/redirect/2a34860c-02d7-469d-9b9a-eed0a421d239?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by shunning AI gift hunts and charging into Black Friday stores with gusto per an AT&T survey.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2a34860c-02d7-469d-9b9a-eed0a421d239?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Gen Z Leads Charge:** Youngest shoppers eye Black Friday for 40% of buys, outpacing millennials at 32%, while boomers delay until pre-Christmas weeks.
* **Spending Squeezed Tight:** Overall holiday budgets dip 4% year-over-year due to inflation woes, with Gen Z cutting deepest at 23% after prior year's 37% surge.
* **In-Person Ideas Dominate:** Seventy-two percent draw gift inspiration from brick-and-mortar visits over social media, signaling a craving for tactile retail vibes.
* **Small Biz Surge Emerges:** Seventy-seven percent would consolidate shopping at local spots if prices match giants, boosting support for community economies by 8 points.

* * *
* * *
# UK budget leaks ahead of release, tax raises and increased welfare cause UK markets to tank
In a **[leaked bombshell exposing fiscal chaos,](https://substack.com/redirect/8707c135-d1e5-49ab-9b11-c1ec7bb52b7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Britain's budget watchdog revealed Chancellor Rachel Reeves' blueprint for £26 billion in annual tax hikes by 2030 to bankroll a massive welfare splurge, shattering Labour's no-new-taxes pledge amid market jitters.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8707c135-d1e5-49ab-9b11-c1ec7bb52b7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **OBR Leak Sparks Turmoil** : A technical glitch prematurely disclosed Reeves' fiscal scorecard during Prime Minister's Question time, triggering a gilt yield spike, a weakening pound, and an internal inquiry--echoing a 1947 scandal that toppled a chancellor.
* **Welfare Surge Hits £16B**: The budget wil scrap the two-child benefit cap which will pump £3 billion yearly into 560,000 families, averaging £5,000 extra per household and up to £14,000 for largest ones, inflating total benefits from £333 billion to £389 billion by 2029/30.
* **Threshold Freeze Nets £12.7B**: Extending income tax bands until 2031 will drag 780,000 more workers into the basic rate and 920,000 into higher brackets, pushing the overall tax burden to a 300-year peak of 38.3% of GDP.
* **Conservative Backlash Slams Giveaway** : Conservative leader Kemi Badenoch branded it a "smorgasbord of misery" for workers funding "Benefits Street" handouts, as productivity forecasts slump and U-turns on fuel duty and winter allowances add £7 billion to costs.

We’ve got to fight back

Peter, We need to talk about the Trump administration weaponizing the Department of Justice to carry out its extreme, anti-voter agenda. **Here’s some background:** Historically, the Justice Department has been a critical check on attempts to deny voters access to the ballot. But now, the Trump administration is using it to subvert the voting process nationwide. _NPR_ reports that the Justice Department has launched legal challenges against eight states, including Maine and Oregon, in an effort to obtain sensitive voter information. **This is unprecedented, Peter.** **Here’s why this is a BIG problem:** This is just the latest in a string of horrifying moves to undermine fair representation and the right to vote. Earlier this year, the Trump administration gutted the leadership of the Justice Department’s voting rights unit. The department is also urging the Supreme Court to strike down Louisiana’s fair congressional map and weaken the Voting Rights Act as we know it. This latest anti-democracy attack is incredibly dangerous. If states are forced to hand over voter rolls and sensitive voter data — including driver’s licenses and partial Social Security numbers — the Trump administration could exploit this information for partisan advantage. [**We need your help. We’ve fallen behind on our monthly fundraising goal, which is necessary to keep fighting back against these attempts to suppress our voting power. If we don’t meet our November goal, we’ll be forced to make some difficult choices. clean_body: We’ve got to fight back | Peter, We need to talk about the Trump administration weaponizing the Department of Justice to carry out its extreme, anti-voter agenda. Here’s some background: Historically, the Justice Department has been a critical check on attempts to deny voters access to the ballot. But now, the Trump administration is using it to subvert the voting process nationwide. NPR reports that the Justice Department has launched legal challenges against eight states, including Maine and Oregon, in an effort to obtain sensitive voter information. This is unprecedented, Peter. Here’s why this is a BIG problem: This is just the latest in a string of horrifying moves to undermine fair representation and the right to vote. Earlier this year, the Trump administration gutted the leadership of the Justice Department’s voting rights unit. The department is also urging the Supreme Court to strike down Louisiana’s fair congressional map and weaken the Voting Rights Act as we know it. This latest anti-democracy attack is incredibly dangerous. If states are forced to hand over voter rolls and sensitive voter data — including driver’s licenses and partial Social Security numbers — the Trump administration could exploit this information for partisan advantage. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Peter, our voting process is under threat. Fair representation is at stake. And the future of the Voting Rights Act is on the line. = Thanks so much, The NDRC Team = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Emily Randall
subject: I bet you didn’t expect an email about mole chilli
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
If you chip in to my campaign today (any amount), I’ll send you my mole chilli recipe. Get this offer while it’s hot!

| Peter, I want to take a quick break from the news and talk about chilli. Specifically, this perfect cool-weather mole chilli I love to make for friends. **If you chip in to my campaign today (any amount), I’ll send you my mole chilli recipe. Get this offer while it’s hot!** [GET THE RECIPE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120052988/585075476/1189991872?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.11.26_Recipe_90do_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGQ0ZDg3NC1mMmNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=grJJBfmoHC3UZV5vDGgge1kYOuWNITsnKtgdr13zg2M=) If you haven’t had the pleasure of eating a meal with mole sauce – it’s a spicy but also chocolatey flavor found in a lot of Mexican cooking... and it’s like nothing else. With everything going on, I’ve been thinking about conversations at Thanksgivings with my Democrat mom and Republican dad. We didn’t always agree, but we didn’t resort to threats and insults. It was about finding solutions to the problems we faced, no matter where they came from. The silence of too many of my colleagues in Congress over the past week speaks volumes. No matter how low Trump goes, they still won’t perform their duty as a check and balance on him. That’s why together, we’re not only flipping the House – we’re bringing a wave of fresh leaders to Washington, D.C. _who will actually respect the Constitution!_ [_**So, please, make a donation to fuel our organizing efforts, and I’ll send you one of my favorite recipes →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120052989/585075510/-43802086?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.11.26_Recipe_90do_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGQ0ZDg3NC1mMmNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=grJJBfmoHC3UZV5vDGgge1kYOuWNITsnKtgdr13zg2M=) Thank you so much, and have a great Thanksgiving! – Emily | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120052990/585075511/131447847?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.11.26_Recipe_90do_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGQ0ZDg3NC1mMmNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=grJJBfmoHC3UZV5vDGgge1kYOuWNITsnKtgdr13zg2M=&emci=b0d4d874-f2ca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=bdd4d874-f2ca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=23483442) Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress. Now, Emily is fighting for WA working families in D.C. and organizing to take back the House. _**Can you chip in $6 or any amount and join our team?**_ [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120052991/585075512/1120488449?refcode2=footer&amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.11.26_Recipe_90do_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGQ0ZDg3NC1mMmNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=grJJBfmoHC3UZV5vDGgge1kYOuWNITsnKtgdr13zg2M=)

clean_body: If you chip in to my campaign today (any amount), I’ll send you my mole chilli recipe. Get this offer while it’s hot! | Peter, I want to take a quick break from the news and talk about chilli. Specifically, this perfect cool-weather mole chilli I love to make for friends. If you chip in to my campaign today (any amount), I’ll send you my mole chilli recipe. Get this offer while it’s hot! = If you haven’t had the pleasure of eating a meal with mole sauce – it’s a spicy but also chocolatey flavor found in a lot of Mexican cooking... and it’s like nothing else. With everything going on, I’ve been thinking about conversations at Thanksgivings with my Democrat mom and Republican dad. We didn’t always agree, but we didn’t resort to threats and insults. It was about finding solutions to the problems we faced, no matter where they came from. The silence of too many of my colleagues in Congress over the past week speaks volumes. No matter how low Trump goes, they still won’t perform their duty as a check and balance on him. That’s why together, we’re not only flipping the House – we’re bringing a wave of fresh leaders to Washington, D.C. who will actually respect the Constitution! = Thank you so much, and have a great Thanksgiving! – Emily | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress. Now, Emily is fighting for WA working families in D.C. and organizing to take back the House. Can you chip in $6 or any amount and join our team? = Want to maximize your impact?Become a monthly donor to help us flip the House from red to blue! = Follow on: | | | | | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Democracy does not defend itself
body:
When women lead, democracy is stronger, families are safer, and our country is fairer. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120053523/585077666/-1510725204?sourceid=1057385&refcode=WUEFEK78_20251126_ClintonSurrogate_PL_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDBhMWJjMC1mMmNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v34z2K3oKX1CWNLCAI4ks904WDajT5geo2JdnRX1-rA=) Hi Peter, it's Hillary Clinton.

I've spent my life fighting alongside women who refuse to sit down or be silenced. And I can tell you this with absolute certainty: When women lead, democracy is stronger, families are safer, and our country is fairer.

**That's why EMILYs List matters more today than ever.**

EMILYs List has spent 40 years building a pipeline of Democratic pro-choice women ready to govern — and the impact of their work is real. clean_body: When women lead, democracy is stronger, families are safer, and our country is fairer. | = Hi Peter, it's Hillary Clinton. I've spent my life fighting alongside women who refuse to sit down or be silenced. And I can tell you this with absolute certainty: When women lead, democracy is stronger, families are safer, and our country is fairer. That's why EMILYs List matters more today than ever. EMILYs List has spent 40 years building a pipeline of Democratic pro-choice women ready to govern — and the impact of their work is real. In 2025, Democratic women delivered major victories that prove voters still believe in defending our fundamental freedoms, decency, and competence in leadership. These wins give us momentum heading into 2026, but only if we keep pushing. Right now, EMILYs List is working to close a critical end-of-month fundraising gap. They need to raise $20,000 today to stay on track — and they can't do it without us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If the past few years have taught us anything, it's that democracy does not defend itself. We defend it — with our voices, our votes, our organizing, and yes, with our resources. The opponents we're up against are organized, well-funded, and determined to roll back the clock on fundamental freedoms like women's rights and voting rights. They are counting on us to be tired, divided, or distracted. We cannot give them that victory. If you believe in a future where every woman controls her own body, where every vote counts, and where our democracy survives this moment — then I need you with us today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Onward! name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Another AOC, Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib & Jasmine Crockett
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Van Epps for Congress
body:
| | | | Peter,
If you agree that we don’t need another AOC, Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, or Jasmine Crockett running around Congress, keep reading.

When I was Speaker of the House, I learned firsthand how **every single race matters**. Given how narrow the GOP majority is now, just _**one vote**_ could decide whether we pass more of President Trump’s America First agenda or see it stall out.

**That’s why I’m writing to you today about a critical special election on December 2nd in Tennessee.**

**Matt Van Epps, a West Point graduate, combat veteran, and America First Patriot who has been endorsed by President Trump himself is going up against a radical Leftist they are already calling “the AOC of Tennessee."**

|
---

If we lose this race, it won’t just be a symbolic defeat – _**it could destroy our House majority.**_

The Democrat running against him is so radical that she filmed herself mocking and bullying ICE agents during an immigration raid. She’d be just as bad as the rest of the “Squad” in Congress.

**That’s how high the stakes are.**

**Winning this race means strengthening our House majority, advancing President Trump’s policies, and building momentum for the midterms. Losing it means empowering the Left to block everything we’ve worked for.**

_We can’t let that happen._
**
[I’m asking you – as someone who knows what it takes to win tough races – to make a contribution right now to help push Matt Van Epps across the finish line.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/jjqzyoYnbgeMEoENke6gOQiyYPm8nl5fJQ2tyhI6-FLQy58r38Va7wx35V43emUC-v-YBjCMsymT5iT44H__Y9PXScvU_wMyYqN_M3vmYfvCXkS80dcJPG9M2mlYsO-OZTnYk-70pilwgzrVgZWle0ieYm4oOrcg8tcMK5g2_b-aohxZKj_9OJyOtXeOLi6etmGUtt1uS-8b6VdFzcyT9hK9y2U-4SYrEbRfKZHaVsq2nkcKuRx_KCYZ9MPFHUEmm8xE5-zFRWUHZTKp20YTSRKqXP0as9yyjJrqB5_sQjpL-TzyJolphX7-cOmD1aFbcHrgg64CTgjCp9eb7ykXNq90Q1GRKzzFcnAr9u6BudqQaKDlOm57IIhbMNahnJp7swt9bLgWYSP-FmJCc1q_0TzcI_9YsJ9HZsEJMgwDLm9wfQps44H27x-leC2a6u1eRSOcO9HGJIw6Xt4Dff6xXd66g4t8UatTbmHADSD5q_LCz9QAGyHSAC_C3yqPEmMvSModzz7qGyd7YXNNnYQQYIa-NJcbX9c7RtXr1ZVLm775PgyMpmp08VAKFiMzQRVNTlY3Ya3dK-4etfyB7Dp1JhRWJayucCQKFqag62H6ILWFYa7sfK3lynK2PKWZUglcCI9ueEvPrLk8ejhvA6jj52nXm3P5JzzxtKyEbOyC96211Aeh3-Iw7mSQOu3NVqLGNcAHdqQnz-e9tPdLHhRxxC1i5Q/jmh5A0dEycwjaXNp9Pziz7ORAHIPFlSu/15)**
This race is a test for our movement. Let’s prove once again that the American people stand with President Trump and the America First agenda.

Thank you for your leadership and support,

Your friend,
Newt Gingrich

name: David Hogg
subject: You have my thanks, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Thank you.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251126-1&t=1&akid=2884%2E587540%2EDi0bld)
Before we all (hopefully) log off for the holiday, I wanted to take a moment to say:
**THANK YOU, Peter.**
When we launched Leaders We Deserve back in 2023, it was a leap of faith. We launched this organization with little more than the $5 I gave to our ActBlue right before we launched just to test that it was working. Turning a dream into reality is never easy, but this was certainly a risk. Usually when a major political organization is launched, it has hundreds of thousands, if not millions, of dollars already secured. We didn’t. But because you all believed in this dream, we now exist to elect young people across the country and give our generation something it has rarely had... hope. Hope that one day our government won’t be controlled by the same special interests it’s supposed to protect the American people from. Hope that our generation will take power and not just be younger versions of the many corrupt and ineffective leaders we have there now. Hope that’s made possible by you.
We knew there were young people across this country ready to lead, and we believed that if we gave them the tools, the mentorship, and the support they deserved, they could change everything. They could upend the status quo.
We weren’t wrong. But the only reason this organization has grown into what it is today — the wins, headlines, candidates we’ve backed — is because of _you._
Your belief in this mission is the reason I get to dedicate my life to electing the next generation of progressive leaders. That’s not something I take for granted. Not just because of what you have enabled us to do, but because of the hope you are helping to give to our generation through candidates we helped elect, like Molly Cook in Texas or Zohran Mamdani in New York City. I believe it is that hope that will bring our country to a better day, because in order to fix something, you have to believe it is fixable in the first place. With candidates like Molly and Zohran, we tell our generation that while they know our politics is broken, at least there are a growing number of young people who represent us, not special interests, and are fighting to fix the broken system.
So wherever you are this week, whether you’re spending time with family, chosen family, or just catching a moment of rest, I hope you know how thankful I am to be in this fight with you. You remind me every day that there are people out there who believe we can do better. Who believe we must do better. **Together we will.**
With gratitude today and every day,
David
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251126-1&t=2&refcode2=2884_587540_Di0bld&akid=2884%2E587540%2EDi0bld)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2884%2E587540%2EDi0bld)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2884%2E587540%2EDi0bld)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003

Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference:](https://substack.com/redirect/2f7dd7c3-2213-47f2-a47f-fc31871121d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2f7dd7c3-2213-47f2-a47f-fc31871121d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
I had the incredible Amanda Nelson of _Amanda 's Mild Takes_ on with me today, and we went deep right from the jump. This one moves--Mark Kelly, Comey, Zohran, Trump's ego spirals, the economy, the fear machine, all of it. And honestly? We got real about how people are actually feeling in this moment. It's grounded, human, and hopeful in the ways we all need right now. You don't want to miss this one.
* * *
### **Timestamps**
* **00:06:48** -- Amanda breaks down the "Seditious Six" meltdown and why MAGA elevating Mark Kelly might be the biggest unforced error of the year.
* **00:14:58** -- We dig into the real economic pain points--housing, healthcare, energy--and how Trump's policies are actively making everything worse.
* **00:23:04** -- A sharp, funny, brutally honest look at the Zohran-Trump meeting and what it tells us about bullies, power, and New York politics.
* **00:31:11** -- Amanda walks through her "L's" series and the surprising amount of resistance actually working behind the scenes.
* **00:37:52** -- A wide-open, vulnerable conversation on fear, panic, faith, moral leadership, and what it means to stay grounded in a chaotic year.

* * *
This conversation hits that sweet spot we aim for--substance, clarity, context, and a reminder that we're not powerless. If you care about understanding this moment without doom or denial, this is essential listening. And if you value honest, smart conversations like this, help me keep them going.

With urgency,
--Mike

name: Stasha Rhodes, United for Democracy
subject: Declaring everything an emergency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
Even the right-wingers were like, “Um, are you sure?” | |
---
Peter, **If Trump loses his tariffs case at the Supreme Court, it won’t be because the Court has joined the resistance. It will be because even the MAGA justices couldn’t find a justification for his argument.** According to reporting on the oral arguments the Court heard regarding Trump’s tariffs, even the right-wingers were deeply skeptical. Justice Neil Gorsuch said he struggled to see the government’s point of view. Justice Amy Coney Barrett basically said she didn’t think the president has the authority. **That’s because Trump is trying to say he can declare anything an emergency, and then use his emergency powers without having to go through Congress for approval.** If the Court sides with Trump—as they have so many times up to this point—they’ll be giving him a blank check to circumvent Congress entirely on basically any issue. **The MAGA justices have already given Trump the power of a king. They'd love to side with Trump on tariffs—they just might not find a way to.** [**We need to make sure the American people don't fall for the media's spin if the Supreme Court rules against Trump on tariffs. Watch and share our video breaking down the tariffs case now!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVZiCw9e1CjoAxuXDVyOgvCa98m9PBKS1QBKY1PVxkQABFMJYaIuWglehkDQtPka8ltW5VsfjCNsU9di8mPPkBgLYTFb_ODhsjCQePbIs4KGd6JsKSz2Ev4yedZkJDUiN1zDtnj_qK-iJvyBeAQ0RRMjY285x4Py9jw9FqTJ7hy6etgvs8kYyFZoVaHQ44-7AHkK4Efr2ylvQmMShG07YqJV4vyTJ7jyWJntxsEGXDkc6lY56b0yYZDDqK_NCXVGATVomS4W8MIVTxJwIOu4Zz0b5y81kFmHT6UQdM2uQkbL/4lx/GV3hxM4iSjiStBUUOz83KA/h0/h001.wdKgND3PJMfBPCMxhhHnE9XgOjDvbUVz1uvc5Ns7nUA) [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVZiCw9e1CjoAxuXDVyOgvCa98m9PBKS1QBKY1PVxkQA7XhrXyPkqCEHve-UArhLmcPJsgxKU7s7FvYFRY8Df9vZ_KlFG6ob-eVxHa64G-80OgEEtCv6hK975J4q_FLDELYmwzTSpeVIrJJY-BEpI1eDi6n4RVvyVMJwDDFawxvAoDFSU3Qcr_pKSBAzkRAAA-vfBMZlvIqPISzSWxScQr-kdwXoVB9JvHbhrfhruxoJE-awsVibNxzz3K-92IPgeOeKWHTweUBHEEwch86K0guHecwhLtJA-Vt-DP-JM0Hd/4lx/GV3hxM4iSjiStBUUOz83KA/h1/h001.AR1q0tjbBHOTxISHKO41FC3xvxxpOdEnjGa-NT6k6zQ) [WATCH THE VIDEO](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVZiCw9e1CjoAxuXDVyOgvCa98m9PBKS1QBKY1PVxkQAKHlsTU0lAjtxhzJNif8iwoIwmz8Wh-iMDW7ovo5oiP4fDT-lLN-XMjbtdbVtuZ64au0X5isIqGf9fsigyJFylCzJMkgOKy-3yj8_xmIiwQ6pKKsZvSVWJ3I-9r4q77jrMC99CgCAtA9jR2rLGlx0J8hYiDR2p2B1oh6DyUedwlmZXOhLRe3O0s2HkpyUCuny0tN_S5ScWOeZaTbkW13-hYTK73X9CLleG-P63L2-qaVDB2hluG_O-gp3gMNqOz2G/4lx/GV3hxM4iSjiStBUUOz83KA/h2/h001.YUTPdUGeyyGJHJ5dJoZbD82YAEbwBvKaWg6jhEhgYx0) The media is already gearing up to praise the Supreme Court for “reining Trump in” on tariffs. They’ll say the Supreme Court did this amazing thing—that they’re normal, they’re not hard-right-wing MAGA justices, they’re part of the resistance. **Don’t fall for it.** These are the same justices who told Trump he had presidential immunity from prosecution for crimes he commits. They stripped lower courts of the power to check his illegal executive orders. They overturned abortion. They are gutting the Voting Rights Act. **Let their history do the talking—and don’t celebrate them in the case that they couldn’t find a way to cave to Trump this time.** [**This is why United for Democracy is leading the charge on the response to the Supreme Court—so we can set the record straight! Virginians deserve a holiday without MAGA price hikes.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120054965/585081710/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWVkMDlmMy1mNWNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uSmbKMmo9tpm9dn5hK5aHOIu9tySht4-UZ_UKbs57AU=&emci=d3c4214f-60c9-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b9ed09f3-f5ca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=31008101)

Hi Peter, Tomorrow, families across Virginia will gather around their Thanksgiving tables. But this year, too many households are feeling the impact of something they never voted for: soaring costs fueled by Trump’s tariffs. New analyses show that Trump’s tariff agenda could add up to **$2,600** a year to a household’s grocery bill, a price hike that hits working families the hardest. Turkey prices, baking goods, vegetables, and many other essentials that bring this holiday together all cost more because of the tariffs Republicans are still championing. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120054966/585081711/688982926?&refcode=E16357-20251126-TariffsThanksgiving-Image-DPVA-Economy&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWVkMDlmMy1mNWNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uSmbKMmo9tpm9dn5hK5aHOIu9tySht4-UZ_UKbs57AU=) This isn’t accidental. It’s part of a broader economic playbook that shifts the burden onto families. Virginia just overwhelmingly rejected that agenda. But Trump and his allies are already preparing for the next round. And if we want to protect families from rising costs, safeguard our progress, and push for real economic relief when the legislature reconvenes, we have to stay organized and fully resourced. That work starts now. Your support today helps us:
* Build the statewide infrastructure needed to counter MAGA economics.
* Support lawmakers advancing policies that lower costs for families.
* Keep our grassroots network active ahead of the 2026 midterms.

This Thanksgiving, Virginians deserve stability, not higher prices dictated by failed national policies. clean_body: Virginians deserve a holiday without MAGA price hikes. | Hi Peter, Tomorrow, families across Virginia will gather around their Thanksgiving tables. But this year, too many households are feeling the impact of something they never voted for: soaring costs fueled by Trump’s tariffs. New analyses show that Trump’s tariff agenda could add up to $2,600 a year to a household’s grocery bill, a price hike that hits working families the hardest. Turkey prices, baking goods, vegetables, and many other essentials that bring this holiday together all cost more because of the tariffs Republicans are still championing. = This isn’t accidental. It’s part of a broader economic playbook that shifts the burden onto families. Virginia just overwhelmingly rejected that agenda. But Trump and his allies are already preparing for the next round. And if we want to protect families from rising costs, safeguard our progress, and push for real economic relief when the legislature reconvenes, we have to stay organized and fully resourced. That work starts now. Your support today helps us: Build the statewide infrastructure needed to counter MAGA economics. Support lawmakers advancing policies that lower costs for families. * Keep our grassroots network active ahead of the 2026 midterms. This Thanksgiving, Virginians deserve stability, not higher prices dictated by failed national policies. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for everything you’ve done to move this Commonwealth forward, and for supporting us as we protect the progress we fought for together. name: Roy Cooper
subject: Yes, I have to ask for your help today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Can I count on you?
#
I’ll get right to the point, Peter —
My team sets finance metrics that we have to hit each month to keep our campaign on track. **Our goal is to raise $825,000 online in November, and with just four days left, we’re not where we need to be.**
**[Is there any amount you can split a contribution between our campaign and State Democrats Committee right now to get us on track to meet this goal?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98340?refcode=em20251126-9770&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9770%2E614464%2EK3n2if)**
Now, I know that fundraising isn’t what’s going to be the only thing that will win this campaign, Peter.
The real success comes from connecting with people and sharing our vision for this state — a vision that can get us back on track.
But your support _now_ is what will let us make those critical connections here in North Carolina. You see, we’re facing unified GOP efforts to defeat us — they’re already spending heavily against me, and experts expect that this race could become the first Senate election to ever cost a billion dollars or more.
That’s why the earlier your support comes in, the more of a difference you can make. A donation right here, right now — _today_ — will go further than at any other point from here on out. Our team can plan our expenses more effectively with more time, putting your donation to the best use.
**[Peter, can I count on you today? I’m personally asking you to split whatever fits in your budget between our campaign and State Democrats Committee to help meet this goal and flip this toss-up seat.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98340?refcode=em20251126-9770&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9770%2E614464%2EK3n2if)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, your donation to Roy Cooper and State Democrats Committee will process instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98341?refcode=em20251126-9770&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=9770%2E614464%2EK3n2if) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98341?refcode=em20251126-9770&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=4&akid=9770%2E614464%2EK3n2if) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98340?refcode=em20251126-9770&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=9770%2E614464%2EK3n2if)

name: Levi + Artie Fetterman
subject: 🐾 we love thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1001&akid=10441%2E434096%2EIlIc9Z ]John Fetterman

hiiii folks!!!!!

it’s levi 🐕 + artie 🐶 fetterman, official dogs with an official proclamation: this is the best holiday ever!!!! hear us out.

1. friends. family. pets!!!! so many pets. and table scraps (allegedly). we will not reveal our sources. 🍗👅

2. belly rubs for all. after dinner multiple humans lay on their backs and rubbed their bellies. finally they are doing self-care! 💯 recommend.

3. proper expressions of gratitude. everyone said they were thankful for us! ok maybe not by name, but there’s been a lot of “family,” and we are choosing to count that. jawn also said he’s thankful for you, his supporters. he is such a big sweetie, so we’re passing it along. 💛

ok but one weird thing: everyone keeps talking about a bird. suspicious. shouldn’t they be talking about dogs?? i am just saying.

anyway ... we had an idea. what if EVERY day were thanksgiving??

whole family home. infinite belly rubs. unlimited sneaky scrap potential. BUT for that to happen, jawn needs less work. jawn needs to get to his "fundraising goal" for the month. if our 3rd favorite human (that’s u 💕) chips in today, maybe that could happen???

can u help us out with our plan and throw jawn a bone?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52349?t=1002&akid=10441%2E434096%2EIlIc9Z

plus, you’ll help him keep fighting for important stuff – like democracy, working people, and maybe even that bird. idk we’re new to politics but pretty sure we saw him on tv with the president?? 👀

ok love u bye,

levi + artie fetterman 🐾💙
U.S. Senate Dogs from Pennsylvania

Peter,

I ran for Congress to stand up against extremism and fight to protect Rhode Islanders. This is a promise I’ve never wavered on, which is why I’m now fighting to protect Rhode Island from my opponent Victor Mellor.

Last week, the Providence Journal reported that Mellor was arrested in both Rhode Island and Florida for incidents of domestic violence.

He also proudly brags about violently storming the Capitol on January 6. And he runs an “education program” in Florida where kids as young as SEVEN are taught to fire guns.

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: Don’t let them flip this seat. While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = We’ve made incredible progress this year. Voters across the country — and right here in California — stood up for democracy and our shared values. = | | = California’s 25th District is one of the most competitive in America — and Republicans are already flooding it with cash. The NRCC has officially made this a top-tier target for 2026. They’re gearing up with attack ads. They’re recruiting extremist candidates. They’re determined to flip this seat and bolster their slim majority. We can’t afford to wait — and we can’t afford to fall behind. Every single dollar matters right now. Your donation fuels the ground game, powers voter outreach, and pushes back against the Republican money machine. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing strong, Ruiz HQ | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =. Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 United States

subject: A Heartfelt Thanksgiving Wish
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Warren A
body:
May God Bless Each and Every One of You

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ac002b6f43b8/warren-howell-the-only-candidate-with-a-real-plan-for-harris-county-17459193?e=7c92d84deb)
---
[|

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |
# _Happy Thanksgiving To All!_
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://howellforharriscounty.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8c3a643a45a6e2b06d8f050&id=84b647b443&e=7c92d84deb)
| | | | | | | | | | | |

**I wanted to take a moment this Thanksgiving and****share a memory from my childhood.** When I was a young boy in Sunday School class here in Houston, our teacher had asked us to reflect on the gifts that we’re truly thankful for. It struck me deeply as I realized that God has given me the ability to connect with people from every walk of life.
It’s why I can sit with a homeless neighbor one moment, and a corporate leader the next — and communicate with each in an honest, respectful, and meaningful way.
That blessing has shaped how I approach service and will guide me as your next County Judge, working to achieve an agenda that strengthens Harris County as a place to live, work, build a business, and raise a family.
**Wishing each of you a** _**Warm and Blessed Thanksgiving.**_
See My full plan to _MAKE HARRIS COUNTY GREAT AGAIN_ on the campaign website. [ _**👉 www.howellforharriscounty.com.**_](https://howellforharriscounty.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8c3a643a45a6e2b06d8f050&id=a1dd1b78d3&e=7c92d84deb)
Join our winning team and help lead Harris County to a brighter future with leadership that **WORKS FOR THE PEOPLE!**

You there, friend? It’s Jay.
I’m out running a few errands between meetings, and my finance director, Ben, just called to let me know that we’re falling behind where we need to be for our end-of-month fundraising goal.
I’ll be honest, I really don’t like sending notes like this. But these benchmarks mean a lot, no matter if we want to talk about them or not. Every dollar we raise right now will help ensure I’ve got the strongest possible start in the AG’s office on day one.
So I’ve got to ask: can you chip in $15 today to help us catch up? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_pre-inauguration-em_q42025?amount=15]

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: Taxpayers don’t owe Donald Trump a dime
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
**BREAKING: Jasmine Crockett introduces the “No Presidential Payouts Act”**
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/3522?c0=lrp-em-spl-jasmine.m_oN6Q&refcode=SBD_LRP_EM_FR_Tier1_112625_D1_S1_Jasmine&t=1&akid=5673%2E196590%2E4jH6_p)
Y’all, it’s Jasmine Crockett.
In case Donald Trump or any of his MAGA sycophants are reading this, let me be 100% clear: **Taxpayers don’t owe Donald Trump a dime for his legal mess.**
While families across this country are stretching every dollar just to keep up with rent and grocery bills, this man is out here trying to squeeze **_$230 million_** out of the federal government to pay his own lawyers.
_You read that right._ Donald Trump wants the American people -- the very folks he’s been attacking and ignoring -- to cover his legal bills.
**That’s why I introduced the No Presidential Payouts Act, because your tax dollars should serve you -- the people -- not protect a President’s pocket or bail out a billionaire with too many court dates.**
[**And that’s why I’m working overtime to win back the House for Democrats -- so we can provide the check on Donald Trump’s power that our country so desperately needs right now. But to get the job done, I need your support. So please, split $25 or more between my campaign and The Long Run PAC, and let’s get to work. >>**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/3522?c0=lrp-em-spl-jasmine.m_oN6Q&refcode=SBD_LRP_EM_FR_Tier1_112625_D1_S1_Jasmine&t=2&akid=5673%2E196590%2E4jH6_p)
**I’m not afraid to call this what it is:** brazen corruption from the man who’s supposed to be leading our country. And I’ll be damned if we let him get away with it.
But the truth is that fighting people like Donald Trump takes resources and grassroots power. **And I need you in this fight with me.**
[**Every dollar you chip in helps me keep pushing back against this corruption, holding these folks accountable, and making sure our government works for the people, not the powerful. Let’s send a message loud enough for Trump to hear from his courthouse: we’re not paying your bills, and we’re not backing down.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/3522?c0=lrp-em-spl-jasmine.m_oN6Q&refcode=SBD_LRP_EM_FR_Tier1_112625_D1_S1_Jasmine&t=3&akid=5673%2E196590%2E4jH6_p)

clean_body: BREAKING: Jasmine Crockett introduces the “No Presidential Payouts Act” Y’all, it’s Jasmine Crockett. In case Donald Trump or any of his MAGA sycophants are reading this, let me be 100% clear: Taxpayers don’t owe Donald Trump a dime for his legal mess. While families across this country are stretching every dollar just to keep up with rent and grocery bills, this man is out here trying to squeeze $230 million out of the federal government to pay his own lawyers. You read that right. Donald Trump wants the American people -- the very folks he’s been attacking and ignoring -- to cover his legal bills. That’s why I introduced the No Presidential Payouts Act, because your tax dollars should serve you -- the people -- not protect a President’s pocket or bail out a billionaire with too many court dates. I’m not afraid to call this what it is: brazen corruption from the man who’s supposed to be leading our country. And I’ll be damned if we let him get away with it. But the truth is that fighting people like Donald Trump takes resources and grassroots power. And I need you in this fight with me. name: Patrick J. Murphy
subject: From the Front with Patrick J. Murphy: Engaging the Conversation and the Community
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/106220/images/PJM_Logo.png]
From the Front with Patrick J. Murphy: Leadership, Gratitude, and a Week of Service
Hi Friends,
Coming into Thanksgiving with a grateful heart after another meaningful week of work across the country, and wanted to share how our collective efforts on leadership and service are making an impact. Here is a look at some of this week’s highlights.
Looking Ahead to Baltimore
We’re excited to host the Army-Navy Conference [https://www.eventbrite.com/e/2025-army-navy-policy-conference-tickets-1636746245079?aff=oddtdtcreator&emci=d6777dbc-fcc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=aa9c6320-04c7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=20196921] for the fourth consecutive year. On December 12 at the Johns Hopkins Carey Business School, we’re bringing together the best thinkers, builders, and battle-tested leaders who define the modern Warrior Class. We’re honored to have fellow All American Paratrooper and Governor Wes Moore of Maryland serve as the keynote speaker.
A former 82nd Airborne Captain in the U.S. Army, Governor Moore truly embodies the Warrior Class mentality of principled leadership and service. The conference will focus on the timely and essential topic: "Why Americans Need More Warriors," reinforcing the values of discipline, integrity, and service that the veteran community brings to every sector of life.
Register here [https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119732504/584044028/-765362623?aff=oddtdtcreator&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDYyMjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWE5YzYzMjAtMDRjNy1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJwZXRlcmZveDEwMjJAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m5vHYDKWodfUXMX-v6iVRCqRIaG8lB_iKpRt86FbUcI=&emci=d6777dbc-fcc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=aa9c6320-04c7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=20196921]
https://www.instagram.com/reel/DRU-Mn3iVbE/?igsh=MW42NDF5ODV0dzQ3eA== [https://www.instagram.com/reel/DRU-Mn3iVbE/?igsh=MW42NDF5ODV0dzQ3eA==]
In the Media: Dissecting the Latest Economic Headwinds
On Tuesday, I joined The Story with Martha MacCallum on Fox News to discuss how Republicans and Democrats have wrestled over messaging on the one issue top of mind for families this Thanksgiving: affordability.
Our conversation covered how, while the holiday is about friends, family, and food, the real talk at the table will be about finances & how we need to come together to fix this vexing issue.
Watch the Full Episode of The Story Here [https://www.foxnews.com/video/6385586175112]
On Warrior Money: Turning Service into Success
This week on Warrior Money , we leaned into gratitude ahead of Thanksgiving and discussed the four pillars of vet stability: family, work, fitness, and purpose. We were also joined by Tyler Sweatt, CEO of Second Front Systems, who shared how he hires athletes and veterans into his company because of their preparation, discipline, and how doing 10K little things well drives excellence.
Watch the Full Episode of Warrior Money Here [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=K9Ks4K1KfOs&list=PLx28zU8ctIRq4s21MFggvp9vDtChW2cM4&index=1]
In the Classroom: Leadership Class at MCCC
Last week I was invited to chat grand strategy at Yale; this week I was honored to join Professor Dottie Miller’s class at Montgomery County Community College. Being surrounded by the future of America reminded me of how I got my start at community college. It is inspiring to see how bright all their futures are!
https://www.eventbrite.com/e/2025-army-navy-policy-conference-tickets-1636746245079?aff=oddtdtcreator [https://www.eventbrite.com/e/2025-army-navy-policy-conference-tickets-1636746245079?aff=oddtdtcreator]
On Substack: The Psychological Edge of Gratitude
In today’s Substack column, I break down how gratitude sharpens situational awareness, strengthens teams, and improves judgment. Neuroscience backs this up: gratitude calms the fear centers of the brain and activates the parts responsible for long-view thinking and strategic clarity. In combat, it can save lives. In a boardroom, it can save teams and drive results.
Read the Substack here [https://patrickmurphypa.substack.com/p/the-psychological-edge-of-gratitude]
Looking Back: Last Week's TMA Conference
Following up from last week's TMA Conference with Secretary Blinken, he emphasized the importance of global responsibility and leadership in our work and told the story about how his Jewish stepfather broke away from a concentration camp into the Bavarian woods to be later saved by an American tank battalion in WWII. He was awesome.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/106220/images/sec%20blinkenn.png]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/106220/images/sec%20blinken%202.png]
As we head into Thanksgiving, I hope we all take a moment to look for the good, say it out loud, and give it away generously.
Thank you for being part of this mission.
Happy Thanksgiving!
P.S. Please join us to kickoff Army-Navy week as we support Navy pilot and Wharton graduate Rebecca Bennett on her run for Congress in New Jersey (NJ-07) at 5:00 PM to 6:30 PM on Monday the 8th in Philly. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/111225rb4c?refcode=button]
Hon. Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Army Under Secretary

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/JcTKjLm2l0SduvIvv8SeUg2?unsubscribedata=BNeNruwhhMhkH6LCC7u04as5soyCHMnqeaDUF808V9rkOlgPryMGdFX3ULM%2BFQCG%2BQFQwCXyJufp%2BlcqxXGnq5dhQ2ozqEMLIjWq1zhmjWdPEA7xv02BsPaoYhlvhMS1oGTTAkGKPpaNDC1jt1KPQObBDe%2BpfCBwCJdp2BaHZGTP1Srt2pfcvchBsg86YozjGfLnNu7CMdxlirVzl6%2FUSDCdbGWGMsqiTeFLh5k%2BrxzVDGoMicwvhGTB3tyRjVkSsL2icR%2BgVqw%2BmCXcAsWdyYeWTdLaYPyoFiGXTcmkFxfpvqmCuZDhOhA0ecoQMVfu6P7Mfrhousi6AZqqpNjo2w9XYq1%2FGnx0J%2B87%2Bm%2Bi1BWcID8EiYToi6pueci2POFZl1%2FAMgufZ2%2B8a86TBh290itOeBwz8PoiiNVeoCES9iOgp26EtokLcTQGk1UOxn5i .

name: Congressman Jim McGovern
subject: Gratitude for our community this Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Dear Peter,
Thanksgiving brings us together with loved ones to express gratitude for our many blessings around a delicious meal, prepared in community with friends and family.
This Thanksgiving I'm reminded that food is joy. Food is love. Food is community. Food is a celebration of our cultural diversity. Food is a basic human right.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/monte%20march.jpeg] And yet, 47 million people in our country--the richest country in the history of the world--go to bed hungry. We have the food, the resources, and the know-how to solve this preventable problem, but yet we lack the political will to address it.
This Monday and Tuesday, I joined anti-hunger activists in walking 43 miles from Springfield to Greenfield to raise money and awareness for the Food Bank of Western Massachusetts. But food banks and soup kitchens aren’t the long term fix to end hunger. That’s why I’m working every day for working families like the one I grew up in to build the political will to end hunger.
In 2022, I teamed up with the Biden-Harris Administration to draft a National Strategy on Hunger, Nutrition, and Health--a bold roadmap to end hunger and reduce diet-related disease by 2030. We got to work implementing that plan, and started to make some real progress toward improving food security for everyone.
However, the Trump administration and Republicans in Congress gutted our promising work at improving food security and instead tore apart our safety net to fund tax breaks for the richest people in our country.
Trump and his allies in Congress just made the largest cut to food assistance in American history--raiding $186 billion from the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program by slashing these basic food benefits and cutting veterans, families with teenagers, older adults, homeless people, and former foster youth off of benefits. And Trump is the first president to illegally withhold food benefits from people during the recent Republican shutdown. To me, this is just unquestionably cruel.
Democrats in Congress continue fighting these cuts, just as incredible leaders here in Massachusetts work to implement anti-hunger initiatives locally to support people across our Commonwealth.
We can't give up. Please join me this Thanksgiving in committing to work even harder to improve access to nutritious, local food and end hunger now.
Yours in the fight,
Congressman Jim McGovern
https://www.facebook.com/massdems [https://www.facebook.com/massdems] https://twitter.com/massdems [https://twitter.com/massdems] https://instagram.com/massdems [https://instagram.com/massdems] https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems [https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems]
Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
Massachusetts Democratic Party
11 Beacon St
Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108
United States

body:
|
# [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120057201/585088676/1733485174?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGRiMTU4NTMtZmFjYS1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jotkHP47f0HCNMg-IZqVuJd8s8rgTxe9GcFWIEyK34c=)
Hi there, Before everyone logs off for the holiday, I want to take a moment to say thank you. This campaign is powered by people. Whether you’ve chipped in a few dollars, shared a post, knocked doors, or simply stayed informed -- your support means everything to me. I’m especially thankful to be running in the community that raised me. It’s not every day a public school kid from the Central Valley gets to fight for working families in Congress. But thanks to you, we’re building something real. I’m looking forward to spending time with loved ones, overeating my mom’s cooking, and reflecting on what this fight is all about. name: Cole Strehlow, CEO of The Flyover
subject: Biggest Bonus Ever Starts Now
body:
Our Black Friday/Cyber Monday investor bonuses are live.

---
| | |
---
| |
#
---
Dear _Flyover_ Family, As we head into Thanksgiving week, I want to share something important -- and time-sensitive -- with our _Flyover_ family.

As you know, we fell just short of 2,000 investors. 59 short to be exact. Starting today and running through Black Friday and Cyber Monday, we're offering the largest bonus-share package in _Flyover_ history for [all new investments](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0b-OozAQBvCnMV0i_wGTFC7uDtHl0px0pWXsgfjO2JE9gPL2K3azqbbc-jfzaT7N34u-GB98nH6bGRSOSTtw3hoEpyNsJQAiZD34aYKCQ4pLgRVyQZOxxLRpTnlzYOzApf7Vj0sI3WufscqpEYCDqECxVtbsJNoTr26qpQboMNaWNkYMTQ0WRiOFBG4lnAdaebUHM8YlO1NB-bEduZPnk2ucGZytBakpOI8pH_8lH_EGY3ikFfLRprkK6oZ4L0T8ILwnvPdxhYJfTO4s-gVnXdKSLRDRve4nXO4wg_PLTER33SK4wwWcN0-yZr4bP0Uiuv4j8xNSRIhIRPczGPu_z96Zx9MQ8p72p792eu_Hmyord998CL7IltR0mo0P7z3w-z-yKv4WAAD__-atq68). **Black Friday / Cyber Monday Investor Bonus** For a limited time, every investor receives:
* +10% Black Friday/Cyber Monday Bonus
* +5% Reader Bonus
* +Up to 10% Large-Investor Bonus

That's up to 25% in bonus shares, available only during this holiday window.
* * *
**A Quick Example (What This Means for You)** At our current share price of $2 per share, here's what a typical investment looks like:
* A $1,000 investment normally buys 500 shares.
* With the full 15% holiday bonus, you receive an extra 75 shares.
* Total: 575 shares.

In other words, your $1,000 investment instantly becomes $1,150 in share value--a 15% jump on day one.
* * *
**Why This Matters** I believe America needs something better than what legacy media offers:
unbiased, no-spin, common-sense news for people who are tired of being lectured, manipulated, or misled. Your investment helps us expand state editions, hire more journalists, grow our national reach, and continue building the alternative millions of Americans have been searching for. And the impact of our early investors has already made a huge difference:
* Readers have grown from 2.5 million to 3.7 million
* Monthly revenue is up 24%
* Podcast views/listens up 129%
* 400,000 new readers in the last 30 days alone
* State editions are booming across TX, FL, AZ, CO, OH, and beyond

Every one of these milestones is the direct result of our early reader-investors.
* * *
**Why We 're Offering This Now** We recently finished a 12-day sprint to reach 2,000 reader-owners. We came incredibly close, but fell short.

This Black Friday/Cyber Monday bonus package is designed to help us sore far beyond this goal. If you've been considering an investment, this is the best opportunity we've ever offered. Invest during Black Friday/Cyber Monday and receive up to 25% bonus shares. **[Invest in _The Flyover_ ->](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0b-OozAQBvCnMV0i_wGTFC7uDtHl0px0pWXsgfjO2JE9gPL2K3azqbbc-jfzaT7N34u-GB98nH6bGRSOSTtw3hoEpyNsJQAiZD34aYKCQ4pLgRVyQZOxxLRpTnlzYOzApf7Vj0sI3WufscqpEYCDqECxVtbsJNoTr26qpQboMNaWNkYMTQ0WRiOFBG4lnAdaebUHM8YlO1NB-bEduZPnk2ucGZytBakpOI8pH_8lH_EGY3ikFfLRprkK6oZ4L0T8ILwnvPdxhYJfTO4s-gVnXdKSLRDRve4nXO4wg_PLTER33SK4wwWcN0-yZr4bP0Uiuv4j8xNSRIhIRPczGPu_z96Zx9MQ8p72p792eu_Hmyord998CL7IltR0mo0P7z3w-z-yKv4WAAD__-atq68)** Thank you for reading _The Flyover_ , for believing in honest journalism, and for being part of this movement to rebuild trust in the news. **Happy Thanksgiving!
** Cole

name: Voter Action Project
subject: The end result of years of attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Trump’s order is the culmination of years of attacks on absentee ballots and vote-by-mail. In the months before the 2020 election, Trump repeatedly spread disinformation and conspiracy theories about the legitimacy of mail-in ballots as he campaigned for reelection. With MAGA angling for total control, Trump wants to end their use forever.
RUSH $25 or more right now to help us defend the use of mail-in ballots across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112625_1&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Democracy Docket: With New Order, Trump Tries to Kill Off Vote By Mail [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112625_1&amount=25]
We're going to keep hammering this home, Team, because the mainstream media continues to ignore this executive order and how it will change our elections forever.
President Donald Trump's massive anti-voting executive order has sent lawmakers, election officials, and voting rights advocates into a frenzy. One provision focuses on a goal that for years has been a borderline obsession for MAGA: Cracking down on voting by mail .
For background: After every election in which he's been a candidate or in power, Trump has raged over the use of mail-in ballots in general and ballot deadlines in particular . He's tried to claim fraud for every single ballot counted after Election Day.
So of course, this order directs Attorney General Pam Bondi to “ take all necessary action ” against any states that count absentee or mail-in ballots received after Election Day.
This order makes it clear that the MAGA crew will do anything they can to codify their power permanently and silence the will of the people by suppressing and eliminating the votes we cast.
We've got to keep fighting and work to protect our elections and our fundamental right to vote. Step up with $25 or whatever you can today and help us defend vote by mail across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112625_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112625_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112625_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112625_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112625_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112625_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112625_1&amount=35]
We all know that mail-in voting laws are about ballot accessibility, making it easier for voters to participate in our elections . Elderly voters, the disabled, our military service members -- they all vote by mail.
Mail-in voting has happened dating back to the Civil War. It's always been safe and secure, mail-in voting fraud is supremely rare. States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. It's been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic.
Our partners at VoteAmerica said it best: “ There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access, reject ballots without postmarks, or refuse to count ballots that arrive after Election Day. If the administration moves forward with these proposals, they will effectively disenfranchise older voters, rural voters, and military voters. ”
Opponents of voting rights have proven they'll go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and make sure that they stay in power. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can to fight their unending desire for control and protect mail-in voting? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112625_1&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

clean_body: Trump’s order is the culmination of years of attacks on absentee ballots and vote-by-mail. In the months before the 2020 election, Trump repeatedly spread disinformation and conspiracy theories about the legitimacy of mail-in ballots as he campaigned for reelection. With MAGA angling for total control, Trump wants to end their use forever. RUSH $25 or more right now to help us defend the use of mail-in ballots across the country >> [] Voter Action Project [] Democracy Docket: With New Order, Trump Tries to Kill Off Vote By Mail [] We're going to keep hammering this home, Team, because the mainstream media continues to ignore this executive order and how it will change our elections forever. President Donald Trump's massive anti-voting executive order has sent lawmakers, election officials, and voting rights advocates into a frenzy. One provision focuses on a goal that for years has been a borderline obsession for MAGA: Cracking down on voting by mail . For background: After every election in which he's been a candidate or in power, Trump has raged over the use of mail-in ballots in general and ballot deadlines in particular . He's tried to claim fraud for every single ballot counted after Election Day. So of course, this order directs Attorney General Pam Bondi to “ take all necessary action ” against any states that count absentee or mail-in ballots received after Election Day. This order makes it clear that the MAGA crew will do anything they can to codify their power permanently and silence the will of the people by suppressing and eliminating the votes we cast. We've got to keep fighting and work to protect our elections and our fundamental right to vote. Step up with $25 or whatever you can today and help us defend vote by mail across the country >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] We all know that mail-in voting laws are about ballot accessibility, making it easier for voters to participate in our elections . Elderly voters, the disabled, our military service members -- they all vote by mail. Mail-in voting has happened dating back to the Civil War. It's always been safe and secure, mail-in voting fraud is supremely rare. States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. It's been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic. Our partners at VoteAmerica said it best: “ There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access, reject ballots without postmarks, or refuse to count ballots that arrive after Election Day. If the administration moves forward with these proposals, they will effectively disenfranchise older voters, rural voters, and military voters. ” Opponents of voting rights have proven they'll go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and make sure that they stay in power. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can to fight their unending desire for control and protect mail-in voting? >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? Peter, We’re just days away from our critical end-of-month deadline. If you’re anything like me, you’ve probably gotten a lot of messages like this one asking for your support. And most will say the same thing: _this deadline matters._ But here’s why it _really_ , _really_ matters for this unique Senate race in Georgia, where I am the only Democratic incumbent Senator seeking reelection in a state Trump won:
1. **WE HAVE TO SHOW STRENGTH.** There are three Republican candidates running against me, and national Republicans have already spent millions of dollars on TV and digital ads attacking me. A strong showing in November proves to my opponents (and their Super PAC allies) — that our movement in Georgia is thriving and unstoppable.

2. **THERE’S NO TIME TO LOSE.** To win decisively, my team is already building a huge statewide campaign. That means more rallies. More organizers. More outreach — and early outreach — to voters in every corner of the state. That all takes resources right now. We’re building and we’ve got to keep building bigger and faster every day.

[So please, if you can, use this link to contribute anything you can to the Democratic Party of Georgia and my reelection campaign in Georgia before our end-of-month deadline on Sunday. I don’t love asking for money. I don’t think _anyone_ does.
But the reality is I have to. I can’t win without you.
_Citizens United_ opened the dam for limitless dark money to flood into elections.
_That’s a big part of why Congress is broken and corrupted. It’s why we have really expensive elections._
And also it’s why campaigns like mine have to build serious grassroots fundraising operations from Day One.
_I need your help, Peter!_
**I am literally MAGA’s #1 target.**
They will spare no expense and try every dirty trick.
Yes, this election will be tough.
But I know how to win tough fights. I’ve done it before.

If you’re anything like me, you’ve probably gotten a lot of messages like this one asking for your support. And most will say the same thing: this deadline matters. But here’s why it really , really matters for this unique Senate race in Georgia, where I am the only Democratic incumbent Senator seeking reelection in a state Trump won: 1. WE HAVE TO SHOW STRENGTH. There are three Republican candidates running against me, and national Republicans have already spent millions of dollars on TV and digital ads attacking me. A strong showing in November proves to my opponents (and their Super PAC allies) — that our movement in Georgia is thriving and unstoppable. 2. THERE’S NO TIME TO LOSE. name: Beat Boebert
subject: This Thanksgiving could be the death of our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IhG05GuZUADoR1fcOZ_VgNqVoyL82t-j1QlxZDqVF_5OZDDTq4y2p2h5HeOc4SlhAaB8FEgOQNfvmFE1w9n2bWcUjVwhUWg93_MRc5kRALIMl1lkpY6nmlxUYSVTwzfAV9486t7i_SeQgQx5yisqqeuzjpt_s1b7u2KPdoWeaSajzxUGAyDpGeYCB-LDarb-slkXdUwCT5Q4nRRJxCaAU8tAYgahXeFm&c=cLzwbNx9lur_QaQmA3vO81-_nurB0cLHpLvhvAPgtJth_8fwYHQkIQ==&ch=FJC4ZZYhbqtn6bMX8yYzBhLE0DXhYyLylZO6hgGYlhS_zDv8O-cs6g==)
---
|

Peter,
Some campaigns rise or fall on big, dramatic moments like FEC deadlines, viral debate clips, or breaking news. Those days feel monumental because everyone is watching.
But campaigns aren't actually won on those days.
Campaigns are won on days like this--quiet, ordinary days that go unnoticed. Days where momentum is quietly either built...or lost.
And right now, we have a once in a lifetime opportunity to shock the world come 2026.
Lauren Boebert has never been more vulnerable than she is right now. She's in Congress because of just 546 votes. And last time Trisha faced her, our campaign delivered the single best Democratic performance this district has ever seen, outperforming Kamala Harris by six points in a red-wave election.
But opportunities like this don't stay open on their own.
Today, this plain, nothing-special Wednesday, carries more weight than most people will ever realize. Our fundraising has fallen behind pace. Thanksgiving is just one day away. After that, we hit the holiday stretch, which is notoriously brutal for fundraising.
If we slip behind now, even a little, it becomes exponentially harder to catch up. Every missed goal compounds and before you know it, that window of opportunity to defeat Boebert closes.
That's why we've set a critical goal for today: Raise $12,000 before midnight tonight. Missing this goal jeopardizes the best shot Democrats might ever have at defeating Boebert. And right now, we aren't even close to hitting the goal.

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, Some campaigns rise or fall on big, dramatic moments like FEC deadlines, viral debate clips, or breaking news. Those days feel monumental because everyone is watching. But campaigns aren't actually won on those days. Campaigns are won on days like this--quiet, ordinary days that go unnoticed. Days where momentum is quietly either built...or lost. And right now, we have a once in a lifetime opportunity to shock the world come 2026. Lauren Boebert has never been more vulnerable than she is right now. She's in Congress because of just 546 votes. And last time Trisha faced her, our campaign delivered the single best Democratic performance this district has ever seen, outperforming Kamala Harris by six points in a red-wave election. But opportunities like this don't stay open on their own. Today, this plain, nothing-special Wednesday, carries more weight than most people will ever realize. Our fundraising has fallen behind pace. Thanksgiving is just one day away. After that, we hit the holiday stretch, which is notoriously brutal for fundraising. If we slip behind now, even a little, it becomes exponentially harder to catch up. Every missed goal compounds and before you know it, that window of opportunity to defeat Boebert closes. That's why we've set a critical goal for today: Raise $12,000 before midnight tonight. Missing this goal jeopardizes the best shot Democrats might ever have at defeating Boebert. And right now, we aren't even close to hitting the goal. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Quiet days like this decide elections. Let's make today count.
