subject: Washington Wants Control Over Your Money. Here's How to Opt Out
body:
https://view.parlermailer.com/?qs=fa5bc41ada621fae109cfa27e1a86004b54c5ee4562ae71953ff1ca56a8dd55e5472d5761dc6f3241cb95059c2ac1fbf8a8233ea44c228cc2c87a6d5ac5909aad975a468791a635f2ac6d10b3e255355
View in browser
A Special Message from our SponsorPlease note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of Parler and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by Parler.
DM Intelligence
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

The Federal Reserve just printed $4.8 trillion in three years. Your savings account pays 0.5% while inflation runs at 8%. The math doesn't work in your favor. Meanwhile, every dollar you deposit goes straight into their system. They lend it out at 20%. You get 0.5%. They control when you can access it. They track every transaction. They decide what's "suspicious activity."

And now they're rolling out Central Bank Digital Currencies - programmable money they can freeze, expire, or tax at will. But a small group of Americans has figured out how to
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=4dfa91e220c868292346694fb6706cf6c1493ce6dadcdd3fd06afc62ea522c38ca501831d83a382a8a9d4acb21de5faff7b6a40d0b29d5ee
completely sidestep the traditional banking system .

They're using decentralized finance to become their own banks, collecting the same transaction fees that JPMorgan and Citigroup earn: 12-20% monthly returns, regardless of whether markets go up or down.

No permission needed. No middleman. No government oversight. Just complete financial autonomy.

While banks collapsed in 2023 and depositors scrambled to get their money out, these Americans had already moved their wealth outside the system. They weren't affected by bank failures, government freezes, or FDIC limits.

...They'd
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=4dfa91e220c868292346694fb6706cf6c1493ce6dadcdd3fd06afc62ea522c38ca501831d83a382a8a9d4acb21de5faff7b6a40d0b29d5ee
become their own banks .

The infrastructure is already built. Over 4,000 Americans are already using this system to generate passive income while maintaining complete control of their assets.

The question isn't whether Washington will protect your money.

The question is: Will you opt out before they take control of it?

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=4dfa91e220c868292346694fb6706cf6c1493ce6dadcdd3fd06afc62ea522c38ca501831d83a382a8a9d4acb21de5faff7b6a40d0b29d5ee
Watch the free training video to learn how to become your own bank

body:

Peter, I know many folks are packing up the car, grabbing last-minute ingredients at the grocery store, or settling in with friends and family for the holiday — so I’ll keep this brief. **As part of my daily gratitude practice, I try to write a few thank-you notes every day and today I’m using this quiet moment before the holiday to catch up on the ones that matter most, including this one to you.** Before we all disconnect a bit for Thanksgiving,**I wanted to reach out personally and say thank you**. Your support — your belief in people-first politics and a stronger, more hopeful future — is what fuels everything we’re building together. I never take it for granted. As we head into a pivotal election year, I’m asking if you can take a moment — before the holiday rush fully kicks in — to chip in and ensure we can keep showing up for the issues that matter most to you and your family. **[Can you click here and make a contribution today to help our campaign head into 2026 with the resources we need?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120058188/585092241/1883182861?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTU2YTQ1NS1mZGNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K-bp5YwLy2gwLOfBT4TNo4ORy_322PJ68dai-WMVvJE=)** This time of year always reminds me how grateful I am to represent Vermonters and to have a national community standing with me as we take on tough fights in Washington. Whether it’s protecting our democracy, defending fundamental rights, or pushing for an economy that works for everyone — **I couldn’t do any of it without you in my corner.** While you’re traveling, cooking, or just taking a breath before tomorrow’s festivities, I hope you feel proud of what we’ve accomplished together — and the work still ahead. Your support means more than you know. [**If you’re able, before you sign off for the long weekend, here’s another chance to support this work as we prepare for a big year ahead: Click here to chip in any amount — your support today will give us a strong start as we head into the holiday season and the crucial months ahead.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120058189/585092242/1883182861?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTU2YTQ1NS1mZGNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K-bp5YwLy2gwLOfBT4TNo4ORy_322PJ68dai-WMVvJE=) **Thank you for always having my back. Wishing you and your loved ones a safe, joyful, and restorative Thanksgiving.** With so much gratitude, — **Becca** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120058190/585092243/1883182861?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTU2YTQ1NS1mZGNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K-bp5YwLy2gwLOfBT4TNo4ORy_322PJ68dai-WMVvJE=)** | **[$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120058191/585092244/1883182861?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTU2YTQ1NS1mZGNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K-bp5YwLy2gwLOfBT4TNo4ORy_322PJ68dai-WMVvJE=)**

Peter, Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote _How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---

Peter, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**

name: Beat Boebert
subject: This Thanksgiving could be the death of our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bgwd7RDDw84qubOfSW6qn0elFRv8L-nNZeJ0JfYs_QvKvrZW5hG48TZLl5ArguFXAWhTiXiFEOv_h6qkCOz3OVX2W2S_sFxxyvtBLvH19RfmgKUqzF_qfiT9XD8kWumt9HspvsPXR7Aq_i84E9wKeQaMR_eYry1dJ1zSzvMwpAYid1D2eKK5udmXH1uikdU8ep236A-iKYxL6yGa-C9PpB2vCHlPN1vG&c=aVYIW2crgdIfbWkM5yaR5IFazOWrf4Js6FhgEioEe5-o6IyrY1r2Sg==&ch=ze_V_OS1tYk2zTFBi3WNvla47mbFPXC1IeT3WveFl5gB_4oH7_2SyA==)
---
|

Peter,
Some campaigns rise or fall on big, dramatic moments like FEC deadlines, viral debate clips, or breaking news. Those days feel monumental because everyone is watching.
But campaigns aren't actually won on those days.
Campaigns are won on days like this--quiet, ordinary days that go unnoticed. Days where momentum is quietly either built...or lost.
And right now, we have a once in a lifetime opportunity to shock the world come 2026.
Lauren Boebert has never been more vulnerable than she is right now. She's in Congress because of just 546 votes. And last time Trisha faced her, our campaign delivered the single best Democratic performance this district has ever seen, outperforming Kamala Harris by six points in a red-wave election.
But opportunities like this don't stay open on their own.
Today, this plain, nothing-special Wednesday, carries more weight than most people will ever realize. Our fundraising has fallen behind pace. Thanksgiving is just one day away. After that, we hit the holiday stretch, which is notoriously brutal for fundraising.
If we slip behind now, even a little, it becomes exponentially harder to catch up. Every missed goal compounds and before you know it, that window of opportunity to defeat Boebert closes.
That's why we've set a critical goal for today: Raise $12,000 before midnight tonight. Missing this goal jeopardizes the best shot Democrats might ever have at defeating Boebert. And right now, we aren't even close to hitting the goal.
[That's why we're asking you today: Can we count on you rush an urgent donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help us reach our $12,000 goal before midnight tonight and keep our campaign on track for a historic victory in 2026?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bgwd7RDDw84qubOfSW6qn0elFRv8L-nNZeJ0JfYs_QvKvrZW5hG48TZLl5ArguFX09P5-AMiLSdCn3oAQWbG0JTl04IW646l8VarbpIW4EtFP3HNx5V7bhDqtIjQg8prnMyRlmmkww4DAj1gY-DOjNsttGtrbUFAylBTZmCqWGTsRcNmE3-GAjCaMXYIQKc61X_LI_pl0BWx0f5Us05UoBmLkBs_wYAWt9B66se22OI=&c=aVYIW2crgdIfbWkM5yaR5IFazOWrf4Js6FhgEioEe5-o6IyrY1r2Sg==&ch=ze_V_OS1tYk2zTFBi3WNvla47mbFPXC1IeT3WveFl5gB_4oH7_2SyA==)
---

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, Some campaigns rise or fall on big, dramatic moments like FEC deadlines, viral debate clips, or breaking news. Those days feel monumental because everyone is watching. But campaigns aren't actually won on those days. Campaigns are won on days like this--quiet, ordinary days that go unnoticed. Days where momentum is quietly either built...or lost. And right now, we have a once in a lifetime opportunity to shock the world come 2026. Lauren Boebert has never been more vulnerable than she is right now. She's in Congress because of just 546 votes. And last time Trisha faced her, our campaign delivered the single best Democratic performance this district has ever seen, outperforming Kamala Harris by six points in a red-wave election. But opportunities like this don't stay open on their own. Today, this plain, nothing-special Wednesday, carries more weight than most people will ever realize. Our fundraising has fallen behind pace. Thanksgiving is just one day away. After that, we hit the holiday stretch, which is notoriously brutal for fundraising. If we slip behind now, even a little, it becomes exponentially harder to catch up. Every missed goal compounds and before you know it, that window of opportunity to defeat Boebert closes. That's why we've set a critical goal for today: Raise $12,000 before midnight tonight. Missing this goal jeopardizes the best shot Democrats might ever have at defeating Boebert. And right now, we aren't even close to hitting the goal. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Quiet days like this decide elections. Let's make today count. Team Trisha | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

name: Haley S.
subject: null, can you do me a favor?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
This will only take a minute

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1474%2E49239%2EA7vpYR)
| Hi, null! It's Haley.
---
I wanted to personally reach out because I noticed you haven't had the chance to fill out my priorities survey.
Would you do me a huge favor and take 60 seconds to fill it out now? The tech team did some wizardry and made you a personalized link: **[surveys.signforgood.com/Stevens-On-The-Road-Priorities-Survey/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9373?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=1474%2E49239%2EA7vpYR)**
Listening to regular folks is one of the most important – and fun! – parts of this campaign, so I'd love to hear from you.
Thanks so much, null.
Haley
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Haley Stevens**
Subject: I want to hear from you
| | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9374?t=3&akid=1474%2E49239%2EA7vpYR)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9373?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=1474%2E49239%2EA7vpYR)
Hi null, it’s Haley – just thinking back on my _Made in Michigan_ tour!
I had the chance to speak with so many incredible Michiganders, and each conversation reminded me why I’m running for Senate: to fight for the hardworking people who make this state great.
But I can’t talk to everyone in person, and that’s why I’m reaching out: **[Will you take 60 seconds to fill out my November Priorities Survey?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9373?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1474%2E49239%2EA7vpYR)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9373?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1474%2E49239%2EA7vpYR)
---
From rising costs to protecting Social Security to defending Michigan’s manufacturing jobs, I’ve heard a lot about what is keeping people up at night. But I genuinely want to know:**What’s on YOUR mind, null?**
[**We’re hoping to get 60 more responses from 18326 before midnight tonight –** can I count on you to take the survey now?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9373?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1474%2E49239%2EA7vpYR)
Grateful you're on this team,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9375?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=1474%2E49239%2EA7vpYR) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9374?t=9&akid=1474%2E49239%2EA7vpYR)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=10&akid=1474%2E49239%2EA7vpYR)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Tough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
This is important.
Hey, it’s Sarah! I need to share a quick, but important, update:
**Less than a year from now, I’ll be on the ballot for re-election** , and our campaign has set a goal of raising $45,000 this month to help us start 2026 strong.
But unfortunately, we’ve fallen behind.
**That would be tough any time, but our deadline is _this_ Sunday, and we’re expecting donations to slow down as folks begin to unplug for Thanksgiving.**
I don’t have billionaires I can call to make up the difference. Grassroots supporters like you keep me fighting in Congress and keep our campaign organizing at full strength year-round.
So I’m asking a little early:
**[Before you log off for this holiday, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can toward our $45,000 goal? This is one of the last major fundraising deadlines of my first year in Congress, and it’d mean a lot to me if you would help us reach it!](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251126-1.l0SMPb&refcode=em20251126-2538&amount=5&t=1&akid=2538%2E21716%2E-gtt4S)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251126-1.l0SMPb&amount=5&refcode=em20251126-2538&t=20&akid=2538%2E21716%2E-gtt4S)**
Thank you for always having my back.
— Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251126-1&t=21&refcode2=2538_21716_-gtt4S&akid=2538%2E21716%2E-gtt4S)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=22&akid=2538%2E21716%2E-gtt4S)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=23&akid=2538%2E21716%2E-gtt4S)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2538%2E21716%2E-gtt4S)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Trump’s FBI is targeting me

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120058622/585094013/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzk1MGFjZi1mZmNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGEttgcUlozbbI73JwkR6Ddp-hxzOOIiPe0WS_yqJQI=&emci=b51ad1d2-feca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=fc950acf-ffca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=13185894) Derek,

This week, I got word that the FBI’s Counterterrorism Division appeared to open an inquiry into me and five of my colleagues—all because we made a video stressing the power of the oath to the Constitution and that service members can never be forced to follow illegal orders.

**To be honest, the President's reaction—calling for our arrest and death, the FBI being deployed against us—tells me exactly who he is and how little he respects the Constitution.**

The FBI is being used as a tool to try and intimidate and harass members of Congress.

He is wielding the power of government to punish dissent. That’s authoritarianism—plain and simple.

But here’s the truth: No amount of harassment, threats, or abuse of power will stop us from doing our jobs or honoring our oath.

We swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution of the United States. That oath lasts a lifetime, and we intend to keep it. We will not be bullied. We will never give up the ship.

**While Trump goes after us, I need your help to show that we are not backing down — that people across this country are standing with those defending our Constitution, not those trying to break it.** [**So Derek, will you step up and stand with me? name: Seth Moulton
subject: Protect kids? Not according to their priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
The only Ps they’re fighting for are the wrong ones.

| |
---
Friend, For weeks now, I’ve watched the Republican Party do everything possible to block the release of the Epstein Files. And the excuses they’ve offered haven’t just been dishonest, they’ve been flat-out contradictory. They called the files a hoax. Then they insisted Democrats should be prosecuted for that same “hoax.” And at every step, they’ve twisted themselves into knots to protect the politically powerful instead of standing up for survivors or the truth. At some point, you have to stop taking their words at face value and start looking at their actions. They’re not protecting kids.
They’re not protecting families.
They’re protecting the three Ps:
* Putin.
* Plutocrats.
* And the people they cover for.

That’s not leadership. That’s the problem. I’m running for Senate because Massachusetts, and our country, deserve leaders who stand on values, not on whatever Donald Trump or party bosses decide that day. **[If you’re ready to replace cowardice with courage, and excuses with accountability, your support before the end of the month truly makes a difference:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120058651/585094102/2090747700?refcode=251126_sm_eom4_l1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzc4NzU3NC1mZmNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BmwdTaeT6B7WqUKLYzTernYWlwWsOI-23PDNDVrI71U=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120058658/585094109/1375639745?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=251126_sm_eom4&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzc4NzU3NC1mZmNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BmwdTaeT6B7WqUKLYzTernYWlwWsOI-23PDNDVrI71U=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120058659/585094110/1375639745?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=251126_sm_eom4&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzc4NzU3NC1mZmNhLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BmwdTaeT6B7WqUKLYzTernYWlwWsOI-23PDNDVrI71U=)

# **From the Desk of Donald J. Trump**

[November 26th, 2025]
Dear Friend,
You probably weren’t expecting to get a letter like this.
**_Not in the mail. Not today. And definitely not from me._**
But when something this big happens, I don’t just send an email and move on – I stop what I’m doing and write directly.
**[We are ONE generous donation away from hitting our end-of-month goal – and I want that donation to come from YOU.](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**
Not just because you’ve always stepped up.
Not just because you believe in the America First mission.
But because you’ve proven — time and again — that you’re part of the top 1% of supporters this movement depends on.
**[That final push across the finish line? It needs to have YOUR name on it](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**
This moment is more than a deadline. It’s history in the making. And when the story gets told, I want it to be clear:
**YOU were the one who showed up when it mattered most.**
**[So I’m asking — personally — will you be the one who puts us over the top?](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**
Let’s crush this goal. Let’s make history. And let’s WIN.
Sincerely,
Donald J. Trump
45th and 47th President of the United States of America

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: 1,700 turkeys! 🦃
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Thank you.
#
This past weekend, we were able to provide over 1,700 turkeys to families in The Bronx and Queens! 🦃
None of this would be possible without your support and volunteers helping out.
Thanks to you, we also surpassed our turkey drive goal by $23,000 — **so we are donating 100% of that to local food pantries to help feed families in need this Thanksgiving**.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251126.tCw311&refcode=em20251126-10263-P_FND_CHA_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10263%2E2526796%2ET6ZEG9)
In these trying times, it is vital that we come together in community to care for one another. We can be the bridge to the society we want to become.
**Thank you for helping us do just that**.
If you can, let's keep it going. Chip in whatever you can today towards two local food pantries that are helping families in need celebrate the holiday:**
**[Donate to Throggs Neck Community Alliance →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251126.tCw311&refcode=em20251126-10263-P_FND_CHA_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10263%2E2526796%2ET6ZEG9)**
**[Donate to Love Wins Food Pantry →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/35231?t=3&akid=10263%2E2526796%2ET6ZEG9)**
Thank you, and Happy Thanksgiving to you and yours,
Alexandria

clean_body: Thank you. This past weekend, we were able to provide over 1,700 turkeys to families in The Bronx and Queens! 🦃 None of this would be possible without your support and volunteers helping out. Thanks to you, we also surpassed our turkey drive goal by $23,000 — so we are donating 100% of that to local food pantries to help feed families in need this Thanksgiving. In these trying times, it is vital that we come together in community to care for one another. We can be the bridge to the society we want to become. Thank you for helping us do just that. If you can, let's keep it going. Chip in whatever you can today towards two local food pantries that are helping families in need celebrate the holiday: Thank you, and Happy Thanksgiving to you and yours, Alexandria | ---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

* * *
Peter, Donald Trump has crossed a dangerous line, calling for the death penalty for six sitting Democrats merely for reminding service members that they must NOT obey _illegal_ orders. This is not political theater; it’s a threat to our democracy and the very foundation of civil governance. Politics at every level must remain civil and collaborative. Democracies cannot function when a leader openly threatens the lives of their opposition. **We cannot let intimidation, threats, or violent rhetoric become normalized. Every moment we hesitate, the risk to our institutions and to elected officials grows. It’s time to make our voices heard.** [**Sign our petition now to CONDEMN Trump’s violent rhetoric and demand accountability. Stand up for civility, collaboration, and the safety of our democracy.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38fy9x8IfZYgXOKuZK4ZJXmIPmZ4LFqj-UYH2HcxgH4BRQpzh39LSB798eNsqm19oRg2Lnsx5h5iETXTHHg_G4wBwnjWJqGlsWTnpgMa5Xz9_7a--lzjJ-3kTrJLRxngxGNt5S4CEFMKq6MA_OUeJKfPMmZdCW8jqLh-Ay8t6KosyydlmHwrUVsmgRGxsenjDzPUyi5mdxyK_W0IgbeJFeYkhvyBARuQG5CcDxp9pDaNeJnJXao3XfLxyJLm83u5ROsD-OfhcwZjB9u-qZHcBF_0ztpjewAhnr91-p_ULlMDJlSbZvJo9muzE_0cKERwQO9A0lUrjaR2l8f7rY5FZAN/4lx/yHCW5Zx3RBCImnfKwTaV4g/h2/h001.5KP62ZqhoNQtRfA-zJSpjY5AutJDPWBGSbO6Tu6bPuw) **** [SIGN ON
](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38fy9x8IfZYgXOKuZK4ZJXmIPmZ4LFqj-UYH2HcxgH4BRQpzh39LSB798eNsqm19oRg2Lnsx5h5iETXTHHg_G4wBwnjWJqGlsWTnpgMa5Xz9_7a--lzjJ-3kTrJLRxngxHMwJlzPyyPgfIa7ClXJj_o6oGLn6PVXEdSkZjzK9Sy7pjXXPLayPrNRZsUFWp-wnLxFzHgKG_1hO06uUpBcqiOklYd18YIYE75DUkTwzX4JYwI4M_jiCO_Z3M6VmY7l7GCxjetlE_qiM5xS1IeRkMvNIXIWLF4Q2aL5xNvy2K6zjVULqTAo8_abx61p6yUxWmJvxU2EDgS2ppv--XOquhf/4lx/yHCW5Zx3RBCImnfKwTaV4g/h3/h001.e7300lImWpA46XZ-M4N9B7G5oTHszD0mbxRFNKaOk28) **** Trump’s threats undermine our democracy at every level. Politics in our towns, cities, and states relies on civil debate and collaboration. When leaders promote violence, it erodes trust, silences voices, and threatens the very institutions that keep our local governments accountable. [**Sign the petition to CALL OUT Trump’s rhetoric and defend democracy, from Washington to our own neighborhoods. Tell him that violence has no place in our politics at every level!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38fy9x8IfZYgXOKuZK4ZJXmIPmZ4LFqj-UYH2HcxgH4BRQpzh39LSB798eNsqm19oRg2Lnsx5h5iETXTHHg_G4wBwnjWJqGlsWTnpgMa5Xz9_7a--lzjJ-3kTrJLRxngxGTQbl7THZCExMn6ArtD9XEuzE3KmjEhcaFITbiMTzBTbvESuNCCFNt2laUhevJdQD5wJnparsasKw4lpWkI_Y9htx-HWxrEzx6CzZcHLlpMY7AQrEVtP5xNcbowp5LJte1TxbcY7Ef7gzz9RJ9S6IOua1l_yduwunxYVOyDU6YppRhxHTdVyE1MaL1r-qT_Og7MHvLHHctCWawkwKtL3-W/4lx/yHCW5Zx3RBCImnfKwTaV4g/h4/h001.BJLbGrpGaMfs_UOB05tzrcFg8TmXBSiK9VDOXdJ47BQ) Thanks for your support.

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 11/26/2025
body:
Phil Weiser’s Failed Experiment in Criminal Justice
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** A statewide CodeRED outage left agencies [unable to send emergency alerts](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), prompting Douglas County to cut ties with the system. Officer Garrett Swasey’s widow renewed [calls to fix competency laws](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) that could eventually free admitted shooter Robert Dear. An AI review flagged [hundreds of missing donor disclosures](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for Phil Weiser and Jena Griswold, fueling mounting ethics concerns.
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** A Campbell Soup executive was suspended after recordings surfaced of him [mocking customers and coworkers](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). New data from X exposed foreign-run accounts posing as U.S. activists and journalists to [spread misinformation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). And Tyson’s [closure of a Nebraska beef plant](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—employing nearly a third of a small town—raised alarms about local economies and the national beef supply chain.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Commentators argued [Phil Weiser’s justice policies worsened crime](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), urged Colorado leaders to focus on [real solutions rather than political branding](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and highlighted Joy Reid’s [sudden reversal on locker-room privacy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as an example of progressive ideology collapsing under real-world pressure. And at the Capitol, lawmakers stalled a decision on [keeping committee livestreams](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) while voting to let taxpayers cover legal bills tied to the Vail retreat scandal.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, November 26, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Phil Weiser’s Failed Experiment in Criminal Justice](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MIKE O'DONNELL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_It has become a common theme in many states and cities that the authorities who are responsible for the long-term safety and security of their residents, nevertheless subscribe to the popular fallacy that locking up criminals does little to deter future offenses and is less effective in the long run that social programs or rehabilitation efforts, however those might be defined._
_The theory here is that criminals aren’t responsible for their actions, Society is primarily to blame. The policies of Colorado’s attorney general, Phil Weiser, and the Democrat dominated Colorado legislature prove how foolish and misguided this theory is._
_In 2019, the Colorado legislature eliminated the option of cash bail for minor offenses, mandating non-monetary bail for lower-level crimes. This was expanded in 2020 when judges were encouraged to release more defendants without cash bail for certain misdemeanors and even felonies._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Colorado Does Not Need More Candidates. Colorado Needs a Future.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SEAN POND, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **Colorado is at a breaking point as the cost of living soars:** Families are falling behind under policies that have driven up energy bills, housing costs, child care, fuel, and groceries—while state leaders focus on national image instead of everyday realities.
* **The state doesn’t need more candidates—it needs a real plan:** The author argues Colorado needs practical leadership grounded in affordable energy, attainable housing, local control of land and wildlife, responsible mining, serious water strategy, and fewer barriers to work.
* **Leadership must reflect working Coloradans, not political branding:** Candidates should understand ranchers, miners, contractors, small businesses, and working families—and offer concrete solutions to make the state livable again, not polished rhetoric.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|

**[AI Review Flags Hundreds of Reporting Gaps for Griswold and Weiser Campaigns](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **AI analysis flags widespread disclosure gaps:** A Longmont resident used artificial intelligence to review campaign filings and identified hundreds of missing donor, occupation, and employer disclosures in reports from Secretary of State Jena Griswold and Attorney General Phil Weiser.

* **Griswold complaint cites 492 violations:** Her campaign allegedly failed to disclose required donor information for 492 contributions totaling $61,371 between April 1 and September 30, prompting the case to be transferred to the Department of Law for review.

* **Weiser complaint alleges nearly 2,000 violations:** The filing claims his campaign omitted required details on 1,988 contributions worth more than $200,000—adding to the growing list of campaign-finance allegations facing top Democrats running for statewide office.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
[**Legislative transparency takes a hit as video livestream decision stalls**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**BY CORY GAINES | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 25** _I wanted to update some stories I’ve been following before they get too stale. First, and simplest, is an update to whether or not the state legislature will continue what was a pilot program to livestream legislative committee hearings (video and audio instead of just audio)._ __
[**Trying to move the needle in Mesa County’s mental health crisis as leaders call the moment “historic”**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**BY JEN SCHUMANN | LOCAL | NOVEMBER 24** _Suicide now claims about 50 lives a year in Mesa County, a rate of roughly 31 deaths per 100,000 people. That’s about one and a half times Colorado’s rate and more than double the national average. At the same time, nearly 13 percent of residents who needed mental-health care last year weren’t able to get it._
__
[**Thanksgiving prices fall in Colorado but families still pay more than most Americans**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY SHAINA COLE | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 24** _This Thanksgiving, the cost of celebrating for Colorado families is at its lowest since the peak in 2022. The American Farm Bureau Federation reports that a traditional Thanksgiving dinner for ten now costs $55.18 – a five percent decline from last year._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](submit@rockymountainvoice.com).
|

|

🦃**DID YOU KNOW?** The first Thanksgiving **didn’t feature turkey at all** — the feast likely centered on venison, duck, goose, and fish. And those classic sides we know today weren’t there either: the colonists had no sugar for cranberry sauce and no means to bake pumpkin pie.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "In this spirit, Thanksgiving has become a day when Americans extend a helping hand to the less fortunate. Long before there was a government welfare program, this spirit of voluntary giving was ingrained in the American character. Americans have always understood that, truly, one must give in order to receive. This should be a day of giving as well as a day of thanks." — Ronald Reagan

This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, November 26, 2025. – Team RMV | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY MIKE O'DONNELL, It has become a common theme in many states and cities that the authorities who are responsible for the long-term safety and security of their residents, nevertheless subscribe to the popular fallacy that locking up criminals does little to deter future offenses and is less effective in the long run that social programs or rehabilitation efforts, however those might be defined. The theory here is that criminals aren’t responsible for their actions, Society is primarily to blame. The policies of Colorado’s attorney general, Phil Weiser, and the Democrat dominated Colorado legislature prove how foolish and misguided this theory is. In 2019, the Colorado legislature eliminated the option of cash bail for minor offenses, mandating non-monetary bail for lower-level crimes. body:
EMILYs List women deliver. Period. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120059837/585098030/-1510725204?sourceid=1057379&refcode=WUEFEK64_20251126_ELTalkingPoints_ALL_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWE2YTc4My0wMmNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KfGl5UIr0cUofSDL0gqVjzbaJmS-u9qt7apXVKkOPOc=) Hey Peter,

If your Thanksgiving table comes with a side of political debate, I’ve got your back. Before your Republican relatives start going on about how “Democrats don’t deliver,” we have the facts you can bring to the table — straight from the women leaders EMILYs List helped elect.

**Before I share, I have to emphasize our End-of-Month goal: we need to raise $20,000 per day until Sunday to make sure we hit our November fundraising numbers. It’s a big lift, but Democratic pro-choice women are relying on our support to win in 2026. **[**Donate now and help keep the wins coming:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120059840/585098033/-1510725204?sourceid=1057379&refcode=WUEFEK64_20251126_ELTalkingPoints_ALL_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWE2YTc4My0wMmNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KfGl5UIr0cUofSDL0gqVjzbaJmS-u9qt7apXVKkOPOc=) | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120059843/585098041/-1403821653?sourceid=1057379&refcode=WUEFEK64_20251126_ELTalkingPoints_ALL_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWE2YTc4My0wMmNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KfGl5UIr0cUofSDL0gqVjzbaJmS-u9qt7apXVKkOPOc=)
---
So, here’s how you can fire back at your lecturing relatives:

In the Empire State, **Gov. Kathy Hochul** is taking real steps to ease costs for New Yorkers. The state just sent out inflation refund checks, putting money directly back into families’ pockets when they need it the most.

In Arizona, **Gov. Katie Hobbs** is preparing a Middle Class Tax Cuts Package after signing an executive order directing the Department of Revenue to get it done. She’s delivering bigger deductions, tax relief for seniors, and ending taxes on tips, overtime, and even new car loan interest. She’s proving that you can cut taxes in a smart, responsible way that actually supports hardworking families.

In Illinois, **Lt. Gov. Juliana Stratton** (IL-SEN) is pushing early childhood education forward with the Smart Start Illinois initiative. She’s working alongside Gov. Pritzker to implement a multi-year plan that expands universal preschool access and stabilizes the early childhood specialist workforce. While Republicans attack teachers and public education, Stratton is investing in kids, their parents, and the future of her state.

And in Maine, **Gov. Janet Mills** (ME-SEN) is fighting for rural communities. Her administration just filed the state’s application for the Rural Health Transformation Program — a new federal initiative designed to strengthen rural hospitals and improve access to care. She’s making sure families in every corner of the state get the health care they deserve.

These are EMILYs List women, which means they run, they win, and they govern with results — not partisan chaos. **Plus, every single one of these women is on the ballot in 2026** , and this community’s support is what will make their wins possible. So if you want more leaders like Hochul, Hobbs, Stratton, and Mills delivering real progress _(and making your Thanksgiving arguments A LOT easier)_ , this is the moment to step up.

[**Peter, can you chip in today to help us hit our $20,000-a-day End-of-Month goal and fuel the campaigns of the women who actually deliver?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120059847/585098050/-1510725204?sourceid=1057379&refcode=WUEFEK64_20251126_ELTalkingPoints_ALL_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWE2YTc4My0wMmNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KfGl5UIr0cUofSDL0gqVjzbaJmS-u9qt7apXVKkOPOc=)

clean_body: EMILYs List women deliver. Period. | = Hey Peter, If your Thanksgiving table comes with a side of political debate, I’ve got your back. Before your Republican relatives start going on about how “Democrats don’t deliver,” we have the facts you can bring to the table — straight from the women leaders EMILYs List helped elect. Before I share, I have to emphasize our End-of-Month goal: we need to raise $20,000 per day until Sunday to make sure we hit our November fundraising numbers. It’s a big lift, but Democratic pro-choice women are relying on our support to win in 2026. = | = So, here’s how you can fire back at your lecturing relatives: In the Empire State, Gov. Kathy Hochul is taking real steps to ease costs for New Yorkers. The state just sent out inflation refund checks, putting money directly back into families’ pockets when they need it the most. In Arizona, Gov. Katie Hobbs is preparing a Middle Class Tax Cuts Package after signing an executive order directing the Department of Revenue to get it done. She’s delivering bigger deductions, tax relief for seniors, and ending taxes on tips, overtime, and even new car loan interest. She’s proving that you can cut taxes in a smart, responsible way that actually supports hardworking families. In Illinois, Lt. Gov. Juliana Stratton (IL-SEN) is pushing early childhood education forward with the Smart Start Illinois initiative. She’s working alongside Gov. Pritzker to implement a multi-year plan that expands universal preschool access and stabilizes the early childhood specialist workforce. While Republicans attack teachers and public education, Stratton is investing in kids, their parents, and the future of her state. And in Maine, Gov. Janet Mills (ME-SEN) is fighting for rural communities. Her administration just filed the state’s application for the Rural Health Transformation Program — a new federal initiative designed to strengthen rural hospitals and improve access to care. She’s making sure families in every corner of the state get the health care they deserve. These are EMILYs List women, which means they run, they win, and they govern with results — not partisan chaos. Plus, every single one of these women is on the ballot in 2026 , and this community’s support is what will make their wins possible. So if you want more leaders like Hochul, Hobbs, Stratton, and Mills delivering real progress (and making your Thanksgiving arguments A LOT easier) , this is the moment to step up. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for fighting back — at the dinner table and at the ballot box. See you online, Christen Sparago (they/them/theirs, she/her/hers) Chief Digital Officer = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? name: Mark Levin Alert
subject: The “ONLY CHECK LEFT” to stop Mamdani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Governor
body:
There’s still a way to stop him...
| ATTN:
---
Marxist, antisemitic jihadist Zohran Mamdani is set to become the next mayor of New York.
---

name: Ben (of Ben & Jerry's) via Our Revolution
subject: Unilever is trying to silence Ben & Jerry's
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

It’s Ben from Ben & Jerry’s – and I’m reaching out today to ask for your
help to #FreeBenandJerrys.

Jerry and I built our company nearly half a century ago to do more than
sell ice cream. Love, equity, justice, solidarity – these are the real
ingredients that shaped our lives and the mission of BNJ's. When Unilever
bought the company in 2000, we insisted on creating an independent board
specifically to safeguard Ben & Jerry’s product quality and social justice
mission from corporate interference.

That was the deal. And for years, our brand continued speaking out:
against white supremacy, for marriage equality, for climate justice, for
Palestinian human rights, and for the idea that businesses have
responsibilities far deeper than profit margins.

But now Unilever and its spinoff Magnum, have broken that promise,
silencing Ben & Jerry's from speaking out on Gaza, free speech and the
right to protest, Black History Month, and more. They’re stripping away
the voice of the company we built – so we’re fighting back. We’ve
assembled a group of social investors who support the mission and are
ready to become the new owners of BNJ’s. They’re willing to pay fair
market value, but Unilever/Magnum refuses to sell. So we’re launching the
campaign to #FreeBenandJerrys – to help Unilever/Magnum understand that by
muzzling BNJ’s they are destroying the brand and the deep values based
relationship that we have with our customers—and they’re not gonna stand
for it. We need to protect free expression, defend independent political
voices, and push back against corporate capitulation to authoritarian
pressure.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34707?source=email-20251126&t=1011&akid=9909%2E5885482%2EmN7y71 ]We need this movement with us. Will you add your name to demand that
Unilever/Magnum transfers ownership to a group that actually supports all
that Ben & Jerry’s stands for?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34707?source=email-20251126&t=1012&akid=9909%2E5885482%2EmN7y71 ]ADD YOUR NAME

Because of Unilever/Magnum’s work to muzzle Ben & Jerry’s whenever the
brand tries to stand up for justice, peace, and progressive values, Jerry
and I have determined that it’s not possible for BNJ’s to retain its
values under current ownership. That’s what prompted Jerry to make one of
the most painful decisions of his life and step down from the company this
fall.

But we are not done fighting. Our values cannot be bargained away to
appease a hostile administration or corporate executives who think silence
is safer than principle.

We’ve seen this pattern before: corporations cozying up to strongmen,
silencing dissent, policing political expression, and abandoning
commitments the moment they become inconvenient. When companies bow to
intimidation, democracy becomes smaller for all of us.

And let’s be honest – none of this is happening in a vacuum. Across the
country, we’re living through an all-out assault on civil rights, voting
rights, the rights of immigrants, women, LGBTQIA+ communities, and Black
and brown Americans. The louder the movement for justice grows, the harder
those in power work to shut it down.

That’s exactly why this moment matters. It’s easy to champion values when
nothing is at stake. The real test is whether we stand up when the
pressure is greatest.

Ben & Jerry’s is being silenced. But we don’t have to be.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34707?source=email-20251126&t=1013&akid=9909%2E5885482%2EmN7y71 ]Join us. Add your name. Help us defend free expression and protect a
legacy of speaking truth to power.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34707?source=email-20251126&t=1014&akid=9909%2E5885482%2EmN7y71 ]ADD YOUR NAME

–Ben Cohen, co-founder of Ben & Jerry's

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9909%2E5885482%2EmN7y71 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9909%2E5885482%2EmN7y71 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9909%2E5885482%2EmN7y71 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9909%2E5885482%2EmN7y71 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9909%2E5885482%2EmN7y71 ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9909%2E5885482%2EmN7y71 ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20251126.QUcVUq&t=1007&akid=9909%2E5885482%2EmN7y71 ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20251126.YC5KA3&t=1008&akid=9909%2E5885482%2EmN7y71 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20251126.46yrfH&t=1009&akid=9909%2E5885482%2EmN7y71 ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20251126.xf5sH5&t=1010&akid=9909%2E5885482%2EmN7y71 ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9909%2E5885482%2EmN7y71

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for

body:
I will never take your sacrifice for granted.

clean_body: I will never take your sacrifice for granted. today is full of noise - phony deadlines, scare tactics, and cheap gimmicks. But I want to cut through the noise for a moment. I grew up right here in Ohio. My parents worked hard to give me a chance at the American Dream, and I know what sacrifice looks like. Every opportunity I've had was built on the back of that sacrifice. why I never forget what it means when someone like you chips in a few dollars. It isn't "just money." It 's trust. It's belief. It's a vote of confidence in the movement we're building in Ohio and beyond. So whether you 've already donated or you're considering it today, let me say this clearly: We 're in an extremely tough fight. And this isn't just any race - it's shaping up to be one of the most important in the country. I threw my hat in the ring now because we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to save our country. I mean that. We were from a country you and I wouldn't recognize anymore. President Trump saved us - with the help of folks like you - from that dire outcome. With that said, he needs loyal partners at the state level to help him succeed. That 's why this race means so much. So if you 've given before (even just once, even just a buck) know this: you've already made a difference, and I will never take your sacrifice for granted. And if you haven 't given yet - - I'd be honored to have you on my team. Every single gift, no matter the size, fuels this must-win fight. grateful,Vivek Ramaswamy the election were held today, we 'd come up just short.We can't afford to lose this ground -- not now, not after everything we've built.Your support right now makes the difference between a comeback and a collapse.**| | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

Peter –
We’re sending a quick note before the holiday tomorrow to ask if you can help us kick off our end-of-month fundraising push. Can you chip in $15 right now before logging off? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251126-email&amount=15]
Because Thanksgiving falls in the last week of the month, and November only has 30 days, we’re asking you to get involved today. We know that starting tomorrow, folks will be with family and friends celebrating, watching football, and all of the exciting things that kick off the holiday season, but our campaign can’t afford to let our momentum slow down.
We’re heading into the last month of the year, and we need to be prepared to enter 2026 with strength. The more work we put in now, the more prepared we’ll be for what comes our way during the election year.
By chipping in $15, you’re helping us get to where we need to be. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251126-email&amount=15]
All the best,
Griswold for Colorado

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
It’s an honor to serve Oregonians in Washington

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120061100/585102113/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzZjMWY2NDYtMDZjYi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V1sa-egKam7gDKEyyM4gCgjDZ4CgOsmuFGvfBgdlgtg=) I know many of you are getting ready to head out for Thanksgiving, but before you log off, I wanted to send you a quick note to say _thank you._ It’s an honor to serve Oregonians in Washington, and I’m so grateful for your support and confidence in me as I work to deliver results for our communities in Congress. With your support, I’ve been able to focus on the issues that matter most to Oregonians — tackling the cost of living, helping our small businesses succeed, and protecting the programs that Americans depend on. There's been some tough fights in the last year, and likely more ahead as we work to continue fighting for a brighter, stronger future for our state and country. But together, I know we have the power to keep up our work in the House and push through change that puts Oregonians first. **Thank you again for being a part of our team.[_And if you’d like to help me keep fighting for Oregonians in Congress, I’d appreciate your support today._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120061101/585102114/1565084121?refcode=email_112625_thanksgiving&amounts=5,25,50,75,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzZjMWY2NDYtMDZjYi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V1sa-egKam7gDKEyyM4gCgjDZ4CgOsmuFGvfBgdlgtg=)** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120061102/585102115/1565084121?refcode=email_112625_thanksgiving&amounts=5,25,50,75,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzZjMWY2NDYtMDZjYi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V1sa-egKam7gDKEyyM4gCgjDZ4CgOsmuFGvfBgdlgtg=)

Thanks, and I hope you have a happy Thanksgiving!

clean_body: It’s an honor to serve Oregonians in Washington = I know many of you are getting ready to head out for Thanksgiving, but before you log off, I wanted to send you a quick note to say thank you. It’s an honor to serve Oregonians in Washington, and I’m so grateful for your support and confidence in me as I work to deliver results for our communities in Congress. With your support, I’ve been able to focus on the issues that matter most to Oregonians — tackling the cost of living, helping our small businesses succeed, and protecting the programs that Americans depend on. There's been some tough fights in the last year, and likely more ahead as we work to continue fighting for a brighter, stronger future for our state and country. But together, I know we have the power to keep up our work in the House and push through change that puts Oregonians first. Thank you again for being a part of our team.= | | = Thanks, and I hope you have a happy Thanksgiving! \- Janelle Bynum | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: Last Tuesday we won & December 1 we celebrate!
body:
Mclellan's Chicken & Fish 6:30-7pm.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/00d6426c80a7/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6422980?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| | Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
| |
# Join me Monday night & meet the 2026
# Statewide and Congressional Candidates
---
| |
Celebrate our 2025 progress and bring that energy right into the 2026 midterms as we host our statewide candidates for US Senate, Governor, Congress and Superintendent of Education on Monday, December 1 in Spartanburg at Mclellan’s Chicken and Fish 1441 Union Street. [Get tickets here!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3cfa4d3410&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d2d17384c9&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Get Tickets](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=8d769eef50&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| |
# First live podcast in the books!
---
| |
Last Wednesday, [**Grace Cowan**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f09790d56b&e=edbde6c9b1) and I co-hosted the [**Frogmore Stew**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d3e51e497f&e=edbde6c9b1) political podcast with the Peninsula Dems! We discussed gerrymandering, the unusual and undemocratic ways that South Carolina conducts elections, and what an ordinary citizen can do to make a difference within this system.[ **Listen Up!**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=eb72473f36&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=7f4e1fd78b&e=edbde6c9b1)
|
---
| |
# Both women I asked to run for office won.
---
|
---
| |
Please join me in congratulating Dr. Octavia Amaechi, a family physician and Chief Medical Officer for Regenesis Healthcare who won over 60% of the vote on November 18 run off for Commission of Public Works. She is the first black woman to win a citywide race in Spartanburg’s history and the first public health official governing our water.
And Leslie Rodgers, who previously ran Atlas Organics here in Spartanburg and has a career as a Business and Marketing Director in the Sustainability Industry won a run off for City Council 2 by 30 votes and was sworn in on Monday night.
**I’m so incredibly proud of both my friends, and even more proud of our community.**
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| |
* [**December 1: SPCDP Statewide Candidate**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=cbfe1de7a9&e=edbde6c9b1)**M eet & Greet 6pm - 7:30pm **
* **December 18:**[**Rights & Empowerment Art Show Blue Spirit Studio **](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=df8a643207&e=edbde6c9b1)**5-7:30pm**
* **Upstate artists can submit by December 1 for a show supporting WREN**

---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=75907ed49d&e=edbde6c9b1)
|

|
---
| | **WE FOUGHT AND WON AT THE STATEHOUSE NOVEMBER 18****Come celebrate with us on December 18 in Spartanburg!**[**RSVP HERE**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=21d448a820&e=edbde6c9b1)

# Trump administration attacks Nurses

| |

South Carolina Nurse’s Association response to the recent U.S. Department of Education's decision to exclude Nursing from Professional Career Listing.

---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=543daa3409&e=edbde6c9b1)
| |
Monday night I got to witness City Councilwoman Leslie Rodgers be sworn in by her two youngest sons, and we hosted Dr. Octavia Amaechi at our Rotary Club meeting on Tuesday!
This past weekend I spent time with my family and friends in Charleston and watched the Clemson Tigers clench a win over West Virginia. I also caught up with my new best friend, Mayor Tecklenburg!
Democracy is a participatory sport, stay with me y’all.

name: Team Lindstrom
subject: If we lose Nebraska, we lose the Majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Lindstrom for Congress
body:
Washington chaos vs Nebraska common sense — choose your side.
| | | | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
---
| | Peter,
We’re just FOUR DAYS AWAY from our November End-of-Month deadline and the stakes couldn’t be higher.
Washington Democrats are **doing everything they can** to flip this seat, keep the government shut down, and block President Trump’s agenda. They know if they take back Nebraska’s 2nd District, they can take back control of Congress.
They’ve already unleashed millions in outside money and are building up a war chest to take us on. Meanwhile, our campaign runs on grassroots support. **_[We need Nebraskans like YOU chipping in $10, $25, or $50 at a time.](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)_**
If we fall short of our goal, it will hand them the headline they want: _**“Democrats gain ground in Nebraska — GOP campaign stumbles.”**_
Let’s make sure that doesn’t happen.
**Help Brett Lindstrom finish the month strong and defend Nebraska’s seat before midnight:**
**[👉 RUSH A DONATION BEFORE MIDNIGHT >>](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)**
This isn’t just another race — it’s the fight for the future of our country.
Thank you for having Brett’s back.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: President Trump is using the FBI to target me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friends,

On Monday, the FBI's Counterterrorism Division appeared to open an inquiry into me in response to a video the President did not like.

In that video, I directly quoted the Uniform Code of Military Justice alongside five other Members of Congress with service and veteran backgrounds. Officers and enlisted in our military are trained to follow lawful orders, and refuse to follow illegal orders. It’s part of the training. This has been the case since World War II.

Since then, the President has misquoted me, and then called for my arrest, trial, and death by hanging. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth has threatened my friend, Senator Mark Kelly, with court martial. And now, it appears the president has directed the FBI to target the rest of us.

**This is exactly why we made that video in the first place.**

President Trump believes in weaponizing the federal government against his perceived enemies and does not believe laws apply to him or his Cabinet. He uses legal harassment as an intimidation tactic, to scare people out of speaking up. He’s done it to law firms, universities, private sector companies and private individuals.

But these kinds of tactics won’t work on me. And neither will the total wave of death threats, bomb threats, and general harassment he has unleashed.

I have always worked to be upfront and honest in these emails. This latest news from the FBI means that I have had to start thinking through a legal defense strategy – and we do not know exactly where President Trump and his Department of Justice will take this inquiry. And for the time being, all of that planning is being paid for through campaign dollars.

[So, your split contribution to the Voter Protection Project and me will be put to work immediately to ensure I have the resources to fight back.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97452?t=6&akid=22086%2E878179%2EVrVbyS) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Elissa Slotkin and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97453?t=7&akid=22086%2E878179%2EVrVbyS)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97454?t=8&akid=22086%2E878179%2EVrVbyS)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97455?t=9&akid=22086%2E878179%2EVrVbyS)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97456?t=10&akid=22086%2E878179%2EVrVbyS)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/97457?t=11&akid=22086%2E878179%2EVrVbyS)
To be frank, the whole thing isn’t about one line from one video. The events of the last week do not represent the country we know and love.

I refuse to believe that this is the new normal — where the President of the United States uses fear and intimidation against people with whom he disagrees.

But the Voter Protection Project and I can’t do this alone.

Thank you for reading — and thank you in advance for your help.

Elissa Slotkin
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22086%2E878179%2EVrVbyS). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22086%2E878179%2EVrVbyS).**

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: I am being harassed by the FBI
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
President Trump is using the FBI as a tool to intimidate and harass me and other Members of Congress.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120061348/585102972/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDdmOTQ2NS0wN2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=myGXiuRTxnHf_d1YhB8sVxLxuZ886nqx6hsIdq8A6ZA=&emci=f4aa5b62-e9ca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=e07f9465-07cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek,

I am writing to you today with an update on a serious and, frankly, unprecedented situation.
As you may know, I recently released a video with five of my national security colleagues to remind members of our military that their oath is to the **Constitution** and that they are not obligated to follow illegal orders. This core belief, that the rule of law must prevail, is what I swore to uphold as a Member of Congress and as an Air Force veteran.
In response, President Trump, our Commander in Chief, called me a traitor and said that I should be executed.
**And now he is using the FBI as a tool to intimidate and harass me and other Members of Congress. **
Let me be clear – no amount of intimidation or harassment will ever stop me from doing my job and honoring our Constitution.
I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution. I am keeping that oath. I refuse to allow a man who himself attempted to overthrow our government on January 6th to dictate how I serve this country.
**[If you can, will you chip in $5 so I have the resources to help me fight back against whatever comes next?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120061349/585102973/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1199-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDdmOTQ2NS0wN2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=myGXiuRTxnHf_d1YhB8sVxLxuZ886nqx6hsIdq8A6ZA=)**

clean_body: President Trump is using the FBI as a tool to intimidate and harass me and other Members of Congress. | | | Derek, I am writing to you today with an update on a serious and, frankly, unprecedented situation. As you may know, I recently released a video with five of my national security colleagues to remind members of our military that their oath is to the Constitution and that they are not obligated to follow illegal orders. This core belief, that the rule of law must prevail, is what I swore to uphold as a Member of Congress and as an Air Force veteran. In response, President Trump, our Commander in Chief, called me a traitor and said that I should be executed. And now he is using the FBI as a tool to intimidate and harass me and other Members of Congress. Let me be clear – no amount of intimidation or harassment will ever stop me from doing my job and honoring our Constitution. I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution. I am keeping that oath. name: Tim Walz
subject: We have to be ready to fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Heartland Patriots
body:
Mike Lindell is selling conspiracies, MAGA extremism, and pillows.
Peter,
I don’t know if you’ve heard, but Mike Lindell is reportedly building a campaign to run for Governor of Minnesota in 2026.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98330?refcode=em20251126-9768&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9768%2E614464%2EsD-vVS)
Make no mistake about it, he would undo all of the work we’ve done to make Minnesota one of the best places to raise a family.
Mike Lindell is selling conspiracies, MAGA extremism, and pillows. He has no business holding the highest office in our state.
Peter, that’s why we have to be ready to fight back.
**[Will you stand with me today by splitting a donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help us stay prepared and ensure we have the resources we need to win this fight?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98330?refcode=em20251126-9768&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9768%2E614464%2EsD-vVS)**

subject: Before you carve the turkey...
body:
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GoerK0JREs33YBMGi8U92SA9bZ5QmMqfzKC2rLu_1IwWeGPYX0zETp610Pl-l_pBB2rqy20C-4QN05WtRXKG6Fl4NV8BUxwjpRbHlrPSEc3pl0xI9rD71JbrbHc1Y-r2crbqDwJh3Sd6huMmJfpCUQX0AMcWk4SRRZQVlexhu0Zi_QO9HAXrvf7TjRkk9ctR9ewCqVdP0n3JXRFYZkiVgt4IDBM_snbQ&c=5kpp72NTC7CgVz3G6KJVHbaZ0cL0-fa1mKSo9EzT3C4mPHPznEvCsw==&ch=uZxGw6jzA0uVxhDnMuKbrlSj05ZJZoTqRoqvOgdLm5DHiwj1akXRIg==)

|
Peter,
Before we all head off to celebrate Thanksgiving with our loved ones, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you. This campaign is powered by people like you, and I am so incredibly grateful for your support.
I also want to be honest about the challenge ahead.
The holiday season is naturally a tough time for grassroots campaigns. As we all focus on family and gratitude--as we should--contributions historically tend to slow down. It's what we call the "December freeze."
That is why hitting our $10,000 goal before midnight tonight is so critical.
We need to head into December with a strong safety net so we don't lose our momentum. We are gearing up for a massive 3-month sprint starting in January to win this election and make history, and we can't afford to start that new year trying to catch up.
I'm asking you to have my back one more time before the holiday break so we can weather this seasonal dip and come out stronger on the other side.
[Please, if you can, will you chip in $50, $25, or whatever you can spare before midnight tonight so we can keep our movement going strong?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GoerK0JREs33YBMGi8U92SA9bZ5QmMqfzKC2rLu_1IwWeGPYX0zETp610Pl-l_pBlyxqfe1FGgLZRkMhAuvQ13BLbdyre18qileMTK4JVca6N4lqU0Uneh0Z22RePJn1exj7AcxQLYeaS0D-EsccNBAEgyASue8Vh06GoAwjly5rha461WgGZXfG0URkp1CDkIaLq6ZXQKplT1Y1LDUbWtg5OX0PINt4zeFr89cPLmY=&c=5kpp72NTC7CgVz3G6KJVHbaZ0cL0-fa1mKSo9EzT3C4mPHPznEvCsw==&ch=uZxGw6jzA0uVxhDnMuKbrlSj05ZJZoTqRoqvOgdLm5DHiwj1akXRIg==)
