clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, Before we all head off to celebrate Thanksgiving with our loved ones, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you. This campaign is powered by people like you, and I am so incredibly grateful for your support. I also want to be honest about the challenge ahead. The holiday season is naturally a tough time for grassroots campaigns. As we all focus on family and gratitude--as we should--contributions historically tend to slow down. It's what we call the "December freeze." That is why hitting our $10,000 goal before midnight tonight is so critical. We need to head into December with a strong safety net so we don't lose our momentum. We are gearing up for a massive 3-month sprint starting in January to win this election and make history, and we can't afford to start that new year trying to catch up. I'm asking you to have my back one more time before the holiday break so we can weather this seasonal dip and come out stronger on the other side. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | Thank you for believing in this campaign. | | == | Bushra Amiwala Democrat for IL-09 | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

name: Representative Darin Harbick
subject: Darin Harbick - November 2025 Newsletter
body:
| | | [](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fcontent.govdelivery.com%2Faccounts%2FORLEG%2Fbulletins%2F3fce591/1/0101019ac1ee523f-d8fe2b70-dce9-490d-a78a-20cfb72f27fe-000000/2H4GqFDp6MMBSfHUiHu9HOhuRbQegZy0kZQunGGO8yw=433)
---|---
---
Replies to this message are sent to an unmonitored mailbox.
To contact me, please click here: [Rep.DarinHarbick@oregonlegislature.gov](mailto:Rep.DarinHarbick@oregonlegislature.gov) |
* * *
---
Dear Neighbors,
Hello Rural Lane County! I am sure that everyone will be super busy during this holiday season, so it’s always a good reminder to focus on what is truly important to us. This last week I have been busy attending legislative committees for Education, Health Care, and Behavior Health. We are working on important bills to introduce for this next year’s short session. My calendar has been full each day with research, listening to presenters to committees, and meeting with constituents that have come to the capitol. I also wanted to make sure that you were aware of the below important news:
**NOVEMBER LEG DAYS REVOLVE AROUND STATE’S BUDGET DEFICIT**
Legislators and staff were back in the Capitol this week to work on policy ideas for the upcoming short session. The conversation largely revolved around Oregon’s projected $888 million budget deficit, which the majority party claims is the result of President Trump's "One Big Beautiful Bill," H.R.1.
But if the state government is losing all this money, where is it going? _Back in the taxpayer’s pockets_. The federal budget bill may not be as big a boogie man as some would have you believe.
---

The bill includes several provisions that relieve the financial strain on Americans by slashing taxes for the middle and lower classes and making it easier for businesses to succeed. It is estimated that H.R.1 will save the average Oregon taxpayer $3,157 in 2026.
Tax relief provisions include:
* **No Tax on Tips —** Establishes a temporary federal income tax deduction of up to $25,000 for “qualified tips,” including cash or charged tips received from customers or through tip sharing
* **No Tax on Overtime —** Establishes a tax deduction of up to $12,500 for qualifying employees receiving overtime pay that is reported on a Form W-2, Form 1099, or other specified statement
* **No Tax on Car Loan Interest —** Establishes a tax deduction of up to $10,000 on a loan used to purchase a vehicle for personal use that was made in the U.S.
* **Increase in the Child Tax Credit —** to $2,200 per child, and makes it a permanent, inflation-adjusted credit after 2026
* **Deduction for Seniors —** Adults age 65 and older may claim an additional deduction of $6,000. This new deduction is in addition to the current additional standard deduction for seniors under existing law
* **Qualified Business Income Deduction —** Makes the 20% qualified business income deduction permanent for pass-through entities, while also providing a minimum deduction of $400 for any business with $1,000 or more in qualified business income
* **Enhanced Business Expensing and Depreciation —** Raises Section 179 small business expensing limits to $2.5 million (up from about $1.29 million), with a higher phase-out threshold of $4 million, and restores full bonus depreciation for capital investments, canceling the remaining phase-down of this expensing benefit

Oregon’s politicians have become overly dependent on federal dollars. The tax breaks worked into H.R.1 will be a welcome relief to hardworking Oregonians. Maybe this budget deficit will encourage state leaders to strengthen the economy, stabilize existing revenue streams, and support families and businesses instead of squeezing their constituents.
**DEMOCRATS DECIDE TO USE $7.5 MILLION IN EMERGENCY FUNDING FOR PLANNED PARENTHOOD**
Last week, Oregon Democrats announced they would use $7.5 million from the Emergency Fund for the Oregon Health Authority to fund Planned Parenthood facilities.
Democrats argue the decision was necessary in lieu of federal Medicaid funds no longer available to fund Planned Parenthood until at least July 2026 per President Trump’s House Resolution 1. However, Oregon does not face a gap in access to reproductive health care services without its Planned Parenthood affiliates. Federally Qualified Health Centers (FQHCs) provide all non-abortion reproductive health care services Planned Parenthood claims, with 270 locations across the state.
Further, taxpayers funded 81% of Oregon abortions from 2021-2025 – **a nearly 80% increase** from 2013-2015, in which taxpayers funded 45% of Oregon abortions – despite a recent [poll](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.kofc.org%2Fen%2Fresources%2Fcommunications%2Fpolls%2Fmarist-poll-results2024.pdf/1/0101019ac1ee523f-d8fe2b70-dce9-490d-a78a-20cfb72f27fe-000000/qnTHVNU7jrC6RbF2VJ6C0vIKYelxRPdm6oHRJqJAQ3Y=433) showing that 53% of taxpayers oppose their dollars being used for abortion.
---

Given the availability and access to other clinics that provide reproductive health care services and Oregon’s strained financial climate, using emergency funding for Planned Parenthood is neither urgent nor necessary. We need to stop the political posturing and get back to listening to what Oregonians want – and use their tax dollars accordingly.
**REVENUE FORECAST: ABYSMAL OR IMPROVEMENT?**
Last Wednesday the Legislative Fiscal Office (LFO) released its fourth-quarter economic forecast. They found that Oregon’s budget deficit now sits at -$63.1 million — up $309.5 million from the previous forecast of -$372.6 million.
Even though the state’s deficit has decreased, the job market doesn’t show it. Just this week, Intel cut hundreds more jobs in Oregon – bringing Oregon’s total job losses this year to more than 3,000. And Providence Oregon cut more than 150 additional jobs in its latest round of cuts.
A recent [poll](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fsaveourcities.org%2Fsurvey%2F/1/0101019ac1ee523f-d8fe2b70-dce9-490d-a78a-20cfb72f27fe-000000/Ljj_sARLcJArAbw3iTjJEDoz7KhjsY5J2lC_Djj8-FM=433) revealed how Oregon voters are feeling about the economy:
* 67% say the economy is seriously off on the wrong track.
* 66% say it would be difficult to find a similar job in Oregon if they left their current job.
* 64% say taxes are too high.
* 53% say they would be likely to explore relocating to another state to find a new job.

The poll surveyed a wide variety of individuals with backgrounds representative of Oregon’s current demographic. It is safe to say that more than half of Oregonians view the economic situation of the state negatively.
---

Oregon’s rising unemployment numbers and high taxes are harming families and forcing businesses to leave our state. If we want to see our budget grow, we must cut taxes and create an economic climate where businesses can thrive and grow – not fear loss and decline.
**WHAT’S YOUR KICKER?**
The Oregon Office of Economic Analysis announced a revenue surplus of $1.41 billion from the previous biennium, which will be reflected in this year’s tax surplus credit. Those extra funds will be redistributed back to taxpayers — you might know this as the kicker.
The kicker will be applied as a credit to your state personal income tax returns. It can either increase one’s return or decrease state taxes owed.
Curious about how much money you can expect in 2026? Use the[ ](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgcc02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com%2F%3Furl=https%253A%252F%252Frevenueonline.dor.oregon.gov%252Ftap%253FLink%253DWMK%26data=05%257C02%257CGretchen.Sims%2540oregonlegislature.gov%257C1dc85e539a5246b10c4c08de23eb1126%257C489a9c84574a48c7b72a2450511334cc%257C1%257C0%257C638987689662541895%257CUnknown%257CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%253D%253D%257C0%257C%257C%257C%26sdata=NMVZOHvYU6agTPNBXKuJ6Z0%252BEUAz4FBQlV8iIJcmgm4%253D%26reserved=0/1/0101019ac1ee523f-d8fe2b70-dce9-490d-a78a-20cfb72f27fe-000000/Eto1c1wwm4tQDy-tH6Pni9-MIQHnO7hvNUHhgKuYEmY=433)_[“What’s My Kicker?”](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Frevenueonline.dor.oregon.gov%2Ftap%3FLink=WMK/1/0101019ac1ee523f-d8fe2b70-dce9-490d-a78a-20cfb72f27fe-000000/B7s5DGtPIa6cwkf8-QTsGShBwRr0UChFAeuTdO0J2Cs=433)_ __ calculator!
**OREGON HOUSE REPUBLICAN CAUCUS WELCOMES REPRESENTATIVE MATT BUNCH**
Last week, we welcomed a new representative to the House Republican Caucus.
Born and raised in eastern Oregon, and an alumnus of Oregon State University, Representative Matt Bunch built an impressive career in insurance and financial management, while also giving back to his community as a development officer for the Oregon FFA Foundation and a bus driver for the Oregon City School District. Bunch and his wife of 40 years, Maryjane, have three children and four grandchildren.
---

Bunch was appointed to fill former Representative Christine Drazan’s seat after she was appointed to fill an open Senate seat. Bunch ran for House District 51 last cycle, but stepped down and endorsed Drazan when she announced her bid. He has already filed for reelection.
I am looking forward to working with Rep. Bunch and am positive he will be an invaluable addition to the caucus.
**Looking for ways to get involved?**
**Register to testify!**
* If there is a bill you are particularly passionate about, you can register to testify either in support or opposition to the bill.
* Advance registration is required! Registration closes 30 minutes before the hearing is scheduled to begin.
* To register, go to [https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2025R1](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Folis.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fliz%2F2025R1/1/0101019ac1ee523f-d8fe2b70-dce9-490d-a78a-20cfb72f27fe-000000/Sp6Y4alioQbgLE3fJpMq3k14mmFuI1imHDrVhQkUePE=433), select the “Bills” icon on the top right corner of your page, enter the bill number, and select “Register to Testify.” Or, call 1-833-588-4500.
* You will want to fill out the “Public Testimony Registration Form.”
* You will receive an email confirmation with an option to join Microsoft Teams if you can not testify in person.

**Submit a Written Testimony!**
* If you prefer not to testify in person, you can also submit written testimony in support or opposition to a bill.
* To submit written testimony, follow the same steps as you would to register to testify in front of the committee, but you will select “Submit Testimony” and fill out the “Written Testimony Submission Form.”
* Written testimony must be submitted up to 48 hours after the committee meeting start time.

Testifying on a bill gives you a voice in Oregon’s legislature. The voice of the people is the cornerstone of democracy! Let yours be heard today.
****
**STAY IN TOUCH**
Now that Leg Days are over for November, I will be doing some traveling and spending some time with my family for Thanksgiving. To keep updated on what I'm doing please visit and follow my [Facebook page](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FHarbickForOregon%2F/1/0101019ac1ee523f-d8fe2b70-dce9-490d-a78a-20cfb72f27fe-000000/1Tgx2QaWqQNF0vXs7b-kJUNYgl1jk3rFY0aW95RvL80=433). You can also follow my activity on [http://www.oregonlegislature.gov/harbick](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/http:%2F%2Fwww.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fharbick/1/0101019ac1ee523f-d8fe2b70-dce9-490d-a78a-20cfb72f27fe-000000/oGhvJPfLtXRAUgDNMSnqPweXU9P1I7yd1gyGODRw2Y4=433)
Yours truly,
Representative Darin Harbick
House District 12
**Capitol Phone:** 503-986-1412
**Capitol Address:** 900 Court St. NE, H-376, Salem, Oregon 97301
**Email:** [Rep.DarinHarbick@oregonlegislature.gov](mailto:Rep.DarinHarbick@oregonlegislature.gov)
**Website:**[https://www.oregonlegislature.gov/harbick](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.oregonlegislature.gov%2Fharbick/1/0101019ac1ee523f-d8fe2b70-dce9-490d-a78a-20cfb72f27fe-000000/mAhZmoK_HT__ddaQqxEdie_KZj7RScPvjQHSAbTugsI=433)
* * *
**SUBSCRIBER SERVICES OPTIONS:**
**•** To **stop** receiving this newsletter, **add** new newsletters, or**delete** your subscription services click [Manage Preferences](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fpublic.govdelivery.com%2Faccounts%2FORLEG%2Fsubscriber%2Fnew%3Fpreferences=true/1/0101019ac1ee523f-d8fe2b70-dce9-490d-a78a-20cfb72f27fe-000000/paSKqDJDN1rBzpvLkE4auXj6XMO9CYDwxHWk1X1j4CM=433)
**•** For questions about subscriber services, please email [Help](https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fsubscriberhelp.govdelivery.com%2F/1/0101019ac1ee523f-d8fe2b70-dce9-490d-a78a-20cfb72f27fe-000000/-1x-HxK0iBs2tW393RM6G2LjwRx0_pgSYYCX1RxBd5E=433) Information provided may not be final and is subject to change.
---

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: I’m grateful for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1037%2E181023%2EBax9ET)
Hey there —
I’ll keep this short because I know you’re likely getting ready for the Thanksgiving holiday — whether that means grocery shopping, setting up extra chairs for the friends and family arriving tomorrow, or making plans to watch the Lions take down the Green Bay Packers!
Ahead of all that, I want you to know how grateful I am for your support.
With a campaign this high stakes, it takes a big team to stay competitive. And you are a part of a really powerful movement working to take our message and agenda to Lansing.
There’s a lot of hard work ahead, and I’m going to continue to count on you for help. I never take your support for granted — it means the world to me.
Before you log off to spend some time with your loved ones, **[will you make a contribution to power the organizers, the voter outreach, and the digital ads we need to keep up to win this race?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1037%2E181023%2EBax9ET)**
[DONATE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hVxyII&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=1037%2E181023%2EBax9ET)
---
Thank you!
Jocelyn

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=4&akid=1037%2E181023%2EBax9ET)

PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR

23133 Woodward Ave, Number 116,
Ferndale, MI 48220
clean_body: Hey there — I’ll keep this short because I know you’re likely getting ready for the Thanksgiving holiday — whether that means grocery shopping, setting up extra chairs for the friends and family arriving tomorrow, or making plans to watch the Lions take down the Green Bay Packers! Ahead of all that, I want you to know how grateful I am for your support. With a campaign this high stakes, it takes a big team to stay competitive. And you are a part of a really powerful movement working to take our message and agenda to Lansing. There’s a lot of hard work ahead, and I’m going to continue to count on you for help. I never take your support for granted — it means the world to me. Before you log off to spend some time with your loved ones, Thank you! Jocelyn

name: George Whitesides
subject: What I’m thankful for
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2025?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2025?refcode=em-header]
Happy Thanksgiving, Peter!

I truly have so much to be grateful for this year.

In January, I was sworn into Congress to represent California’s 27th District. Since then, I’ve fought for our community’s interests every day both in Washington and at home – it hasn’t been easy, but it’s been worth it.

I’m thankful for the opportunity I have to deliver real results to working families in the district.

I’m thankful for my wife and kids who have been so supportive from Day One of my campaign, and now, during this year of back-and-forth travel.

I’m thankful for the people of CA-27 for their continued trust as I go to bat for them in Washington, despite the challenges of the GOP majority.

As we look forward to the midterm election year, I’m grateful knowing that I have your support for all that’s to come. Our work continues, and I’m determined to get more done, continue listening to your concerns, and be your strong voice in Congress.

Thank you, and I hope you have a great holiday with family and friends.

George
https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides? [https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides?]George has spent his career solving problems. body:

I wanted to reach out before you log off for the long holiday weekend because the situation is even more serious than I’d like to admit. Our end-of-month deadline is this Sunday, and if we fall short, we risk ending the year at a major disadvantage. But right now, we’re $8,000 behind. What makes this even worse is that I know many people won’t be checking their email over the break which means we could fall even further behind. [_**That’s why I’m asking now: Can you chip in today to help us close the gap? I’m worried if we don’t see a burst of support today, we won’t be able to catch up.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120062184/585106203/140958522?&refcode=E16451-20251126-BeforetheHoliday-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGQ4YTNkZDYtMGFjYi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=enPrYg5pXxkSILREGfvuU1BqgVATQdC85sKOJTUdQhM=) Thank you for standing with us in a moment that truly matters. I hope you and your family have a wonderful Thanksgiving! – Josh
---

clean_body: We’re in real danger of falling behind. | = | Hey Peter, it's Josh. I wanted to reach out before you log off for the long holiday weekend because the situation is even more serious than I’d like to admit. Our end-of-month deadline is this Sunday, and if we fall short, we risk ending the year at a major disadvantage. But right now, we’re $8,000 behind. clean_body: This poll changes everything... Peter, With the Radical Left holding our government hostage to try and benefit illegal immigrants all at the expense of hardworking Americans like you, honestly, the last thing I wanted to do was bother my supporters with political emails and texts. In fact, I believe now more than ever, the American people need to see that YOU are our ONLY priority, which is why I've had my own salary withheld during the Democrats' senseless shutdown. Hochul and the Democrats were desperately hoping that I would continue to pause my messaging during the shutdown so that they could bury this news and prevent us from seizing the momentum. There's no two ways about it; this poll is devastating for Hochul. She's even being labeled the MOST VULNERABLE Democrat governor in the country. And this new poll shows us our clear path to victory. ...But all this depends on having the resources necessary to get the job done. Now that our path to save New York is clearer than ever, now that we have all the momentum, will you stand with me in our fight to FIRE Hochul? you,. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership| | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I am going to FIRE Kathy Hochul
body:
I’m running for governor to make New York affordable and safe again

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRn/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, it’s time to Save New York!
Since I launched my campaign earlier this month I have been crisscrossing the Empire State from Buffalo to Long Island and from NYC to the beautiful North Country I call home. In every corner of this great state New Yorkers have made one thing clear; **they are ready for new leadership!**
For almost two decades New York has suffered the consequences of nearly unchecked single party Democrat control and the results have been disastrous. Thanks to failed Democrat policies **New York has become one of the most**** _unaffordable_****and**** _unsafe_****states in the nation.**
We need a leader now to fight to restore New York more than ever but unfortunately we are currently led by accidental Governor Kathy Hochul, the WORST governor in America.
Despite an affordability crisis in NY, Governor Hochul is **RAISING TAXES** on hard-working families and supporting policies that are surging the cost of rent, utilities, and groceries just as the state is recovering from the pandemic lockdowns.
In the face of a crime wave from violent illegals along with a mental health crisis **she cemented New York as a sanctuary state and embraced failed bail reform.**
And when New Yorkers looked to her for leadership to be a check on the Radical Leftists taking over her party **she bent the knee to Zohran Mamdani and helped him be elected mayor of our nation’s largest city!**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRn/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Governor Hochul at a rally in Queens for Zohran Mamdani’s mayoral campaign where she responded to chants of “TAX THE RICH!” with “I hear you!”_

[SAVE NEW YORK](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRn/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Zohran Mamdani is a communist who wants to defund the police and raise taxes on “whiter” neighborhoods to pay for his socialist projects. That is who Kathy Hochul just helped get elected Mayor of NYC.
Enough is enough!
I will not stand by as Kathy Hochul and Zohran Mamdani team up to send the Empire State into freefall.
**_[I am running for governor to SAVE NEW YORK from Hochul and Mamdani](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRn/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****!**
As the strongest voice for America First values in the state, I have fought hard to deliver the largest middle-class tax cut in New York’s history and pass legislation that lays the groundwork to undo cashless bail for violent criminals and make our nation safer.
And with your help I plan to FIRE KATHY HOCHUL next year!

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRn/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[FIRE KATHY HOCHUL](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRn/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
I know that we can win this race by assembling a broad coalition of common sense patriots.

In 2022, Lee Zeldin came within six points of becoming the governor of New York.

In 2024, New York swung more towards President Trump and the Republican Party than any other state in the Union.

And now just a few weeks into our race I am already neck and neck with Kathy Hochul with the most recent polling showing that independents are leaning towards voting Republican and revealing that **New York is now a TOSS-UP!**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRn/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_J.L Partners poll conducted in November showing that the NY gubernatorial race is currently within the margin of error._

[HELP ELISE CLOSE THE GAP](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRn/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, it is crucial now that we continue to fight and keep up our current momentum.
As the gap continues to close Democrats across the country are increasingly being called upon to save Hochul in order to keep the state blue.

I need all the support I can get to make sure that we have the resources needed to turn out our voters and hold the line across the state.**__**
**__**
**_[So please, if you can, make a contribution today to help me make New York affordable and safe again](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRn/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.******
****I am humbled by the number of personal endorsements that I have already received and the outpouring of support so far from Americans across the county like you who remain committed to restoring our nation.
Thank you in advance for your time and continued support.

**Let’s SAVE NEW YORK!**

_Your fellow patriot,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRn/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
Proud New Yorker
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxRn/?__vbtrk=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NjQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: Ro Khanna
subject: We need Analilia in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
I want to introduce you to a leader we need in Congress: Analilia Mejia.
Analilia has been fighting for working families her whole life. She’s an organizer who knows how to win tough battles, and she’s never been afraid to speak truth to power.
Before I explain, will you rush a split contribution between Analilia’s campaign and mine right now? Every dollar you give will fuel a people-powered campaign to send a fearless leader to Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rk-analilia-mejia-fundraising-split?refcode=20251126]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rk-analilia-mejia-fundraising-split?refcode=20251126 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rk-analilia-mejia-fundraising-split?refcode=20251126]
Analilia’s story is the story of so many New Jersey families.
She’s the daughter of Colombian and Dominican immigrants, raised by a seamstress and a factory worker who struggled to make ends meet. She grew up seeing the power of community, grit, and kindness firsthand.
That experience made her who she is: A fighter. A builder. A woman who won’t back down.
She has:
✅ Led the fight for a $15 minimum wage — and won
✅ Delivered paid sick leave and a millionaire’s tax
✅ Taken on corruption in both parties
✅ Served in the Biden Administration
✅ Helped lead Bernie Sanders’ presidential campaign
✅ Battled Trumpism and the billionaire class at every turn
She is running for Congress because working families need someone who understands struggle and will never sell out to big-money special interests.
And unlike too many in politics today, Analilia refuses corporate PAC money. She’s building a people-powered campaign from the ground up.
But she needs our help to win.
👉 Will you split a contribution between Analilia and my campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rk-analilia-mejia-fundraising-split?refcode=20251126]
Split $10 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rk-analilia-mejia-fundraising-split?refcode=20251126&amount=10]
Split $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rk-analilia-mejia-fundraising-split?refcode=20251126&amount=25]
Give Another Amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rk-analilia-mejia-fundraising-split?refcode=20251126]
With democracy under attack and working families squeezed from every direction, we need leaders with courage.
Analilia Mejia is one of the boldest, fiercest organizers I know.
Let’s send her to Congress.
Onward,
Ro Khanna
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rk-analilia-mejia-fundraising-split?refcode=20251126]

name: Brandon Herrera
subject: Thankful.
disclaimer_text: paid for by his congressional office, i
body:
Friend
Today, the day before Thanksgiving, I felt the need to take a moment and share what I'm thankful for: you.
Thanks to your support, we've now raised $1.1 million. To put that in perspective, we didn't cross the $1 million mark until March the last time around. This time, we got there four months sooner. None of that could have happened without your support.
No doubt, we need to raise more. Our opponent, the most anti-2A Republican in Congress, knows we're coming for him and he won't **underestimate** us like he did last time. He's already abusing his franking **privileges** and sending out campaign mail paid for by his congressional office, i.e. paid for by your tax dollars.
But I am not discouraged. With your continued support, we're going to crush Tony Gonzales and elect a true Constitutionalist to Congress.
And I'm always happy to thank our supporters with a chance to win something cool. The current **giveaway** is a rifle I built myself, the very first AKG Occam Warfighter. Every $5 you donate earns you a chance to win, so please make a donation today at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/cFtxynqgPlMra35C9mB7qQ/S8Zs763797638jIOdF3zicPMDQ).
Thank you and Happy Thanksgiving!
Respectfully,

Brandon Herrera

Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
[Unsubscribe here](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/unsubscribe/M3dKmjvhR8CwRJ801N0zlTlDygVorb8PbaawXpI4LLQ/GHbxLUJHhGugn7635ZCyW3rg/S8Zs763797638jIOdF3zicPMDQ)

| Happy Thanksgiving!
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Team,
Tracy and I want to wish you and your loved ones a Happy Thanksgiving! As Americans, we have much to be thankful for. We are blessed to live in a country where our God given rights are enshrined in the U.S. Constitution.
Please say a prayer for all our men and women in the military and our first responders who are away from home this holiday season, keeping us safe. I am thankful that fellow Americans re-elected Donald J. Trump and that we now have a majority in the House and a simple majority in the Senate. I am honored to be the first republican endorsed by President Trump for re-election in 2026.
We are praying for the families of the two National Guardsmen shot in D.C. This is a heartbreaking situation. It doesn't help when Democrats like Abigail Spanberger say things such as "Let your rage fuel you" and then Dems produce a ["seditious six"](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kZECEjrsq0iboueHoJVUAIohHBq0A6f_5Clqy4gRT15djzb5Q93ElsRLrwVXq2ZvJmiIeIVyJ_LMePVI6CRN-CGnhU_RMYgBAT5baCWjUw5JwtKZBFhL8NzAsh85ZlKqQ-TSnH9kNAKk_JuA4mcMK3d51vSZZVQYLq8MTFPZeCCrK51QPqQxOw==&c=QiqK38g5P1sQW2cWVXr1EbRxoHOphS1AC0Y0FJWFJ4eS9mfo17mUGw==&ch=eji3sCMtmNJ59ey0lGSI_41pcSfaFKnl24wnemk4lRclPXD4nsgigQ==) video that causes the American people to be angry at our military. Evil does exist. If you see something, say something, and do something. Let's keep an eye on each other. [Secretary of War Pete Hegseth response here.](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kZECEjrsq0iboueHoJVUAIohHBq0A6f_5Clqy4gRT15djzb5Q93ElsRLrwVXq2Zv3AzWYapeJMt-fjelYbP5IEkxW6agbpO15_TtJ-1pPTUPz5k_t2bGDCmcL_HgVbpeaaXtpq_LCuyxL26dAq-BEsOjOVne5xyXrJAI-S8P-vUT4p4uPECgzg==&c=QiqK38g5P1sQW2cWVXr1EbRxoHOphS1AC0Y0FJWFJ4eS9mfo17mUGw==&ch=eji3sCMtmNJ59ey0lGSI_41pcSfaFKnl24wnemk4lRclPXD4nsgigQ==)
It is an honor to represent you in Virginia's 5th Congressional District. God bless you, God bless our Commonwealth, and God bless America!
---
| How To Bag a RINO
---
| |
---
| I posted this picture/ message back when I decided to primary Bob Good. I did so because I was fed up with his anti-Christian/ hateful behavior towards his republican constituents. I wrote back then:
I'm catching up on my 'Honey Do" list before I bag a RINO in the Spring.
We can do better than Good. Bob Good has a history of helping Democrats.
1\. He betrayed Trump.
2\. Bob continues to support a 3 time Democrat in Louisa County who continues to raise taxes. 3\. Bob cost us the House & the Senate by ousting the Speaker with no plan. This also prevented us from timely helping Israel.
4\. Bob bullies fellow Republicans including Senior Citizens. I have heard several people say "that's just Bob." Those who keep giving him a pass for this wrongful behavior are complicit.
"I got mine, the heck with the team". While everyone was fighting across Virginia to help fellow Republicans win the House and the Senate, Bob was helping Bob...
---
| More "I got Mine the heck with the team"
---
| |
---
| My team and I, along with thousands of volunteers, campaigned nonstop across the 5th District and the Commonwealth to elect Republicans up and down the ticket. Yet in the critical final weeks before the election, the former 5th district Congressman, who, believe it or not, has already filed to primary me in 2026, toured the district telling Republican committees and activists that he would not support one of our statewide candidates and openly disparaged our party, and President Trump. That is vote suppression, plain and simple, carried out by a so called republican (RINO) against his own side. People called us appalled after each committee meeting and gave us recorded proof.
Any fair-minded Republican has to ask: why did the 5th District Republican Committee chairman and multiple unit GOP chairs allow a bitter former elected official to campaign inside our own house against our own nominees, mere weeks and days before the election? How is that leadership? How does that help us win?
This was not an isolated incident; it is part of a continuing pattern of dysfunctional, ego-driven decisions out of the 5th committee that keep costing us winnable elections. I've been told when committee chairs dare speak up against the pettiness, they get silenced and humiliated.
I have therefore lost any and all confidence in the current 5th District GOP chairman's ability to lead anything. We deserve better. Our voters deserve better. And if we want to start winning again in Virginia, we need new leadership that puts the team first, not personal vendettas, not petty score-settling, but victory.
Folks, we have a country to save, we need all hands on deck, and we don't have time for this nonsense. The 5th District can and should be the engine to help Republican success in the district and across the Commonwealth. With the right leadership, we will turn Virginia red again. Stay tuned!
---
| For God and Country,
---
|
---
Congressman John McGuire VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria
Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner
-Trump Endorsed -NRA Endorsed -Susan B. They’re determined to unseat Hillary.

But Hillary will never stop fighting for West Michigan.
---
| | The DeVos family can cut enormous checks without blinking.

What they can’t do is match the power of grassroots supporters who want honest, community-focused leadership — not billionaire influence.
---
| | Hillary won in 2022 because people here stood up to the DeVos machine. Now we need that same strength again.

Hey Peter, it's Valerie Foushee. I wanted to take a moment to share why this work means so much to me. This message is a little longer, so if you’re short on time, here’s the heart of it: **North Carolina is home.** I care deeply about this community, and I’m committed to doing everything I can to help it thrive. If that’s all you needed to hear, **[your support — even $10 — helps strengthen this grassroots effort and keeps our work moving forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120062828/585108130/1751535416?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_112625_EOM01_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2UzMGRmYi0wZGNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lXi3i8rzA2ZA9u9HksHOhWzzXj52tWRTBbc_pPja69o=)** | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120062829/585108131/1751535416?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_112625_EOM01_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2UzMGRmYi0wZGNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lXi3i8rzA2ZA9u9HksHOhWzzXj52tWRTBbc_pPja69o=)
---
I grew up right here in Orange County, and I’ve witnessed this community’s highs and lows up close. From a young age, my parents taught me the value of hard work, caring for your neighbors, and committing yourself to service and education — lessons that shaped every step of my path.
From the Chapel Hill–Carrboro City Schools Board to the Orange County Board of Commissioners, and from the North Carolina State House to the halls of Congress, my work has always been guided by the same principle: showing up for the community that raised me.
**Representing North Carolina’s Fourth Congressional District is one of my life’s greatest honors, and it wouldn’t be possible without your continued support.**
We continue to face persistent challenges — skyrocketing health care premiums, an affordability crisis that affects families across our community, and the daily pressures that make it harder for people to get ahead.
Yet these challenges only strengthen my resolve to find solutions, fight for our community, and ensure that everyone has the support they need to thrive.
**Right now, it’s clear that Washington isn’t working for the American people.** It’s time to turn the page on this disastrous Republican majority. We’ve got to put a stop to the chaos and get Congress back to work to make progress for the people.
**[If you believe like I do, that our best days are ahead, I hope you’ll stand with me. And if you’re ready for solutions over failed leadership, will you consider a contribution of any amount to my campaign before my end-of-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120062830/585108132/1751535416?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_112625_EOM01_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2UzMGRmYi0wZGNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lXi3i8rzA2ZA9u9HksHOhWzzXj52tWRTBbc_pPja69o=)**

clean_body: The road ahead holds significant challenges, but knowing I have supporters like you by my side gives me immense hope going into 2026. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hey Peter, it's Valerie Foushee. I wanted to take a moment to share why this work means so much to me. This message is a little longer, so if you’re short on time, here’s the heart of it: North Carolina is home. I care deeply about this community, and I’m committed to doing everything I can to help it thrive. If that’s all you needed to hear, = | | = I grew up right here in Orange County, and I’ve witnessed this community’s highs and lows up close. From a young age, my parents taught me the value of hard work, caring for your neighbors, and committing yourself to service and education — lessons that shaped every step of my path. From the Chapel Hill–Carrboro City Schools Board to the Orange County Board of Commissioners, and from the North Carolina State House to the halls of Congress, my work has always been guided by the same principle: showing up for the community that raised me. Representing North Carolina’s Fourth Congressional District is one of my life’s greatest honors, and it wouldn’t be possible without your continued support. We continue to face persistent challenges — skyrocketing health care premiums, an affordability crisis that affects families across our community, and the daily pressures that make it harder for people to get ahead. Yet these challenges only strengthen my resolve to find solutions, fight for our community, and ensure that everyone has the support they need to thrive. Right now, it’s clear that Washington isn’t working for the American people. It’s time to turn the page on this disastrous Republican majority. We’ve got to put a stop to the chaos and get Congress back to work to make progress for the people. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = The road ahead holds significant challenges, but knowing I have supporters like you by my side gives me immense hope going into 2026. With gratitude, Valerie Foushee = * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. name: Bonnie Watson Coleman
subject: I will not be seeking re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120062861/585108221/1328194270?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20251125_EN_Retirement_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODJkMmMwYS0wZWNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MTOLBuPMk-iDFA9gXgybu-_jLX2yCqOi5bCuoZYizWc=&emci=46a1dfcd-8fca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=382d2c0a-0ecb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=30096098) | Hi,

As you may have heard, I recently announced that I will not be seeking re-election. My time spent as a public servant has only been possible thanks to supporters like you.

I am proud to say that I’ve spent over 50 years fighting on the frontlines for what I believe in. Peace, prosperity, equity, and justice have served as guiding principles throughout my time in public service. My unwavering commitment to these principles has produced real effects and progressive change for my neighbors in New Jersey and in communities across America. It is my hope that the next elected leader to represent New Jersey's 12th congressional district is grounded in strong moral principles similar to mine and will be a forceful advocate for their constituents. I pray they, too, are committed to a united fight for the betterment of our nation and in the words of my dear friend and former colleague, Congressman John Lewis, stand ready to “Get in good trouble, necessary trouble, and help redeem the soul of America.”

The community we’ve built together over the years is something that I will never take for granted. I am beyond grateful for the support and trust you’ve given me to serve as your representative. I hope that the work we’ve accomplished together continues to lead us in the right direction. Your dedication and solidarity make me confident that the future of our nation is in good hands.

**While this journey is coming to an end, there is still so much work to be done.** Due to critical times like these, I will remain laser-focused on protecting the American people who deserve real leadership during my final year in Congress. I am fully committed to serving the people of New Jersey’s 12th congressional district and look forward to continuing that service until the very last day of my term.

Thank you again for supporting me throughout all these years. The work we’ve accomplished could not have been done without you.

Bonnie Watson Coleman
---
* * *

---
Bonnie Watson Coleman represents New Jersey's 12th district in Congress. She is a strong fighter for progressive values and has dedicated herself to the service of her community.

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

For the first time, we bring you **undeniable proof** — unfiltered, uncensored, and raw.

This is the footage they don’t want you to see.

**Behind the Markets**
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. This is Donald J. Trump. I just stepped out of a meeting with my top political team, and I’ll tell you straight: what I heard is not good.
The Radical Left is pouring money and resources into these midterms. They want to take back control and destroy everything we’ve accomplished.

name: Eva F. (via Fair Fight)
subject: Thankful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
On behalf of the whole team |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120063257/585109661/1793776944?refcode=emm_ff_20251126_f_EvaThanksgivingNote_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzJkZDEyZC0wZmNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3dqtAsGvA1DNuD9iPafnyIqu3j52Aq-UdT8J5vLFDkw=&emci=f33c3427-0fcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=c32dd12d-0fcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=1037277)

| | As we head into the holiday season, it’s an opportunity to think about the people we lean on, the causes we value, and all the reasons we have to be grateful. **I want you to know how thankful I am for your generous support and everything you do to defend the freedom to vote.** When we work together in community, we can achieve more than any of us could as individuals. When we link arms, we can push back against a surge of voter suppression, counter the rise of autocracy, and work towards a future where everyone has an equal voice in our democracy. And when we celebrate each other’s dedication, we fortify ourselves for the fights ahead. It’s been a year of heartbreak, but also hope, with more and more people joining this movement and new election victories to celebrate in Georgia, Mississippi, and around the country. We’ll need to stay dedicated to this work in the face of new challenges to come — and your support makes it possible. Wishing you a safe, healthy, and joyous holiday season on behalf of the whole team here. Eva (she/her/ella)
Director of Development
Fair Fight

name: Movement 4 Freedom
subject: Oligarchs don’t own us
body:
Join the Black Friday Blackout

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c2200fe5cdc5/tockcw1cwy-195?e=81ab29c4d2)
---
[|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=daff98408f&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | | | | | Peter,
---
| | Every year, corporations tell us the same story: that Black Friday is about “deals,” “savings,” and “holiday cheer.” But **we know better.**
What it’s really about is **helping millionaire corporate stockholders to earn record profits while the working class struggles** under the yoke of stagnant wages and record-high living expenses.
That’s why, from now until December 2nd, **the Movement for Freedom is joining organizers nationwide in the Black Friday Blackout** — an act of economic resistance designed to hit the systems that harm our communities where they feel it the most: their profits.
The Blackout is simple: don’t pour money into the systems that harm us. **Invest in small businesses in your community that have declined because of tariffs and ICE terror, contribute to a bail fund, or support any of the movements fighting for us.**
---

clean_body: Join the Black Friday Blackout | | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, | | Every year, corporations tell us the same story: that Black Friday is about “deals,” “savings,” and “holiday cheer.” But we know better. What it’s really about is helping millionaire corporate stockholders to earn record profits while the working class struggles under the yoke of stagnant wages and record-high living expenses. That’s why, from now until December 2nd, the Movement for Freedom is joining organizers nationwide in the Black Friday Blackout — an act of economic resistance designed to hit the systems that harm our communities where they feel it the most: their profits. The Blackout is simple: don’t pour money into the systems that harm us. Invest in small businesses in your community that have declined because of tariffs and ICE terror, contribute to a bail fund, or support any of the movements fighting for us. | | | This season, we’re asking our community to stand with that vision. name: ChrisForJustice.com
subject: Values alone won’t win this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251126-857&t=1&akid=861%2E294397%2EJhJR50)
Remember this headline?
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251126_2_ak.VOmM11&amount=10&refcode=em20251126-857&t=3&akid=861%2E294397%2EJhJR50)
Earlier this year, the Wisconsin Supreme Court rejected a 176-year-old abortion ban, safeguarding reproductive healthcare access for our state.
Recently, our far-right opponent, Maria Lazar, was asked about her position on this ruling.
Lazar’s response? _“I don’t know that I would've been in the majority on that case.”_
Wisconsinites deserve judges who will protect our freedoms — not question them.
That’s the difference in this race: **Maria Lazar would threaten our fundamental rights. Judge Chris Taylor will defend them.**
But values alone won’t win this race.
Right-wing special interests could start spending millions to boost Lazar’s campaign without warning, and we’re counting on grassroots support to fight back and win. [**Will you chip in $10 to elect Judge Chris Taylor?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251126_2_ak.VOmM11&amount=10&refcode=em20251126-857&t=4&akid=861%2E294397%2EJhJR50)

name: Team Kern
subject: I am THANKFUL
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Vote Kern]( "Paid For By Vote Kern")
body:
Service to you and the almighty keeps me going |
---
| | [ ](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=450088ecf2&e=b78dc6f299)
---
|
---
| **Anthony Kern For State Senate:

Sign my [e-qual](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=a2dfad0907&e=b78dc6f299) to put me on the ballot!**
---
|
---
| Supporters and Friends,

I’d like to open this special message with Scripture.
“O give thanks unto the LORD, for he is good: For his mercy endureth for ever.” Psalm 107:1
That particular verse is always close to my heart, but especially so this week, when all of America joins hands together in gratitude and celebration for the bounty God has given us as his children and to our nation.

_I have so much to be thankful for when I sit down for Thanksgiving dinner_.

My beautiful and _loving wife Jenny_ , my _four wonderful children_ , my successful career in law enforcement, and my public service in office for our state.

My heart is full, and I’m far from running on empty. That’s why I’m seeking to represent you and our community in the **Arizona State Senate.**

Not only is Thanksgiving about appreciativeness to God and others, but it’s also about G-I-V-I-N-G.

I’m asking you to give. Not a little, but as much as you’re able.

[**Just a small handful of studious, patriotic citizens in LD-27 stepping up and pledging $20 to my campaign every month would launch us off like a rocketship**](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=7e4b931a15&e=b78dc6f299). It’s that kind of community involvement that builds winning campaigns.

In one year, I’d like to repay that gratitude for your early contribution with good government, responsive constituent services, and principled leadership in the state senate. But to get there, I need your help now.

Please, don’t hesitate: [**give plenty and give often**](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=3428503a8e&e=b78dc6f299) to your principles and the people who champion them.

[**Chip in $20 this Thanksgiving and let’s share this appreciation**](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=835828a1d5&e=b78dc6f299).

Thank you, and may your plates be as full as God’s blessings on you and yours.
---
|
---
| | [DONATE NOW >](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=20be0575eb&e=b78dc6f299 "DONATE NOW >")
---
|
---
|
---

---
Thank you for standing with me,

Senator Anthony Kern **
**** [www.VoteKern.com](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=2463e5247b&e=b78dc6f299)**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The cost of holiday magic this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
From your Thanksgiving meal to your Black Friday deals, no corner of our economy has been untouched by Trump’s chaos.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2716%2E4032634%2E-Cd3aS)
---
I hope you’re getting to spend quality time with people you love this week and are finding moments of gratitude. The holiday season is one of my favorite times of year. But today, I’m thinking about how so many families are worried about how they’re going to afford to create that holiday magic this year. From traditional meals to holiday travel or Black Friday deals, no corner of our economy has been untouched by Trump and the Republicans’ failed economic policies. Let’s start with that Thanksgiving meal. If you felt sticker shock at the grocery store this year, you’re not imagining things: Thanksgiving dinner will cost consumers 9.8% more than it did last year. That’s the fastest rate of inflation in more than two years. You might be one of the millions of shoppers who try to score some discounts on Black Friday. More and more Americans are reporting they’re tightening their belts ahead of the biggest shopping day of the year because they’re concerned about high costs and greater economic uncertainty. And it’s no wonder: Trump’s chaotic tariffs have raised prices by nearly 5%, hitting everyday items like clothing and furniture particularly hard. Brands like Abercrombie & Fitch, Nike, and Walmart also report that Trump’s tariffs are pushing them to raise their prices. Record numbers of Americans are working multiple jobs in order to make ends meet this holiday season — the highest percentage in 15 years. At the same time, the Trump Administration’s recently released jobs report showed that hiring is slowing down, with unemployment ticking up to the highest level since 2021. Even workers who are employed are getting squeezed by giant companies. Walgreens, which was just bought out by private equity outfit Sycamore Partners, just yanked paid vacation time from its employees ahead of Thanksgiving and Christmas as part of aggressive cost-cutting measures. And for those planning to travel for the holidays this year, flyers could be left hung out to dry thanks to Donald Trump. His administration just rolled back requirements for airlines to reimburse customers if flight delays or cancellations are caused by the carriers. Trump ran on lowering costs on Day One of his administration. But it’s been over three hundred days and here’s the reality: Inflation is increasing. Trump’s chaotic tariffs are costing Americans an arm and a leg. And workers are less and less protected from predatory outfits like private equity that have been allowed to run rampant through our economy. This is what happens when you have a government that works for the wealthy and the well-connected and corporations. But it doesn't have to stay this way. Just as we built a government that favors the wealthy, we can rebuild a new one that works for the majority of Americans — if we fight for it. I’m fighting for a government that lends a hand to families trying to put food on the table — not to giant financial institutions looking for their next bailout. I’m fighting for an economy that gives every American the opportunity to thrive — not an economy that mints the world’s first trillionaire. I’m fighting for a government and an economy that works for everyone. That means ending the runaway corruption and profiteering from giant corporations. It means passing policies that will actually help American families get by, like affordable housing, child care, paid family leave, and universal health care. It’s going to take a lot of work to untangle this system, with political leaders fighting for bold solutions and a strong grassroots movement calling for a better way forward. But we can — and will — do this. That’s why it’s so important for you to stay in this fight. And a big part of that is resting and recharging for the fights ahead. So please, from the bottom of my heart, I hope you have a joyous, restful, and happy holiday this week. And please know, if times are feeling tough right now, I’m fighting for you. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---

---

name: Abigail
subject: I couldn’t be more grateful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
With you in my corner, Peter, we’ve accomplished so much for the Commonwealth.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120063468/585110415/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-11-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTVjMGJhZWUtMGZjYi1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=U3HvIvR06iHh2n5L0Vm_cOWy9-DybG9AGCBB15kGl4E=)
Peter,
Before you log off for Thanksgiving, I wanted to send a quick note. This year, especially, I have so much to be thankful for, and the support from all of you has been on my mind today as we start preparing for our family’s Thanksgiving meal tomorrow.
Because of you, we won this race. I couldn’t be more grateful for the time, trust, hard-earned dollars, and support you’ve given me.
Your unwavering support has enabled me to take this latest step in service to our Commonwealth.
With you in my corner, Peter, we’ve accomplished so much for the Commonwealth. Looking ahead, I’ll continue doing what I’ve always done – working tirelessly for the needs of our communities.
From my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving.
With gratitude,
Abigail

clean_body: With you in my corner, Peter, we’ve accomplished so much for the Commonwealth. = Peter, Before you log off for Thanksgiving, I wanted to send a quick note. This year, especially, I have so much to be thankful for, and the support from all of you has been on my mind today as we start preparing for our family’s Thanksgiving meal tomorrow. Because of you, we won this race. I couldn’t be more grateful for the time, trust, hard-earned dollars, and support you’ve given me. Your unwavering support has enabled me to take this latest step in service to our Commonwealth. With you in my corner, Peter, we’ve accomplished so much for the Commonwealth. Looking ahead, I’ll continue doing what I’ve always done – working tirelessly for the needs of our communities. From my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving. With gratitude, Abigail = By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. _When I first stepped off the football field and into the political arena to run for U.S. Senate, people said I didn 't stand a chance._

The media laughed at me. Democrats spent millions of dollars trying to shut my campaign down. Every liberal group in America piled on.

_They didn 't just want to beat me... they wanted to humiliate me. To send a message: outsiders like me don't belong in Washington._

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=d65d280215854ee5918e3837b562e646&_e=W7PhmLLJDRqb4__HlZ1FTjP3glIbZO20AfjI6SArDinyU0kcHCXQe98DewzlgIdLX4Xt9iAHwoEKXc5SAEBDRBY6psE8_FiU-LWEn3v-OqcishYGjKE94Row23s1rCYFdFvT3TP6gRhWk5fOiBIPX6dJ5q1UKZZKIslMN07sERMHuCkdbFGJ_qOhAoyCo_4efyWdVOrlE7nu9UEUAKokhq6RcFzEx7rTH2WkfRbgjphPYP07JOE_BWx7f7xPLX3iC_slfBghXMsSDp_vq6WN0RLE4K5tjKZjng5FZ65Xga4Z3SHv_QzOkP83iCSwYVW5Kr4ccuvmXcCLe3r4UUKVQ9qP2b0C1ENIDl2a4oAk-Us5XzzK9X9iddAYSW1LjQkMgRIS1GbK-iuyPooyWtGFL3OhTaFsxW9WMig4VT7Olt_XHEDxZ60BeO3wKLDboIH1xNiC2MGltXTjoNMyMAk4xaGIotQWTqL54fc35D8vUUGqj4fSlr54dK-7inOtGM1g2FdAgeuGCSPh76JHfylz7OTfZJyuqxeMRsorPbpDYVfcpE7LduTbqhKcgOJG-1XM)
