Hi Peter — It’s Wiley! Between local elections that took place earlier this month, campaign stops across Wake County, and my 50th birthday, it’s safe to say that things have been quite busy on the campaign trail. So, I wanted to reach out and give you an update on what I’ve been up to lately:
* * *
**Earlier this month, I joined Democrats on the campaign trail ahead of our historic victories on Election Day.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120064712/585113982/1409485659?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yzk5NmU3NC0xM2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fm97S5eHincpLsMXV7xXzPzYQU4__NSr296ShFHGGE=) We elected several Democrats to local offices across Wake County who will fight for our rights, defend our freedoms, and deliver results that make a meaningful difference in people’s lives. **I also had the opportunity to speak with voters about the importance of the Wake County DA’s race.** I was grateful to join the congregation at White Oak Missionary Baptist Church in Apex to talk about faith and public service — and to discuss the true meaning of leadership that involves working with our community to ensure justice serves everyone in Wake County. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120064714/585113983/1409485659?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yzk5NmU3NC0xM2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fm97S5eHincpLsMXV7xXzPzYQU4__NSr296ShFHGGE=) And I had meaningful conversations with voters in Cary at House Party #2 — where we discussed how we could fight for justice and improve public safety across our community. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120064715/585113984/1409485659?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yzk5NmU3NC0xM2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fm97S5eHincpLsMXV7xXzPzYQU4__NSr296ShFHGGE=) **And I can’t forget my 50th birthday, Peter!** I couldn’t be more grateful for my wife, Caroline, and our two kids, Prescott and Adeline, for making this the best birthday ever. I also want to extend a special thanks to all of you for your kind birthday messages and all the support you’ve shown me on this journey. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120064716/585113985/1409485659?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yzk5NmU3NC0xM2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fm97S5eHincpLsMXV7xXzPzYQU4__NSr296ShFHGGE=)
* * *
**What’s next?** I’m proud of what we’re building, but we still have a long road ahead. If you’re looking for ways to get involved in this campaign, consider: ✅ **[Making a donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120064717/585113987/1409485659?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yzk5NmU3NC0xM2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fm97S5eHincpLsMXV7xXzPzYQU4__NSr296ShFHGGE=)**
✅ **[Hosting a house party](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120064718/585113988/-1189704721?contactdata=TAUCycf0QP/D1ybjsC9vn585N7Fom26phegDOVFbhmqXOLLyd7evsFwKGXn/2b2psu6UcrAh/OElWwzXX7Y3lTjrJrfdLyj1+2FxJDlP1PvghSfec6fA/OhjixeRb49C&refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yzk5NmU3NC0xM2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fm97S5eHincpLsMXV7xXzPzYQU4__NSr296ShFHGGE=&emci=a8abd21d-13cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=4c996e74-13cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=28008880)**
✅ **[Putting up a lawn sign in your community](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120064720/585113989/-1189704721?contactdata=TAUCycf0QP/D1ybjsC9vn585N7Fom26phegDOVFbhmqXOLLyd7evsFwKGXn/2b2psu6UcrAh/OElWwzXX7Y3lTjrJrfdLyj1+2FxJDlP1PvghSfec6fA/OhjixeRb49C&refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yzk5NmU3NC0xM2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fm97S5eHincpLsMXV7xXzPzYQU4__NSr296ShFHGGE=&emci=a8abd21d-13cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=4c996e74-13cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=28008880)**
✅ **[Knocking on doors](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120064721/585113990/963080434?contactdata=TAUCycf0QP/D1ybjsC9vn585N7Fom26phegDOVFbhmqXOLLyd7evsFwKGXn/2b2psu6UcrAh/OElWwzXX7Y3lTjrJrfdLyj1+2FxJDlP1PvghSfec6fA/OhjixeRb49C&refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yzk5NmU3NC0xM2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fm97S5eHincpLsMXV7xXzPzYQU4__NSr296ShFHGGE=&emci=a8abd21d-13cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=4c996e74-13cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=28008880)** No matter how you choose to get involved, I can’t tell you how grateful I am for your support. — Wiley

name: Build Alaska's Future Education Fund
subject: We’ve Made Real Impact — Building Trust, Transparency, and Opportunity in Alaska
body:
As we enter a season of gratitude and gathering, we want to take a moment to thank you. Your support truly makes a difference. Because of your continued investment, Build Alaska’s Future Education Fund (BAFEF) is closing the trust gap by making government data open, accessible, and understandable—so every Alaskan can see where funds come from, where they go, and how they shape daily life.| | |
---
| | Dear Supporter, As we enter a season of gratitude and gathering, we want to take a moment to thank you. Your support truly makes a difference. Because of your continued investment, **[Build Alaska’s Future Education Fund (BAFEF)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120064813/585114395/-412970717?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWU1YzRmNy0xM2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHc4F01HdkSL1syprDZar-MJzEOb3EASaXSvCJssJJM=&emci=c82b6a27-05cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=41e5c4f7-13cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399) is closing the trust gap by making government data open, accessible, and understandable**—so every Alaskan can see where funds come from, where they go, and how they shape daily life. **Our aim is clear: to put more people to work, engage with youth, and reverse outward migration, while strengthening trust and accountability across the state**. This is not one project but a cohesive effort that links transparency, workforce development, civic leadership, and good governance into a single, unified mission.
---
**[OUR MISSION IN ACTION — GOVERNANCE OPPORTUNITY AND YOUTH ENGAGEMENT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120064814/585114398/-412970717?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWU1YzRmNy0xM2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHc4F01HdkSL1syprDZar-MJzEOb3EASaXSvCJssJJM=&emci=c82b6a27-05cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=41e5c4f7-13cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399)** BAFEF initiatives **ClerkStart** and the **Alaska Governance Project** work together to strengthen local governance across 200+ communities. **ClerkStart __** spotlights clerks and tribal administrators to inspire the next generation, documenting their essential roles in elections, records, and governance. The **Alaska Governance Project** provides practical tools such as templates, budgeting, procurement, and election resources, to help tribal and municipal governments operate more transparently and effectively. We are also creating opportunities and engaging youth to keep Alaskans connected to their communities. the **Alaska Native Workforce Development Collaborative** delivers hands-on training, apprenticeships, and workforce pathways through rural workshops and programs in Fairbanks, aligning with federal investments to build a skilled, local workforce. Youth engagement programs foster civic leadership and strengthen community ties, ensuring young Alaskans envision a future here at home. **[TRUST THROUGH TRANSPARENCY: MAPPING ALASKA'S INVESTMENTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120064815/585114401/-412970717?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWU1YzRmNy0xM2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHc4F01HdkSL1syprDZar-MJzEOb3EASaXSvCJssJJM=&emci=c82b6a27-05cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=41e5c4f7-13cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399)** Our interactive [**GIS platform**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120064816/585114407/-1512324198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWU1YzRmNy0xM2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHc4F01HdkSL1syprDZar-MJzEOb3EASaXSvCJssJJM=&emci=c82b6a27-05cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=41e5c4f7-13cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399#map) at BuildAlaska.org tracks nearly $10 billion in federal investments across Alaska. This tool, kept accurate and accessible by your support, helps policymakers, tribal and municipal leaders, and residents understand how infrastructure dollars flow through the state. Paired with the **[Know Your Investment, Voice Your Future](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120064817/585114415/1960464292?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWU1YzRmNy0xM2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHc4F01HdkSL1syprDZar-MJzEOb3EASaXSvCJssJJM=&emci=c82b6a27-05cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=41e5c4f7-13cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399)** story map series, we translate data into meaningful narratives—showing how investments affect schools, transportation, broadband, safety, and opportunity in every region. The **Economic Forum Series** , in partnership with [Commonwealth North](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120064818/585114423/-1385731277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWU1YzRmNy0xM2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHc4F01HdkSL1syprDZar-MJzEOb3EASaXSvCJssJJM=&emci=c82b6a27-05cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=41e5c4f7-13cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399) and [ISER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120064819/585114432/-1048384790?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWU1YzRmNy0xM2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHc4F01HdkSL1syprDZar-MJzEOb3EASaXSvCJssJJM=&emci=c82b6a27-05cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=41e5c4f7-13cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399), brings together economists, policymakers, and community members to discuss key issues grounded in real data and lived experience. **Your gift also supports our broader goal of closing the trust gap by ensuring data is open and understandable, so Alaskans can participate in governance and directly benefit from federal investments.** **[YOUR SUPPORT REACHES BEYOND ALASKA](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120064820/585114445/-412970717?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWU1YzRmNy0xM2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHc4F01HdkSL1syprDZar-MJzEOb3EASaXSvCJssJJM=&emci=c82b6a27-05cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=41e5c4f7-13cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399)** Many of our donors don’t live in Alaska—but they understand the impact of this work. We are now collaborating with partners outside Alaska to develop similar approaches and support aligned organizations, while keeping a strong, rooted focus on our home state. **Your continued investment helps this work grow nationally while staying deeply connected here at home**. **If you’re able, please consider renewing your support today at[BuildAlaska.org](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120064821/585114452/-412970717?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWU1YzRmNy0xM2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHc4F01HdkSL1syprDZar-MJzEOb3EASaXSvCJssJJM=&emci=c82b6a27-05cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=41e5c4f7-13cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399).** We’d also welcome conversations about volunteer leadership or community outreach—your leadership can make a meaningful difference. Reach us at [info@buildalaska.org](mailto:info@buildalaska.org) We’re grateful for your ongoing commitment! Wishing you and your loved ones a warm season of harvest and connection, and a respectful acknowledgment of Indigenous Peoples Day, wherever you are. With sincere appreciation, Build Alaska’s Future Education Fund (BAFEF) EIN: 86-3758133Website: [BuildAlaska.org](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120064822/585114459/-1512324198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWU1YzRmNy0xM2NiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHc4F01HdkSL1syprDZar-MJzEOb3EASaXSvCJssJJM=&emci=c82b6a27-05cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=41e5c4f7-13cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9512399)Email: [info@buildalaska.org](mailto:info@buildalaska.org) P.S. Because of your continued investment, Build Alaska’s Future Education Fund (BAFEF) is closing the trust gap by making government data open, accessible, and understandable—so every Alaskan can see where funds come from, where they go, and how they shape daily life.| | | | | Dear Supporter, As we enter a season of gratitude and gathering, we want to take a moment to thank you. Your support truly makes a difference. Because of your continued investment, is closing the trust gap by making government data open, accessible, and understandable—so every Alaskan can see where funds come from, where they go, and how they shape daily life. Our aim is clear: to put more people to work, engage with youth, and reverse outward migration, while strengthening trust and accountability across the state. This is not one project but a cohesive effort that links transparency, workforce development, civic leadership, and good governance into a single, unified mission. BAFEF initiatives ClerkStart and the Alaska Governance Project work together to strengthen local governance across 200+ communities. ClerkStart spotlights clerks and tribal administrators to inspire the next generation, documenting their essential roles in elections, records, and governance. The Alaska Governance Project provides practical tools such as templates, budgeting, procurement, and election resources, to help tribal and municipal governments operate more transparently and effectively. We are also creating opportunities and engaging youth to keep Alaskans connected to their communities. the Alaska Native Workforce Development Collaborative delivers hands-on training, apprenticeships, and workforce pathways through rural workshops and programs in Fairbanks, aligning with federal investments to build a skilled, local workforce. Youth engagement programs foster civic leadership and strengthen community ties, ensuring young Alaskans envision a future here at home. Our interactive at BuildAlaska.org tracks nearly $10 billion in federal investments across Alaska. This tool, kept accurate and accessible by your support, helps policymakers, tribal and municipal leaders, and residents understand how infrastructure dollars flow through the state. Paired with the story map series, we translate data into meaningful narratives—showing how investments affect schools, transportation, broadband, safety, and opportunity in every region. The Economic Forum Series , in partnership with and , brings together economists, policymakers, and community members to discuss key issues grounded in real data and lived experience. Your gift also supports our broader goal of closing the trust gap by ensuring data is open and understandable, so Alaskans can participate in governance and directly benefit from federal investments. Many of our donors don’t live in Alaska—but they understand the impact of this work. We are now collaborating with partners outside Alaska to develop similar approaches and support aligned organizations, while keeping a strong, rooted focus on our home state. Your continued investment helps this work grow nationally while staying deeply connected here at home. If you’re able, please consider renewing your support today at. We’d also welcome conversations about volunteer leadership or community outreach—your leadership can make a meaningful difference. Reach us at mailto:info@buildalaska.org We’re grateful for your ongoing commitment! Wishing you and your loved ones a warm season of harvest and connection, and a respectful acknowledgment of Indigenous Peoples Day, wherever you are. With sincere appreciation, Build Alaska’s Future Education Fund (BAFEF) EIN: 86-3758133Website: : mailto:info@buildalaska.org P.S. All contributions to BAFEF are tax-deductible. President Donald Trump condemned the shooter suspected of critically wounding two National Guardsmen in Washington D.C. on Wednesday, **[calling the individual an"animal" who will "pay a very steep price"](https://substack.com/redirect/a24e0f20-b938-4799-be58-ba1f08fd9d6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** despite being severely wounded themselves.
## _WATCH:_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a24e0f20-b938-4799-be58-ba1f08fd9d6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a24e0f20-b938-4799-be58-ba1f08fd9d6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In a Truth Social post Wednesday afternoon, Trump expressed strong support for the U.S. military and law enforcement, calling them "truly great people" and stating "God bless our Great National Guard, and all of our Military and Law Enforcement," while emphasizing that "I, as President of the United States, and everyone associated with the Office of the Presidency, am with you!"
**[Track Fox News' real-time coverage of the developing story](https://substack.com/redirect/ba5a82a5-30f7-4ce6-b989-d07cddff7142?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
* * *
# Press Conference: FBI Director Kash Patel provides update on National Guard shooting in D.C.
"Please send your prayers to those brave warriors, who are in critical condition, and their families,... They are here serving our country."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/da903d96-41be-40f4-beb7-21d0c5bb398d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **[Say NO to Communism!](https://substack.com/redirect/45cfbb72-afa1-4653-afe6-04cf9d7ccb20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
## **Get your "Communism Kills" Commie Mamdani shirt here:**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/45cfbb72-afa1-4653-afe6-04cf9d7ccb20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Shop Now](https://substack.com/redirect/45cfbb72-afa1-4653-afe6-04cf9d7ccb20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Trump announces renovation of Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool
President Trump announced Wednesday via this Truth Social post that his next innovation project will be the famed Lincoln Memorial Reflection Pool in Washington, DC. This announcement comes after Trump broke ground on the privately funded White House ballroom, which is set to be completed before the end of his second term.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a11ed7e8-fefc-470c-9019-e23afab92f53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
# **White House slams MS NOW report on potential Patel ouster as "fake news"**
The White House is rejecting an MS NOW story claiming President Trump is considering **[firing FBI Director Kash Patel](https://substack.com/redirect/22d6c638-7add-4470-8765-666478f2a073?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , with Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt calling the report "completely made up" and sharing a photo of Trump and Patel together.
* **Report details frustrations:** MS NOW cited three unnamed sources Tuesday alleging Trump and top aides have grown frustrated with negative headlines surrounding Patel, including scrutiny over his girlfriend's security detail, government jet usage, and disputes with other Trump allies, with Deputy FBI official Andrew Bailey reportedly eyed as a replacement.
* **Direct Oval Office rebuttal:** Leavitt said she was meeting with Trump and his law enforcement team, including Patel, when the story published, claiming the president laughed at the headline and declared it "totally false" before posing for a supportive photograph with the FBI director.
* **Network stands firm:** MS NOW correspondent Ken Dilanian defended the reporting on-air, saying FBI sources texted him he was "spot on" and maintaining that Attorney General Pam Bondi, the White House, and Trump have grown annoyed with Patel's unfavorable press coverage, while the network told Fox News Digital it stands by the story.

The contentious back-and-forth highlights ongoing tensions between the administration and media outlets over personnel reporting
* * *
# **Trump blasts New York Times over story questioning his energy level**
President Trump **[unleashed on](https://substack.com/redirect/360b1bef-7ad7-48dc-8c99-40596b0d462f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** _**[The New York Times](https://substack.com/redirect/360b1bef-7ad7-48dc-8c99-40596b0d462f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** _Wednesday, denouncing the paper over an article suggesting he shows signs of fatigue and maintains a lighter schedule than during his first term in office.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/360b1bef-7ad7-48dc-8c99-40596b0d462f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Stamina scrutiny:** _The Times_ published a report analyzing Trump's daily activities, finding fewer public events compared to his first presidency and noting he typically appears between noon and 5 p.m., with reporters claiming he appeared to doze during a recent Oval Office event--echoing criticism Trump previously leveled at predecessor Joe Biden
* **Aggressive response:** Trump fired back on Truth Social calling Times reporters "Radical Left Lunatics," touting his 2024 landslide victory, claiming he "settled 8 Wars" and achieved 48 stock market highs, while insisting he passed a "PERFECT PHYSICAL EXAM" and "aced" a cognitive test, though acknowledging "there will be a day when I run low on Energy"
* **Paper stands firm:** A Times spokesperson defended the reporting as "accurate and built on first-hand reporting," stating that personal insults and intimidation tactics won't deter coverage of the administration, while praising correspondent Katie Rogers--whom Trump insulted as "ugly, both inside and out"--as an exemplar of independent journalism

The clash marks the latest confrontation between Trump and the Times, coming days after Vice President JD Vance criticized the paper's framing of an illegal immigrant identity theft story.
* * *

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Help Restore the First Amendment This Giving Tuesday
body:
Be part of a national effort to reignite civic courage and free speech.
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Ffoundation/1/0100019ac258239b-541980cd-a34d-4d88-bd85-8d071b006e89-000000/EcRiRzj6SCgNorxxbp-j7DWTvBOSyv8cReQNgEeYPTE=433)Patriot–In just a few days, Americans will celebrate Thanksgiving — a time to pause, give thanks, and remember the blessings of liberty that make our nation unlike any other on earth. The week after, on **Giving Tuesday** , patriots across the country will join together in a national day of generosity — it’s a day to show your love and gratitude for America.And this year, [_**your Giving Tuesday gift**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Ffoundation%2Fyearend%2F/1/0100019ac258239b-541980cd-a34d-4d88-bd85-8d071b006e89-000000/f_a0JABo7ojTciz_KIfURvJqvmG02s7Le5O2y-35xJU=433)**can do something truly historic.** **With your help,** Tea Party Patriots Foundation will launch the _America250 Free Speech Revival Bus Tour_ : a cross-country campaign to **educate, equip, and inspire citizens to use their First Amendment rights** of free speech, peaceful assembly, and petitioning the government.From April through June of 2026, our team will travel to 45 cities in more than two dozen states, marking America’s 250th birthday with a renewed call to courage and civic action. At every stop, [_**your Giving Tuesday gift will make it possible**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Ffoundation%2Fyearend%2F/2/0100019ac258239b-541980cd-a34d-4d88-bd85-8d071b006e89-000000/ChGDVffpP3dGm5d_Q84Nwnr1vEUEkSRJUWVeU0x-lOc=433) for citizens to gather and learn — or re-learn — what the First Amendment truly protects: how to defend it, advance it, and use it. They’ll also learn how to organize around these freedoms in their communities and speak out with confidence and conviction.Our focus for the tour is adults, rather than children, for two key reasons. First, while many conservatives are wisely focusing their America250 efforts on educating American youth, adults also need civic formation. Second, parents and grandparents are the teachers who pass on our values and history. If they lack the knowledge and understanding to do so, future generations will be unprepared for the fight to keep our Republic.[_**When you give on** **Giving Tuesday or before,**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Ffoundation%2Fyearend%2F/3/0100019ac258239b-541980cd-a34d-4d88-bd85-8d071b006e89-000000/KLD5aajxqLts5kA_1WBDuyMLDk48istT--o1ds-uo6Q=433) you’ll help ensure Americans of every generation understand what freedom really means and how to live it out boldly. **Your tax-deductible gift will help restore the spirit of liberty and reinvigorate our First Amendment for America’s 250th birthday — and beyond.**[ SUPPORT THE TOUR](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Ffoundation%2Fyearend%2F/4/0100019ac258239b-541980cd-a34d-4d88-bd85-8d071b006e89-000000/kvo1zFB4rn8D44A245wOVrzD1I4xUBLVEuu1_UBnyGg=433)We want this once-in-a-lifetime milestone to be more than a celebration, and **_we need your help to make it happen._** It must be a **revival of freedom** , a return to the founding ideals that have always made America strong, with the First Amendment as a cornerstone of that foundation.In liberty,Jenny Beth Martin[CONTRIBUTE](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Ffoundation%2Fyearend%2F/5/0100019ac258239b-541980cd-a34d-4d88-bd85-8d071b006e89-000000/WKdKTNwb52S996cas43dC3JCKQTldiedVeQ0zFuYkgk=433) _This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. All rights reserved.__Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes._ To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:[_**Tea Party Patriots Foundation**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Ffoundation%2Fdonate%2F/1/0100019ac258239b-541980cd-a34d-4d88-bd85-8d071b006e89-000000/ENKbef5Fdf2qK2HWS8LTEm1eeNh_rXXjutYFnqQ2eIM=433)
2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314
Woodstock, GA 30189Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [unsubscribe](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/1/0100019ac258239b-541980cd-a34d-4d88-bd85-8d071b006e89-000000/FLzwV63-sA43V1dWzgKozCs4TpzbgP5o-mpXVrQO6lM=433) or [update your preferences](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/2/0100019ac258239b-541980cd-a34d-4d88-bd85-8d071b006e89-000000/Bi5jBojnd4hpswhdhVd0AT6-k3lNzDUlqpEESQq5DKU=433).

body:
I’m counting on your support more than ever before
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120065740/585117507/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGFlYWM1My0xYWNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mEY8iNf5IGhcJWkPxhkfOMFRnsoJgXVTCxeLc2lU8h8=)
Friends, it’s Robert Garcia.
California just stepped up to stop the GOP’s attempt to rig the Congressional map in order to secure another term in power.
_We rejected the old playbook that lets billionaires and power brokers dictate everything — including congressional maps and election rules — to benefit themselves._
And now, with the election year just around the corner, the fight is on. This new landscape is our chance to show what democracy should actually look like. **But it also means I’m running in an entirely new and more competitive district and launching a brand new campaign.**
[**That’s why I’m asking you to spare just 30 seconds to watch my launch video below — and then chip in $5, $10, or more to help our campaign hit the ground running and raise the resources we need to keep fighting for Californians in Congress. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120065741/585117508/789508428?refcode=251125_RG_campaign-launch2-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGFlYWM1My0xYWNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mEY8iNf5IGhcJWkPxhkfOMFRnsoJgXVTCxeLc2lU8h8=)

[WATCH NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120065743/585117510/-309737922?refcode=251125_RG_campaign-launch2-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGFlYWM1My0xYWNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mEY8iNf5IGhcJWkPxhkfOMFRnsoJgXVTCxeLc2lU8h8=)
I’m running for Congress because I’ve lived the dream this country promises.
My mom brought me here, took every risk so I could succeed, and I saw firsthand how hard work and hope should matter more than who you know or how much money you have in the bank.
This race is about more than one seat. It’s about saying loud and clear that working people should come first, not billionaires who already own the game or lobbyists writing laws behind closed doors.
**And in the face of intense change, in this competitive new district, we aren’t shrinking. We’re showing up. We’re organizing. And we’re winning.**
[**But we can’t do it without you. Your support today means we can build the campaign that matches the moment. If you believe in a district where your vote counts and your voice matters, then stand with me by chipping in $5, $10, or more right away. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120065744/585117511/789508428?refcode=251125_RG_campaign-launch2-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGFlYWM1My0xYWNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mEY8iNf5IGhcJWkPxhkfOMFRnsoJgXVTCxeLc2lU8h8=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120065745/585117512/-309737922?refcode=251125_RG_campaign-launch2-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGFlYWM1My0xYWNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mEY8iNf5IGhcJWkPxhkfOMFRnsoJgXVTCxeLc2lU8h8=)

Folks, welcome back to _Amped Up_! If you needed proof democracy's not just alive, but kicking, yelling, and occasionally drop-kicking fascists in the shins--yes, when they go lower, we go lower!--today's show had ya covered.
We had a hell of a convo, and not just because David Shuster looked like the world's most well-rested cable-news veteran thanks to our sponsor, **[Particle for Men](https://substack.com/redirect/7e186e31-8483-43f0-9bcb-50a9e847b469?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (**_use code**BLUE30**_**).** A face cream that somehow makes David look like he sleeps more than four hours a night.
You wanna fight fascism _and_ wrinkles at the same time? Particle is your guy...or gal. Just sayin', [if saving democracy came in this bottle, it'd moisturize as well](https://substack.com/redirect/7e186e31-8483-43f0-9bcb-50a9e847b469?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
But before we get going, _**BREAKING NEWS**_ from a new poll in Tennessee's 7th District that is nothing short of _stunning_. **Aftyn Behn** -- a Democrat running in a district Trump won by **22 points** and where former Rep. Mark Green routinely cruised to victory -- is now statistically neck-and-neck with Republican Matt Van Epps.
According to **The Tennessean** , Behn trails by just **2 points** , well within striking distance and light-years from where a Democrat "should" be in a district gerrymandered ruby red. This is the political equivalent of a Bernie Sanders reissuing his book "Fight Oligarchy" and a Koch Brother (the alive one) writing the foreword.

But today wasn't about eye bags--it was about moral clarity. And no one brought more than our guest[Nick Paro](https://open.substack.com/users/189675044-nick-paro?utm_source=mentions). Veteran, Substack powerhouse, civic bulldozer, and a thoughtful, grounded political voice we need out there fighting for us.
Nick joined us on the heels of the Mark Kelly & Co. military oath controversy. Ya know, where the Trump regime decided that six Democrats who served in our military or intelligence reminding service members to disobey illegal orders--**illegal orders** --is somehow tantamount to treason.
So Trump's trying to threaten, intimidate, and investigate Mark Kelly. _Mark Kelly_. Veteran, astronaut, caretaker for his wife, Gabby Giffords, former Congresswoman, nearly assassinated by a lunatic responding to the kinda stochastic terrorism Trump's spouting.
Knowing all this, I don't know how Trump can even talk to Kelly without his bone spurs flaring up.
In any case, Nick cut through the BS, laying out the reality every soldier knows. Your oath is to the Constitution, _not_ to a man, or wannabe king, and whatever bottle of whiskey is sitting on Pete Hegseth's desk when you walk into the so-called "Department of War." Nick took us through mission command, the legal structure of military obedience, and why "I was just following orders" won't cut it in the U.S. military.
David was his usual fire today, too, reminding us how deep the rot goes. When he talked about Kristi Noem's criminal contempt exposure, the growing paths to impeaching the orange hobgoblin, and how Republicans are terrified with the Epstein files about to drop, you could feel in the air what we've been feeling a lot lately.
The tide has shifted, left dead fish on the shore, and is telling us, from Epstein to MTG, his polling among onetime supporters to his economic sabotage, what's coming. And David, in Shuster-ific form, did no sugarcoating.
* * *

* * *
This was where Nick really came alive. He talked about community building--veterans linking arms, creators lifting each other up, the "fuck-you-left" stepping into its rightful place. No apologizing for moral clarity, no soft-pedaling constitutional truths, but standing tall and being loud.
He talked about men taking responsibility without turning into the grievance-soaked rage puppets The Right cultivates. And to paraphrase Sollozzo from _The Godfather_ , all those politicians they carry around in their pockets, like so many nickels and dimes.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7e186e31-8483-43f0-9bcb-50a9e847b469?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Nick also discussed elevating powerful voices--from Melissa Corrigan to Ellie Leonard--and why this moment demands organized courage, not polite despair. And then we got into the hard stuff.
Impeachment as a constitutional duty, state Attorneys General using their legal jurisdiction to prosecute federal corruption, turning donors against corrupt incumbents, and pressuring institutions that have been asleep at the wheel.
Nick hasn't been doing this that long, but he has the moral clarity of a man who's been fighting trench warfare for years. When he said, _" They have to be afraid of losing their jobs,"_ I know David and I were like, "right on." Hell, I think half the chat stood up and applauded.
We even touched on the overlooked battlegrounds--Arkansas, Tennessee, Missouri--and why abandoning these states is political malpractice. Imagine if we'd been messaging that +22 Republican district in Tennessee with the special election coming up, we might even be the favorite.
Trump has scrambled up the maps with his chaos, cruelty, corruption, criminality, and incompetence. The map isn't fixed like it has been for the past quarter-century. People are changing. The anger is real. And if we organize, speak plainly, and stop letting the fascists control the language and put them on defense--we win.
The show was passion, strategy, humor, constitutional literacy, veteran insight, and a little bit of skincare--all working hand in hand, sometimes[ with face cream](https://substack.com/redirect/7e186e31-8483-43f0-9bcb-50a9e847b469?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--to defend democracy. That's what _Amped Up_ is.
And that's who _we_ are.
Today, Nick Paro reminded us why we fight: because it's our time. Our moment. Our country.

Wanna help Blue Amp Media with just a click? We've got an ad for a genuinely great product for men -- perfect timing for holiday shopping! Great for you guys. But also for our female subscribers who need a gift for a husband, son, dad, brother.Ya got it right here! Clicking thru helps us grow , so we can spend more time fighting fascism and amplifying democracy. So please click on the ad, grab a great product I've been using for years, and support independent media all at the same time! Happy Thanksgiving! -- Cliff Folks, welcome back to Amped Up! If you needed proof democracy's not just alive, but kicking, yelling, and occasionally drop-kicking fascists in the shins--yes, when they go lower, we go lower!--today's show had ya covered. We had a hell of a convo, and not just because David Shuster looked like the world's most well-rested cable-news veteran thanks to our sponsor, (use codeBLUE30). A face cream that somehow makes David look like he sleeps more than four hours a night. You wanna fight fascism and wrinkles at the same time? Particle is your guy...or gal. Just sayin', . But before we get going, BREAKING NEWS from a new poll in Tennessee's 7th District that is nothing short of stunning. Aftyn Behn -- a Democrat running in a district Trump won by 22 points and where former Rep. Mark Green routinely cruised to victory -- is now statistically neck-and-neck with Republican Matt Van Epps. According to The Tennessean , Behn trails by just 2 points , well within striking distance and light-years from where a Democrat "should" be in a district gerrymandered ruby red. This is the political equivalent of a Bernie Sanders reissuing his book "Fight Oligarchy" and a Koch Brother (the alive one) writing the foreword. | | ---|---|--- Aftyn Behn BAM Guys! Tired of eye bags, dry skin? Me too til I tried . Made for real guys' skin, Particle ends puffiness, smooths crow 's feet, soothes after shaves. I've used it for years -- I 'm the ad. 🔥 ! Click now while it lasts! | | ---|---|--- Use code BLUE30! But today wasn't about eye bags--it was about moral clarity. And no one brought more than our guest. Veteran, Substack powerhouse, civic bulldozer, and a thoughtful, grounded political voice we need out there fighting for us. Nick joined us on the heels of the Mark Kelly & Co. military oath controversy. Ya know, where the Trump regime decided that six Democrats who served in our military or intelligence reminding service members to disobey illegal orders--illegal orders --is somehow tantamount to treason. So Trump's trying to threaten, intimidate, and investigate Mark Kelly. Mark Kelly. Veteran, astronaut, caretaker for his wife, Gabby Giffords, former Congresswoman, nearly assassinated by a lunatic responding to the kinda stochastic terrorism Trump's spouting. Knowing all this, I don't know how Trump can even talk to Kelly without his bone spurs flaring up. In any case, Nick cut through the BS, laying out the reality every soldier knows. Your oath is to the Constitution, not to a man, or wannabe king, and whatever bottle of whiskey is sitting on Pete Hegseth's desk when you walk into the so-called "Department of War." Nick took us through mission command, the legal structure of military obedience, and why "I was just following orders" won't cut it in the U.S. military. David was his usual fire today, too, reminding us how deep the rot goes. When he talked about Kristi Noem's criminal contempt exposure, the growing paths to impeaching the orange hobgoblin, and how Republicans are terrified with the Epstein files about to drop, you could feel in the air what we've been feeling a lot lately. The tide has shifted, left dead fish on the shore, and is telling us, from Epstein to MTG, his polling among onetime supporters to his economic sabotage, what's coming. And David, in Shuster-ific form, did no sugarcoating. This was where Nick really came alive. He talked about community building--veterans linking arms, creators lifting each other up, the "fuck-you-left" stepping into its rightful place. No apologizing for moral clarity, no soft-pedaling constitutional truths, but standing tall and being loud. He talked about men taking responsibility without turning into the grievance-soaked rage puppets The Right cultivates. And to paraphrase Sollozzo from The Godfather , all those politicians they carry around in their pockets, like so many nickels and dimes. | | ---|---|--- Nick also discussed elevating powerful voices--from Melissa Corrigan to Ellie Leonard--and why this moment demands organized courage, not polite despair. And then we got into the hard stuff. Impeachment as a constitutional duty, state Attorneys General using their legal jurisdiction to prosecute federal corruption, turning donors against corrupt incumbents, and pressuring institutions that have been asleep at the wheel. Nick hasn't been doing this that long, but he has the moral clarity of a man who's been fighting trench warfare for years. When he said, " They have to be afraid of losing their jobs," I know David and I were like, "right on." Hell, I think half the chat stood up and applauded. We even touched on the overlooked battlegrounds--Arkansas, Tennessee, Missouri--and why abandoning these states is political malpractice. Imagine if we'd been messaging that +22 Republican district in Tennessee with the special election coming up, we might even be the favorite. Trump has scrambled up the maps with his chaos, cruelty, corruption, criminality, and incompetence. The map isn't fixed like it has been for the past quarter-century. People are changing. The anger is real. And if we organize, speak plainly, and stop letting the fascists control the language and put them on defense--we win. The show was passion, strategy, humor, constitutional literacy, veteran insight, and a little bit of skincare--all working hand in hand, sometimes defend democracy. That's what Amped Up is. And that's who we are. Today, Nick Paro reminded us why we fight: because it's our time. Our moment. Our country. name: Deb Haaland
subject: When I think about Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
Join me in helping every family in New Mexico have a fair shot

| | |
---
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1132?t=1&akid=5899%2E400544%2ELB9_m-)
Hey friend — it's Deb. When I think about Thanksgiving, I think about the parents who are putting on a brave face for their children while they try to make ends meet. I know that feeling well.
About fifteen years ago, during this same week, my child and I were struggling. The only food in our cupboard was pinto beans and flour, and I wanted to give them a real holiday meal. I applied for emergency food stamps, but I was denied. I broke down in tears because I didn’t know how to tell my child: _it’s expensive to be poor._
That night, we ate what we had, and I tried to keep their spirits up. **This year, many families are doing the same thing, trying to stay strong for their kids even when things feel uncertain.**
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1127?t=2&akid=5899%2E400544%2ELB9_m-)
Friend, these moments shaped who I am. It’s why I strongly believe leaders should make people’s lives easier, not harder. We all want good roads, safe communities, strong education, access to parks and affordable, healthy food to eat.
**_[I want every family in New Mexico to have a fair shot. That's why I'm running to be the next governor of this beautiful state that I'm proud to call home.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1127?t=3&akid=5899%2E400544%2ELB9_m-)_**
I know the fights we face today are bigger than ever – and I’m prepared to get to work _immediately_. On day one, I will begin tackling the rising affordability crisis and healthcare costs, so we can build a state where every single person is safe, healthy, and can thrive. _But I can’t do this work alone._
Our grassroots-powered campaign was built for the people, by the people – and that includes you, friend. **_[So please, can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can comfortably spare, to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in New Mexico, and build a better future for working families?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1127?t=4&akid=5899%2E400544%2ELB9_m-)_**

clean_body: Join me in helping every family in New Mexico have a fair shot | | | - Hey friend — it's Deb. When I think about Thanksgiving, I think about the parents who are putting on a brave face for their children while they try to make ends meet. I know that feeling well. About fifteen years ago, during this same week, my child and I were struggling. The only food in our cupboard was pinto beans and flour, and I wanted to give them a real holiday meal. I applied for emergency food stamps, but I was denied. I broke down in tears because I didn’t know how to tell my child: it’s expensive to be poor. That night, we ate what we had, and I tried to keep their spirits up. This year, many families are doing the same thing, trying to stay strong for their kids even when things feel uncertain. - Friend, these moments shaped who I am. It’s why I strongly believe leaders should make people’s lives easier, not harder. We all want good roads, safe communities, strong education, access to parks and affordable, healthy food to eat. - I know the fights we face today are bigger than ever – and I’m prepared to get to work immediately. On day one, I will begin tackling the rising affordability crisis and healthcare costs, so we can build a state where every single person is safe, healthy, and can thrive. But I can’t do this work alone. Our grassroots-powered campaign was built for the people, by the people – and that includes you, friend. - If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | - | | - | | - | | - Be fierce, Deb | | | - | | -

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Before we sit down to eat tomorrow…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Tomorrow, many of us will gather with family and friends around a table
full of food. But before we do, we need to acknowledge the people who made
that possible — the farmworkers, day laborers, and immigrant workers
across this country.

Right now, those very workers are some of the people being most viciously
targeted and terrorized by Donald Trump, ICE, and the escalating
right-wing assault on immigrant communities.

Justice Democrats has always believed that a country powered by working
people must protect working people — not criminalize them, not dehumanize
them, and not profit off their labor while threatening their lives &
families.

So as we head into a holiday that’s supposed to be built focused on
gratitude, we’re asking you to give thanks by taking one simple,
meaningful action today:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=idf2024.BpCTgJ&refcode=em20251126-37226&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37226%2E1203867%2EH6UlSY ]Chip in to the National Day Laborer Organizing Network (NDLON)’s
Immigrant Defense Fund to fuel legal defense, organizing, and
rapid-response support for the workers who make Thanksgiving — and every
day — possible.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=idf2024.BpCTgJ&refcode=em20251126-37226&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=37226%2E1203867%2EH6UlSY ]Contribute $5

These are the workers who keep our food system alive. Many will spend
tomorrow working long hours, far from their families — and still living
with the fear of raids, detentions, and deportations. Trump and ICE want
to make that fear permanent. We refuse to let that happen.

We don’t just fight for a Democratic Party that wins elections — we fight
for a country where every worker, every family, and every community is
safe, respected, and free.

If you’ve ever said you believe in a people-powered movement... if you’ve
ever said you stand with the working class... if you’ve ever said no human
being is illegal...

Then this is the moment to show it. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=idf2024.BpCTgJ&refcode=em20251126-37226&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=37226%2E1203867%2EH6UlSY ]Make a contribution to support the
Immigrant Defense Fund now →

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251126-37226-footer&t=1023&refcode2=37226_1203867_H6UlSY&akid=37226%2E1203867%2EH6UlSY

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=37226%2E1203867%2EH6UlSY

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Hi, Peter... can I have a moment to reintroduce myself?
body:
I only need a minute or two. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120066370/585119760/1573338254?refcode=ea.91fe900f-1dcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.91fe900f-1dcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWZlOTAwZi0xZGNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aVFSTLrHAfdKnTP78E2zdjh9WKn6bPB2A89v1nbi4Us=) Hello Peter, I’m Roy Cooper, and before I ask for your contribution to our campaign for the U.S. Senate, I’d like to reintroduce myself and remind you why this fight is worth your attention — _[and your investment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120066371/585119761/1573338254?refcode=ea.91fe900f-1dcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.91fe900f-1dcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWZlOTAwZi0xZGNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aVFSTLrHAfdKnTP78E2zdjh9WKn6bPB2A89v1nbi4Us=)_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120066372/585119762/1573338254?refcode=ea.91fe900f-1dcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.91fe900f-1dcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWZlOTAwZi0xZGNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aVFSTLrHAfdKnTP78E2zdjh9WKn6bPB2A89v1nbi4Us=) I loved serving my home state of North Carolina as Governor, Attorney General, and a legislator before that. I’m a lucky husband and father. A diehard Carolina Hurricanes fan. A proud graduate of public schools. I’m the Governor who got NC’s Medicaid Expansion done and a fierce defender of your right to get an abortion if you choose to do so. And I’m asking for your support to be the next Democratic Senator from North Carolina because this state is the tipping point — if we win here, we can take back the U.S. Senate from the GOP. But Republicans won’t make it easy on us. They’re aggressively targeting this seat as the key to their majority, and they’re willing to spend unprecedented sums against me. I can’t defeat them alone. Peter, can I count on you? **[If you’re with me, click here to help our team raise $825,000 online before the end of November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120066373/585119763/1573338254?refcode=ea.91fe900f-1dcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.91fe900f-1dcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWZlOTAwZi0xZGNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aVFSTLrHAfdKnTP78E2zdjh9WKn6bPB2A89v1nbi4Us=)** Look, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I’m fed up with seeing Washington politicians strip away our rights, drive up the cost of living, tear apart our democracy and gut health care and SNAP benefits for folks in need. I’m profoundly frustrated for women who have been prevented from accessing reproductive care; students whose special education services are on the line; and future generations who deserve leaders who will protect our planet, not contribute to its destruction. **Peter, I’m ready to take on the national GOP, their powerful allies, and my well funded opponent — _with your help._ We have the momentum, but in a race this tight, every moment and every dollar counts. [Click here to donate and help close the gap to our November goal so we don’t lose the edge in this toss-up race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120066374/585119764/1573338254?refcode=ea.91fe900f-1dcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.91fe900f-1dcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWZlOTAwZi0xZGNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aVFSTLrHAfdKnTP78E2zdjh9WKn6bPB2A89v1nbi4Us=)** It is clear that we must achieve a balance of power in Washington to stop extreme Republicans from doing further harm to our nation. Flipping the Senate starts right here, in this toss-up race. That’s why national Republicans are already targeting me and directing huge sums to my far-right opponent. Experts are saying this’ll be the most competitive Senate election of 2026 — and it might be the first-ever to cost over 1 billion dollars. _Talk about absurd._ **[I am asking you to step up with a contribution before our end-of-month deadline because I can’t keep up with the GOP’s cash without your investment, and I can’t win this one without you on my team.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120066375/585119765/1573338254?refcode=ea.91fe900f-1dcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.91fe900f-1dcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWZlOTAwZi0xZGNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aVFSTLrHAfdKnTP78E2zdjh9WKn6bPB2A89v1nbi4Us=)** I will never stop fighting for this country, and I’m grateful to know you’re with me. Roy Cooper [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120066376/585119766/1573338254?refcode=ea.91fe900f-1dcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.91fe900f-1dcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWZlOTAwZi0xZGNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aVFSTLrHAfdKnTP78E2zdjh9WKn6bPB2A89v1nbi4Us=)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120066377/585119767/1573338254?refcode=ea.91fe900f-1dcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.91fe900f-1dcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWZlOTAwZi0xZGNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aVFSTLrHAfdKnTP78E2zdjh9WKn6bPB2A89v1nbi4Us=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120066378/585119768/1573338254?refcode=ea.91fe900f-1dcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.91fe900f-1dcb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWZlOTAwZi0xZGNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aVFSTLrHAfdKnTP78E2zdjh9WKn6bPB2A89v1nbi4Us=)

And I’m asking for your support to be the next Democratic Senator from North Carolina because this state is the tipping point — if we win here, we can take back the U.S. Senate from the GOP. But Republicans won’t make it easy on us. They’re aggressively targeting this seat as the key to their majority, and they’re willing to spend unprecedented sums against me. I can’t defeat them alone. Peter, can I count on you? = Look, I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I’m fed up with seeing Washington politicians strip away our rights, drive up the cost of living, tear apart our democracy and gut health care and SNAP benefits for folks in need. I’m profoundly frustrated for women who have been prevented from accessing reproductive care; students whose special education services are on the line; and future generations who deserve leaders who will protect our planet, not contribute to its destruction. Peter, I’m ready to take on the national GOP, their powerful allies, and my well funded opponent — with your help. We have the momentum, but in a race this tight, every moment and every dollar counts. = It is clear that we must achieve a balance of power in Washington to stop extreme Republicans from doing further harm to our nation. Flipping the Senate starts right here, in this toss-up race. That’s why national Republicans are already targeting me and directing huge sums to my far-right opponent. Experts are saying this’ll be the most competitive Senate election of 2026 — and it might be the first-ever to cost over 1 billion dollars. Talk about absurd. = I will never stop fighting for this country, and I’m grateful to know you’re with me. Roy Cooper = Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = | = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper Victory Fund PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal. Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible. The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Jack Schlossberg
subject: Not just here to stir the pot.
body:
Peter, I had a feeling my social media presence would ruffle some feathers... but there's a method here. And I had the honor of talking about it on MSNBC the other night.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/613936715357375A6B3664466A4C506A6E68366A7338363159565A3833396F697A4E755A726331486A524F42313861594E305A35502F47376765535045587347/editor_images/Jack%20MSNBC.gif]
In today's media landscape, you have to cut through the noise to make an impact... You know I can have fun online, but I'm serious about New Yorkers having leadership they can count on.
America is at a dangerous crossroads right now, and it's not the time to sit back and stay quiet to keep people comfortable. It's time to call out what's going on and actually do something to change our course.
NY-12 needs a congressperson who will meet this moment. Peter, I will be that leader. If you're with me, can I count on you to split a donation between Real Texas and my campaign now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=112025_3]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jack Schlossberg and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=112025_3&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=112025_3&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=112025_3&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=112025_3&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=112025_3&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=112025_3&amount=25]
If we continue on Trump's path, we face a country devoid of what makes us who we are: the land of opportunity, prosperity, and freedom.
I've used my platform to take on the Trump administration. time and time again I'm not afraid to call out injustice when I see it. And NAME, I'm not just here to stir the pot. I'm uniquely positioned to stand up for you and have a real impact.
In order to get to Congress, we need to build a winning team of grassroots supporters like YOU.
I promise it's not about how much you give, it’s about having you on our side!!
Split a donation between Real Texas and my campaign to show your support! Even just $5 today makes an impact on the size and the strength of our movement. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=112025_3]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jack Schlossberg and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=112025_3&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=112025_3&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=112025_3&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=112025_3&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?express_lane=true&refcode=112025_3&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=112025_3&amount=25]
Thanks for believing in me and this campaign. My team and I can’t wait to share more about what we’ve been working on! Stay tuned 👀
Talk soon,
Jack

name: President Trump
subject: Here’s what happened to Social Security.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
These changes will most definitely affect you. So I want you to be the first to hear about what I just signed into law!!!
| | | | |
---
## **_MESSAGE FROM THE PRESIDENT ON SOCIAL SECURITY!_**

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Friend,
These changes might definitely affect you!
Here’s what happened to Social Security:
I signed into LAW something I’m very proud of: NO TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY!

**But don’t thank me yet.**
_Democrats and Radical Judges are trying to shut down all the progress we’ve made TOGETHER. They hate that I’m putting the American people first. They’d rather keep wasting your money on their radical agendas._
It’s going to be hard, but in order to make this plan a reality, I’m going to need your help TODAY, not tomorrow. Tomorrow will be too late.

All I’m asking is for you to respond to me, IMMEDIATELY:
_**[DO YOU STAND WITH TRUMP ENDING TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY?](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**_
[YES](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[NO](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[END TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Thank you,

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Donald J. Trump

But we didn’t see your signature on our critical “Defend the USPS” petition, Peter. With the USPS confirming that more than 10,000+ postal workers will be laid off due to Trump’s cuts, it’s absolutely critical that we Democrats build a united front to push back. | Thank you! Democracy On The Line -FORWARDED MESSAGE BELOW- LOOK! LOOK! name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: You deserve an explanation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5131%2E35263%2ENcowk9)
Team, In just a second, I am going to ask you to **[make a donation](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-nov25.xl9hz-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5131%2E35263%2ENcowk9)** to support me and Democrats running for Senate. **I only need a moment of your time to explain why this is such an important request — especially right now.** With everything going on in Washington right now, it's never been more important that we flip the Senate next year and elect Democratic leaders who will fight for working families. But Republicans will stop at nothing, including spending astronomical amounts of money, to hold and expand their Senate majority. Their top priority? Staying in power so they can continue ramming through their agenda to make life better for their billionaire buddies on the backs of working people. I won’t lie, we have an uphill battle ahead of us, and it will require a big team effort. But I know that if any team has what it takes, it’s this one. Last year, we defied the odds by helping me to win my toughest re-election battle yet in a state that Donald Trump won. We know what it takes to win, and together, we can help to deliver even more wins next year across the Senate map. **[Before you log off to enjoy the holidays, will you pitch in to power my work in the Senate and help us win back our Democratic majority?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-nov25.xl9hz-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=5131%2E35263%2ENcowk9)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=stb-em-nov25.uvl5gT&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=5131%2E35263%2ENcowk9)
---

---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3666?c0=stb-em-nov25.98MYJ5&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=5131%2E35263%2ENcowk9)
---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3667?c0=stb-em-nov25.yt8pwP&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=5131%2E35263%2ENcowk9)
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3692?c0=stb-em-nov25.J_gAmR&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_PM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=5131%2E35263%2ENcowk9)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2591?c0=stb-em-nov25.jSrpPw&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251126_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=5131%2E35263%2ENcowk9)
---
I’m ready for the hard work ahead, and I hope you are too.
All my best,
Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=5131%2E35263%2ENcowk9) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=5131%2E35263%2ENcowk9)**

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: Following up on Tim’s note
body:
| | Peter – I’m bumping Tim’s note because he’s right: this month matters.

Since the very beginning, Marie’s campaign has been fueled by grassroots donations. She’s not a career politician who donates tens of thousands of dollars to her own campaign, she doesn’t accept money from corporate PACs, and she doesn’t have a network of wealthy family members on speed dial. Our GOP opponent can’t say the same.

That’s what sets Marie apart. They have deep-pocketed national donors – we have you.

Our grassroots team has defied the odds before, and we can’t slow down now. Every dollar helps us push back against the powerful forces trying to take away our agency. Your support means we can continue to stand up against those who think they can buy our vote.

[Will you donate today to ensure Southwest Washington remains strong and independent?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120067017/585121557/-1425100085?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_180DO_251126_2_5&refcode2=36e7dee0-20cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmU3ZGVlMC0yMGNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kmr9BlstILXNVUatr6UrDd76xSMUk9XeTGVRtg-o9Ws=)

Let’s keep fighting.

– Tim

name: Jimmy Panetta
subject: This is hurting working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2026, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120067197/585122244/-2113420158?source=EM_NBI_JP_20251126_FR_Tariffs_0_6MD_Jimmypanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDliNDM5Ni0yMmNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9WhhKTbhiTG-rIbFWMyM68vkoUQMVzHCUagfh_4640M=&emci=0615af8d-22cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=a49b4396-22cb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

Families in California’s 19th Congressional District are already struggling with rising costs, and tariffs are making everything more expensive. Groceries, gas, and essentials are climbing because the President chose a policy that hits working people first.

These tariffs were sold as a plan to help workers, but they have done the opposite. Prices are up, supply chains are strained, and the administration is floating gimmicks like one-time payouts to hide the long-term damage.

**Families deserve stability, not political distractions.**

No President should be able to unilaterally raise the cost of living for millions of Americans. That’s why I’m fighting for policies that protect working families and strengthen our economy, not policies that make life harder. Congress must reclaim its authority on tariffs and trade to lower these high prices.

[If you’re able to, will you chip in anything you can today to help support the work I am doing for our California families in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120067198/585122245/636563605?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20251126_FR_Tariffs_0_6MD_Jimmypanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDliNDM5Ni0yMmNiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9WhhKTbhiTG-rIbFWMyM68vkoUQMVzHCUagfh_4640M=)

Thank you for standing with me.

— Jimmy
---

| | Hey folks, Dennis Quaid here.

Here’s the thing: life doesn’t come with guarantees. The economy shifts, markets stumble, and years of hard work could slip through your fingers like sand.

Should it happen again—what’s your plan?

Think back just a few years. Inflation wasn’t the monster it feels like today. Prices made sense. The future felt steady.

But today? It’s a different story. Groceries cost more. Gas went up. And rising costs chip away at the value of your retirement savings every day.

But you don’t have to sit on the sidelines:
You’ve seen what happens when folks don’t prepare. It gets ugly. Savings accounts drain faster than expected, plans get downgraded, and peace of mind turns to heart-racing anxiety.

But it doesn’t have to be that way for you.
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
